| | Congressman Russell Fry, South Carolina’s Seventh Congressional District Congressman, is honored and humbled to represent the Pee Dee and Grand Strand areas in Washington, D.C. Russell Fry is the successful product of the American Dream. He learned from his parents that there is no such thing as a free lunch and that success comes from hard work and determination. Russell self-funded his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina and then earned his law degree at the Charleston School of Law. In law school, he served as Student Bar Association president, helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation, and received the prestigious Civility Award. For over a decade, he practiced law all along the Grand Strand. Russell has always been a public servant and an advocate for the conservative movement. Prior to his election to U.S. Congress, Russell Fry represented Horry County in the South Carolina General Assembly. As Chief Majority Whip in the State House, he fought to lower taxes, defend the unborn, and safeguard the 2nd Amendment. Additionally, Russell fought to put 18 policy initiatives into law in his time as Chairman of the SC House Opioid Abuse Prevention Study Committee. This legislation provided funding for education on opioids, opioid prevention, and opioid treatment. Russell and his wife, Bronwen, have one son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their beloved chocolate lab, Jasper.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money

body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/497966903baa536c/?utm_campaign=20241119&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card,
and your checking account.

Imagine all of your money being seized.

_That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me._

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest
legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State —
especially since my own law licenses have been _taken away_ from me!

But there’s one thing I want to make clear...

...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal
Defense Trust.

_THAT’S A LIE. _

The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust,
I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of
course the media and the Democrats will never report that.

And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to
contribute, please don’t. End of story.

But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my
freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice,
and rights of every U.S. citizen.

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND, BECAUSE
EVEN AFTER EVERYTHING THE LEFT HAS DONE TO ME, I WILL _NEVER_

December 6, 2024
President Biden, after promising not to do so, pardoned his son, Hunter, for convictions of illegal gun possession and tax evasion. But that's not all. Hunter Biden is also pardoned for all crimes he committed from 2014 to the present, even if he has not been charged yet.
The United States is one of the few countries where the President has unbridled power to pardon, just like a medieval king. Most countries require legislative, ministerial or judicial approval also. Furthermore, American presidents can issue pardons for possible criminal behavior in which no charges have been filed.
This was the case when President Nixon resigned in 1974. No charges were filed against Nixon, but President Ford's pardon prevented this from ever happening.
By absolving his son of all crimes from 2014, President Biden is preventing Hunter from every being prosecuted for being the bag man of [the Biden Crime Family,](https://substack.com/redirect/e0261e43-cb8d-4162-b2a3-f0ca6c2e10b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in which he collected millions of dollars in bribes from Ukraine, Russia and China.
But Hunter Biden did not keep the money for himself. He distributed it to at least [nine Biden family members](https://substack.com/redirect/c8c1e0da-24f3-4499-a989-6291c2cbdaed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) including the President's granddaughter and probably to the President himself, who was referred to as ["The Big Guy"](https://substack.com/redirect/7e8459ea-8262-4164-ac29-d789d8017735?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when these bribes were being negotiated. Expect other Biden family members to be pardoned too.
Furthermore, it appears Biden is contemplating pardoning Trump's detractors. For example, Kash Patel, Trump's nominee to head the FBI, wrote a [persuasive article ](https://substack.com/redirect/476a03cd-0331-4448-a9b8-83a09e6eda1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)that Liz Chaney, in her role of the House Select Committee to investigate Trump's behavior on January 6, deliberately excluded exculpatory evidence that Trump had tried unsuccessfully to have the National Guard deployed to prevent violence.
The political problem is that multiple Democrats and liberal media hacks stated publicly that they believed Biden's statements that he would not pardon his son. His Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre [blathered this lie](https://substack.com/redirect/5e172fac-a669-4c57-8ff2-f0571ef8e78e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) repeatedly.
As stated by lawyer Jonathan Turley:
"_With this pardon, Joe Biden shredded any residue of veracity and credibility as President. For years, he was repeatedly asked if he met any of his son 's clients. He lied and denied it. He was repeatedly asked if was aware of his son's foreign dealings. He lied and denied it. He was asked if he would pardon his son. He lied and denied it._"
The narrative was created that the noble Biden believed in rule of law while President Trump - who was portrayed as an incarnation of Hitler and Mussolini combined - would never stoop to such outrageous behavior.
This narrative is now caput. How can the Democrats scream bloody murder if President Trump pardons multiple participants in the January 6 riots? How can they honestly stop the nominations to the FBI of Kash Patel and of Pam Bondi to Attorney General when there is considerable evidence the Biden family took bribes while present directors of these agencies looked the other way? The only standards liberals have are double standards.
As victor Davis Hanson tersely stated:
"_The sanctimonious "rule of law" and "expert class" arguments of the discredited Left used to attack Kash Patel, Tulsi Gabbard, and RFK, Jr. are now rendered a joke._"
The irony of all this is that if the Democrats and the liberal media had not legally manipulated ballot harvesting in 2020 to place the grifter and sock puppet Joe Biden in the White House, this would all be over. Trump would be completing his second term. The wars in Ukraine and Israel would have probably not occurred. And given the historic ebb and flow of American politics, a Democratic such as Gavin Newsom or Josh Shapiro would be the President-Elect.
Now an emboldened President Trump with a Republican-controlled House, Senate and Supreme Court is about to enter the White House. The main problem the Democrats and the liberal media have is that they are not the sharpest tools in the shed.

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=de5d1d4d24f44988aa91feed6ec5666a&_e=HmkQ2eOzXVfiCPE36FubJ5hQQOnRubWBrzj3Z-QHCsZK2pGBMUfZDM7oTURfXSmQdCKPlaAIr04kpGi8Gqz_WkSHPTj2QVtMNGO5y-J1QojB4WxXXLccwlEkuYwi3T9miwcofrHkTgoEi5ijnGv8_rHU6SP6LKIRpylnSDHkzG7Ixt5HaxRi0oFWfMe0hMGK8MgMMOiUKj7wHAa8LQyDWGrCzo1-cVVmHnXsQHyUQqvztvmZhx2wwAYAwwkAMhrw5pSoWbfogfkjuaIZnqR_uuqjCEaiKN6EEZb-oGFSokks2SlW4I6GGxdvj9FCIx0zuEfAiLjEUcuAZ7ifWwXipH92nYA768ajMMjEs5fco4BmpxnzmKXGIUH2jZb6ZF_gUvKY_1_z1OCFcsWSg0PWOhCeHz06G8C8cBY0pfqj23Y%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=de5d1d4d24f44988aa91feed6ec5666a&_e=HmkQ2eOzXVfiCPE36FubJ5hQQOnRubWBrzj3Z-QHCsZK2pGBMUfZDM7oTURfXSmQdCKPlaAIr04kpGi8Gqz_WkSHPTj2QVtMNGO5y-J1QojB4WxXXLccwlEkuYwi3T9miwcofrHkTgoEi5ijnGv8_rHU6SP6LKIRpylnSDHkzG7Ixt5HaxRi0oFWfMe0hMGK8MgMMOiUKj7wHAa8LQyDWGrCzo1-cVVmHnXsQHyUQqvztvmZhx2wwAYAwwkAMhrw5mMYa_Yw_ndZqxgTU-JkL66JqkJBEZqmRSrG6Pyx3VCf3Cnjm6NgZYe7GEFeh6tdyeOB3wlJRvcaJZGh6w4cGbmR8gKSwv4mzAUsyfT8HlM5BW8oeVcQlHD2hLXyCSl0kFrs2yXL3ncilTE5qVDL0Fvw5KIrGmMawNyNrmHjhfg%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=de5d1d4d24f44988aa91feed6ec5666a&_e=HmkQ2eOzXVfiCPE36FubJ5hQQOnRubWBrzj3Z-QHCsZK2pGBMUfZDM7oTURfXSmQdCKPlaAIr04kpGi8Gqz_WkSHPTj2QVtMNGO5y-J1QojB4WxXXLccwlEkuYwi3T9miwcofrHkTgoEi5ijnGv8_rHU6SP6LKIRpylnSDHkzG7Ixt5HaxRi0oFWfMe0hMGK8MgMMOiUKj7wHAa8LQyDWGrCzo1-cVVmHnXsQHyUQqvztvmZhx2wwAYAwwkAMhrwjHGCsn4AQi6m2og8tBlnYl9x8f8_sTUA8ZNmIeajDQU6s0afC_pSQlwxiU3nthN-KEwL5QnbQYui85bpodA1T-VcSAp8ydMtCD3wo-aVCDKHpkeiHV4OPxzE06F6EZRfdY9XWu-DHoFZov7hoeQh21grzj2o8AN3jR_BFnGQIPU%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=de5d1d4d24f44988aa91feed6ec5666a&_e=HmkQ2eOzXVfiCPE36FubJ5hQQOnRubWBrzj3Z-QHCsZK2pGBMUfZDM7oTURfXSmQdCKPlaAIr04kpGi8Gqz_WkSHPTj2QVtMNGO5y-J1QojB4WxXXLccwlEkuYwi3T9miwcofrHkTgoEi5ijnGv8_rHU6SP6LKIRpylnSDHkzG7Ixt5HaxRi0oFWfMe0hMGK8MgMMOiUKj7wHAa8LQyDWGrCzo1-cVVmHnXsQHyUQqvztvmZhx2wwAYAwwkAMhrwqEkNUKGrJrLK-IqGVO_ra08qfYc75b4gDLdydDaiRalWRUwbk0RVDpzlDeY21KrcEsH8ZZs4jnaB_6s-dvA8Tj0GVwxAHLqw913WIQcvYcQEZQjp4RmQGgZKP0Xm-IME4DTljDykz5VDfbqrdprjT5uNU9JHhM9jeHI9Ou3CnsQ%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---

Kari Lake

Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, then they know nothing about me.And they know nothing about you , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new“First Amendment Fund” to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy. Every dollar given to this “First Amendment Fund” will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. And sued me for defamation. Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the “First Amendment Fund” that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

name: CADEM HQ
subject: Thanks to you, we flipped three U.S. House districts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Did you know, that gifts from supporters like you throughout the 2024 Election had a tremendous impact in California swing seat results?
Thanks to you, we flipped three U.S. House districts from red to blue here in California. And we got 4 out of 6 of our total targeted seats!
But these races were never a sure thing. It was only possible because of grassroots support.
➜ In CA-27 , Democrat George Whitesides beat Rep. Mike Garcia. Mike Garcia has relentlessly held onto this district since a special election in 2020, but we were finally able to flip it blue. George Whitesides won by just over a narrow 2% margin. ➜ In CA-45 , Democrat Derek Tran defeated Rep. Michelle Steel. At the start of the campaign, many pundits didn’t think we had a chance in this district. We proved them wrong when Derek Tran won his seat by a margin of 653 votes. ➜ And we just got word that in CA-13 , Democrat Adam Gray has won over Rep. John Duarte. This was a rematch of one of 2022’s closest races, and (you won’t believe this) the margin of victory for Adam Gray was a mere 187 votes. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]
These were the districts we emailed you about over the last year, telling you that we had a chance to win. Time and time again, you stepped up and responded with support. Now, we have these victories because of you.
At the same time, we also defended numerous vulnerable Democrats in swing seats. Democratic U.S. House incumbents did not lose a single seat across the state.
We know the result of the Presidential election was demoralizing and devastating. We understand, and we feel it too.
But please do not let the takeaway of this election be that your support didn’t matter. It did matter. It mattered in a huge way. Simply put, without grassroots donations and organizing, these results in California would’ve been impossible. Period. End of story.
We have spent the last month running way over budget so we could keep funding our operations in all of the too-close-to-call districts. If you feel moved to renew your support, this would be an incredibly impactful time for your gift of $ or more. But we understand if you need a moment to take a breath. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]Together, we accomplished important things in California this election. And together, we will keep organizing, mobilizing, and fighting through Donald Trump’s Presidency. The work of holding Trump accountable — and ultimately taking back the U.S. House — starts now.
Thank you so much,
- The full team at CADEM HQ

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]

* Private memos from Republican leaders.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Judicial Watch Victory Versus Fani Willis
body:
Biden Pardon Scandal

[INSIDE JW]

PARDON SCANDAL: The Biden Family’s Arc of Corruption

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71423&L=34066&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1FbXJWR29EemRSVSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=1d76e03c0a6394a637029cda1d3841ae326d9659574a3dd8e8bda19c76f4b325]
Joe Biden’s execrable pardon of Hunter perfectly fits the Biden
family’s arc of corruption. The pardon seems to be all about
protecting Joe Biden and helping ensure his son will be less likely to
testify against him. Indeed, Joe Biden’s pardon statement is full of
false allegations about how Hunter’s prosecution (hamstrung by his
very own Justice Department) was selective and corrupt. The only
“selective prosecution” involved here is the decision not to
select Joe Biden for prosecution.

The Biden gang tried to rig the prosecution of Hunter. It failed
largely because of honest IRS whistleblowers and one tough judge. Joe
Biden has broken his “promise” and pardoned Hunter for his role in
the treasonous Chinese and Ukrainian business relationships involved
in the tax case.

President Biden arguably overstepped his constitutional authority on
Sunday by issuing an unusual blanket pardon for Hunter Biden for any
and all offenses (known and unknown) for a ten-year time period (up
until this week!).

As Joe Biden did not pardon himself, he can and should face a serious
criminal investigation for his family corruption ring.

Will Attorney General Garland resign in protest and outrage now that
Joe Biden has stated Garland’s prosecution of Hunter Biden was
corrupt and selective? Are Biden's criticisms of the Justice
Department’s employees as corrupt and “dangerous” or is that
only true when Republicans, Trump, and conservatives criticize the
Justice Department?

In the meantime, we have already expanded our Biden family corruption
investigations to include this latest pardon scandal.

We have multiple federal lawsuits focused on Biden family corruption:

In June 2024, we received records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71423&L=32880&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW5mYW1vdXMtaHVudGVyLWxhcHRvcC1sZXR0ZXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1657e526166f7e581942d072f7f6ae82b869b4a3177ebfb9c6965108b0927ffe]
from
the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) showing Mike Morell, former
acting CIA director under President Obama, requesting CIA permission
to publish a letter

> Plaintiff is thus entitled to judgment by default as if every item
> and paragraph of the complaint were supported by proper and
> sufficient evidence. O.C.G.A. § 9-11-55(a). Here, this means
> Plaintiff has established that Defendant violated the ORA by failing
> to either turn over responsive records or else notify Plaintiff of
> her decision to withhold some or all such records.
>
> In its complaint, Plaintiff sought the following relief:
>
> 1) a declaration that Defendant has violated the ORA;
>
> 2) an order for Defendant to search for all records responsive to
> Plaintiff’s request without further delay;
>
> 3) an injunction ordering Defendant to cease withholding non-exempt
> public records responsive to the request;
>
> 4) an award of attorney’s fees and costs pursuant to O.C.G.A. §
> 50-18-73(b);
>
> 5) a writ of mandamus, ordering Defendant to provide the requested
> records; and
>
> 6) any other relief the Court deems proper.
>
> By finding Defendant in default, the Court has in effect declared
> that she has violated the ORA. The Court also hereby ORDERS
> Defendant to conduct a diligent search of her records for responsive
> materials within five business days of the entry of this Order.
> Within that same five day period, Defendant is ORDERED to provide
> Plaintiff with copies of all responsive records that are not legally
> exempted or excepted from disclosure. If Defendant is required or
> decides to withhold all or part of a requested record, she should

> 50-18-71(d)). If the records are stored electronically, they may be

> necessary at this time (to include striking Defendant’s answer,

> Garland, Attorney General, DOJ, and General Mark Alexander Milley,
> former, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, concerning:
>
> (1) President or former President Donald J. Trump
>
> (2) Domestic Violent Extremism
>
> (3) Far-right Militia Movements.
The request asks that records be provided for the period from January
7, 2021, to October 15, 2024.

In his recent book
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71423&L=34064&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2ltb25hbmRzY2h1c3Rlci5jb20vYm9va3MvV2FyL0JvYi1Xb29kd2FyZC85NzgxNjY4MDUyMjczP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2d876bd795fcb4244cd81ab3e362152acbbd93f13880a3e4986a49547595de40],
journalist Bob Woodward wrote that in early 2021 Garland and Milley
met for lunch at the Department of Justice. They discussed then-former
President Donald J. Trump, and Chairman Milley pressed the attorney
general to investigate domestic threats and “far-right militia
groups.” Woodward described the meeting as “highly unusual, if not
unprecedented.”

Milley and Garland’s reported meeting about targeting President
Trump and other American citizens further demonstrates the Biden
administration was and is at odds with the foundational principles of
our constitutional republic. And that the Justice Department would
flout FOIA law to hide the details of this conspiracy meeting speaks
volumes about its contempt for the rule of law.

$67.5 BILLION SAVED AFTER FEDERAL AGENCIES ARE DIRECTED TO IMPROVE
EFFICIENCY

President Trump and his Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)
lieutenants can’t come soon enough, as our _Corruption Chronicles_
blog points out
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71423&L=34057&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ292dC1zYXZlcy02Ny01LWJpbGxpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=d04f07c4f04e6cc5dec0bd8e708620457e5b6be678117d8c555a18d7741f1fd3].

clean_body: Biden Pardon Scandal [INSIDE JW] PARDON SCANDAL: The Biden Family’s Arc of Corruption [] Joe Biden’s execrable pardon of Hunter perfectly fits the Biden family’s arc of corruption. The pardon seems to be all about protecting Joe Biden and helping ensure his son will be less likely to testify against him. Indeed, Joe Biden’s pardon statement is full of false allegations about how Hunter’s prosecution (hamstrung by his very own Justice Department) was selective and corrupt. The only “selective prosecution” involved here is the decision not to select Joe Biden for prosecution. The Biden gang tried to rig the prosecution of Hunter. It failed largely because of honest IRS whistleblowers and one tough judge. Joe Biden has broken his “promise” and pardoned Hunter for his role in the treasonous Chinese and Ukrainian business relationships involved in the tax case. President Biden arguably overstepped his constitutional authority on Sunday by issuing an unusual blanket pardon for Hunter Biden for any and all offenses (known and unknown) for a ten-year time period (up until this week!). As Joe Biden did not pardon himself, he can and should face a serious criminal investigation for his family corruption ring. Will Attorney General Garland resign in protest and outrage now that Joe Biden has stated Garland’s prosecution of Hunter Biden was corrupt and selective? Are Biden's criticisms of the Justice Department’s employees as corrupt and “dangerous” or is that only true when Republicans, Trump, and conservatives criticize the Justice Department? In the meantime, we have already expanded our Biden family corruption investigations to include this latest pardon scandal. We have multiple federal lawsuits focused on Biden family corruption: In June 2024, we received records [] from the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) showing Mike Morell, former acting CIA director under President Obama, requesting CIA permission to publish a letter [] by former intelligence community leaders stating that they believed the laptop emails exposing Hunter Biden’s connections to Ukraine were Russian disinformation. Morrell’s request for prepublication review was approved in just six hours by the CIA. In May 2023, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the National Archives for Biden family records and communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications between the Bidens and several known business associates. On October 14, 2022, we sued [] the Justice Department for all records in the possession of FBI Supervisory Intelligence Analyst Brian Auten regarding an August 6, 2020, briefing provided to members of the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Chuck Grassley (R-IA) raised concerns that the briefing was intended to undermine the senators’ investigation of Hunter Biden. In December 2020, State Department records [] obtained through a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit showed that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. In October 2020, we forced the release of State Department records [] that included a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma Holdings to combat corruption allegations. At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings. Given the record, one can expect more corruption to emerge from the Biden crime family. And one can expect Judicial Watch to be there to pursue the truth. JUDICIAL WATCH VICTORY: COURT FINDS FANI WILLIS IN DEFAULT, ORDERS HER TO PRODUCE RECORDS The lawfare against Donald Trump has not only been corrupt but also sloppy. The Superior Court in Fulton County entered an order [] granting a motion for default judgment against District Attorney Fani Willis in our lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. In doing so, the court grants our request for attorneys’ fees and orders Willis to search for and provide releasable records to us within five business days. We filed our March 2024 lawsuit [] in the Superior Court of Fulton County, GA, after Willis and the county denied having any records responsive to an August 2023 Georgia Open Records Act (ORA) request for communications with the Special Counsel’s office and/or the January 6 Committee (Judicial Watch Inc. v. Fani Willis et al. [ (No. 24-CV-002805)). In our lawsuit [] we stated that Willis’ “representation about not having records responsive to the request is likely false.” We referred to a December 5, 2023, letter [] from House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan to Willis that cites a December 2021 letter from Willis to then-House January 6 Committee Chairman Bennie Thompson (D-MS). In that letter Willis requested assistance from the committee and offered to travel to DC. In May 2024, we asked [] the court to declare a default judgment, noting that Willis was served with the lawsuit in March 2024 and had “not filed an answer,” which “was due 30 days after service.” The recently issued default judgment [] states: “The Court finds Defendant [Willis, in her official capacity] is in default and has been since 11 April 2024.” Further, Willis “never moved to open default on any basis (not even during the period when she could have opened default as a matter of right), she never paid costs, and she never offered up a meritorious defense.” Plaintiff is thus entitled to judgment by default as if every item and paragraph of the complaint were supported by proper and sufficient evidence. O.C.G.A. § 9-11-55(a). Here, this means Plaintiff has established that Defendant violated the ORA by failing to either turn over responsive records or else notify Plaintiff of her decision to withhold some or all such records. In its complaint, Plaintiff sought the following relief: 1) a declaration that Defendant has violated the ORA; 2) an order for Defendant to search for all records responsive to Plaintiff’s request without further delay; 3) an injunction ordering Defendant to cease withholding non-exempt public records responsive to the request; 4) an award of attorney’s fees and costs pursuant to O.C.G.A. § 50-18-73(b); 5) a writ of mandamus, ordering Defendant to provide the requested records; and 6) any other relief the Court deems proper. By finding Defendant in default, the Court has in effect declared that she has violated the ORA. The Court also hereby ORDERS Defendant to conduct a diligent search of her records for responsive materials within five business days of the entry of this Order. Within that same five day period, Defendant is ORDERED to provide Plaintiff with copies of all responsive records that are not legally exempted or excepted from disclosure. If Defendant is required or decides to withhold all or part of a requested record, she should follow the procedures set forth in the ORA (see O.C.G.A. § 50-18-71(d)). If the records are stored electronically, they may be produced electronically in a commonly used format such as PDF. The Court expects that such production will include the correspondence identified by Plaintiff in its complaint. If it does not, Defendant is further ORDERED to provide an explanation why such correspondence does not exist in Defendant’s records (or why it is being withheld). Beyond that, no other relief, injunctive or otherwise, is necessary at this time (to include striking Defendant’s answer, which is of no effect based on the Court’s finding of default). The court set a hearing on our attorneys’ fees for December 20. Fani Willis is something else. We’ve been doing this work for 30 years, and this is the first time in our experience a government official has been found in default for not showing up in court to answer an open records lawsuit. We look forward to getting any documents from the Fani Willis operation about collusion with the Biden administration and Nancy Pelosi’s Congress on her unprecedented and compromised “get-Trump” prosecution. We have several Freedom of Information Act lawsuits related to the prosecutorial abuse targeting Trump: In February 2024, the U.S. Department of Justice asked [] a federal court to allow the agency to keep secret the names of top staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office that is targeting former President Donald Trump and other Americans. (Before his appointment to investigate and prosecute Trump, Smith was at the center of several controversial issues, the IRS scandal [] among them. In 2014, a Judicial Watch investigation [] revealed that top IRS officials had been in communication with Jack Smith’s then-Public Integrity Section about a plan to launch criminal investigations into conservative tax-exempt groups. Read more here [].) In January 2024, we filed a lawsuit [] against Fulton County, Georgia, for records regarding the hiring of Nathan Wade as a special prosecutor by District Attorney Fani Willis. Wade was hired to pursue unprecedented criminal investigations and prosecutions against former President Trump and others over the 2020 election disputes. In October 2023, we sued [] the DOJ for records and communications between the Office of U.S. Special Counsel Jack Smith and the Fulton County, Georgia, District Attorney’s office regarding requests/receipt of federal funding/assistance in the investigation of former President Trump and his 18 co defendants in the Fulton County indictment [] of August 14, 2023. To date, the DOJ is refusing to confirm or deny the existence of records, claiming that to do so would interfere with enforcement proceedings. Judicial Watch’s litigation challenging this is continuing. Through the New York Freedom of Information Law, in July 2023,we received the engagement letter [] showing New York County District Attorney Alvin L. Bragg paid $900 per hour for partners and $500 per hour for associates to the Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher law firm for the purpose of suing Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) in an effort to shut down the House Judiciary Committee’s oversight investigation into Bragg’s unprecedented indictment of former President Donald Trump. Be sure to check back next week to find out what, if any, documents Fani Willis finally does turn over to Judicial Watch! JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE ABOUT MILLEY/GARLAND MEETING In what looks like military coup-like behavior, it seems that Joe Biden’s Joint Chiefs Chairman was busy colluding with other administration apparatchiks, specifically Merrick Garland, against Donald Trump and countless other Americans. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for details of a reported meeting between Attorney General Merrick Garland and Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman General Mark A. Milley in which they discussed President Trump and during which Milley pressured Garland to target American “far right” militia movements (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:24-cv-03380)). We sued after the Justice Department failed to respond to an October 15, 2024, FOIA request for: Records and communications including emails, email chains, email attachments, text message meeting minutes, outlook calendars, voice recordings, video recordings, correspondence, statements, letters, memoranda, letters, reports, briefings, cables, presentations, notes, or other form of record, regarding a meeting between Merrick Garland, Attorney General, DOJ, and General Mark Alexander Milley, former, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, concerning: (1) President or former President Donald J. Trump (2) Domestic Violent Extremism (3) Far-right Militia Movements. The request asks that records be provided for the period from January 7, 2021, to October 15, 2024. In his recent book [], journalist Bob Woodward wrote that in early 2021 Garland and Milley met for lunch at the Department of Justice. They discussed then-former President Donald J. Trump, and Chairman Milley pressed the attorney general to investigate domestic threats and “far-right militia groups.” Woodward described the meeting as “highly unusual, if not unprecedented.” Milley and Garland’s reported meeting about targeting President Trump and other American citizens further demonstrates the Biden administration was and is at odds with the foundational principles of our constitutional republic. And that the Justice Department would flout FOIA law to hide the details of this conspiracy meeting speaks volumes about its contempt for the rule of law. $67.5 BILLION SAVED AFTER FEDERAL AGENCIES ARE DIRECTED TO IMPROVE EFFICIENCY President Trump and his Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) lieutenants can’t come soon enough, as our Corruption Chronicles_ blog points out []. Demonstrating the need for President-elect Donald Trump’s new Department of Government Efficiency [], the investigative arm of Congress had to direct some government agencies to “improve the efficiency and effectiveness of federal programs” in order to save a colossal $67.5 billion [] in fiscal year 2024, which ended in September. Otherwise, American taxpayers would be forced to pick up the tab for yet more government waste, which is rampant and has long persisted under both Democratic and Republican administrations. To save the tens of billions, seemingly a drop in the bucket considering the government spent $6.75 trillion [ fiscal year 2024, the few federal agencies involved had to receive instructions from the Government Accountability Office (GAO). The nonpartisan and independent Congressional watchdog examines how taxpayer dollars are spent and provides lawmakers with objective and fact-based information to help the government save money and work more efficiently. Here are some examples that led to the latest savings. The GAO directed Medicaid to better align states’ estimates for demonstrations with recent costs, saving $13.4 billion. The Department of Energy (DOE) halted construction on a facility that is no longer necessary for treating nuclear and hazardous waste, saving $6 billion. The Department of Defense (DOD) was instructed to identify improper payments, errors, and fraud, resulting in $4.8 billion in savings. The Small Business Administration (SBA) was forced to crack down on the rampant fraud of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) that doled out monstrous sums of money to small businesses recovering from the pandemic, resulting in the decline of $2.1 billion in ineligible or fraudulent applicants. The list of examples continues and can be viewed in detail in the GAO’s lengthy report [], which was recently released to the public and covers the agency’s overall performance and accountability for 2024. The watchdog estimates that the questionable programs it is currently targeting will save American taxpayers at least $50 billion in fiscal year 2025. The GAO has cracked down on tens of thousands of reckless government programs since 2002, saving approximately $1.45 trillion. However, many federal agencies have blown off thousands of recommendations that could result in $106 billion to $208 billion in financial benefits, according to GAO estimates. The congressional watchdog implies that it more than earns its keep with a budget that is a lot smaller—$811.9 million in fiscal year 2024—than the money it saves taxpayers by promoting better management throughout government, which should occur without the GAO’s mandates. Careless spending has long been an issue for government agencies, which are typically bloated and mismanaged, and the problem has worsened significantly under the Biden administration illustrating a need for the Department of Government Efficiency. The office will be headed by billionaire Elon Musk, the head of electric car company Tesla, rocket company SpaceX and social media platform X and Vivek Ramaswamy, a pharmaceutical entrepreneur and Yale Law School graduate. Besides cutting wasteful spending the new department will be tasked with dismantling government bureaucracy, slashing excess regulations, and restructuring federal agencies. It will send shockwaves through the system, and anyone involved in government waste, according to Musk. Judicial Watch has for decades exposed enormous amounts of government waste and this year alone has reported on well over a billion dollars in reckless spending [], just a snippet of a widespread issue. That does not include mandatory spending such as Social Security, Medicare or military and homeland security, areas that are also plagued by waste. There is a category listed as “other” in which the government doled out an astonishing $238 billion in fiscal year 2024 and some of the allocations are downright outrageous. Examples range from $15 million to fight climate change in an Islamic nation that hates America and serves as a recruiting ground for terrorist groups such as Al-Qaeda Indian Subcontinent (AQIS) and the Islamic State of Iraq and Syria (ISIS) to half a billion dollars to build electric vehicle charges in mostly underserved communities to $2 million to combat corruption in Mexican sports betting. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [advertisement] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2024, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

* **TOP NEWS**

"**'Texas House speaker who faced blowback over Paxton impeachment drops bid to keep post,** " AP's **Nadia Lathan** -- "The Republican speaker of the Texas House abandoned efforts Friday to keep his powerful post in the face of unrelenting pressure from the party's hard right and anger over [the historic impeachment](https://substack.com/redirect/58ded815-7d8b-43f5-b543-9cb512ba47ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last year of Texas Attorney General **Ken Paxton**.

**Dade Phelan 's** decision, a victory for the GOP's ascendant right flank, sets off a fight over who will become his successor at a time when Texas Republicans are eager to be a policy model for President-elect **Donald Trump 's** agenda.

The Texas House has long acted as a more moderate guardrail even as lawmakers under Phelan passed some of the nation's toughest restrictions over abortion, immigration and voting.

But Paxton's impeachment last year in the House over corruption accusations angered conservatives and drew a rebuke from Trump, plunging Phelan into an expensive battle just to win reelection and a vanishing path to keep one of the most powerful positions in Texas.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/5b1a8a3a-4e3a-42cf-892e-119a829f99b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/5b1a8a3a-4e3a-42cf-892e-119a829f99b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"By stepping aside, I believe we create the best opportunity for our members to rally around a new candidate who will uphold the principles that make our House one of the most exceptional, deliberative legislative bodies in the country," Phelan said in a statement.

Phelan's campaign to hang onto the job reflected a broader power struggle within the GOP, which expanded its already commanding majorities in the Texas Legislature in November's elections." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "'Texas House speaker who faced blowback over Paxton impeachment drops bid to keep post, " AP's Nadia Lathan -- "The Republican speaker of the Texas House abandoned efforts Friday to keep his powerful post in the face of unrelenting pressure from the party's hard right and anger over last year of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton. Dade Phelan 's decision, a victory for the GOP's ascendant right flank, sets off a fight over who will become his successor at a time when Texas Republicans are eager to be a policy model for President-elect Donald Trump 's agenda. The Texas House has long acted as a more moderate guardrail even as lawmakers under Phelan passed some of the nation's toughest restrictions over abortion, immigration and voting. But Paxton's impeachment last year in the House over corruption accusations angered conservatives and drew a rebuke from Trump, plunging Phelan into an expensive battle just to win reelection and a vanishing path to keep one of the most powerful positions in Texas. "By stepping aside, I believe we create the best opportunity for our members to rally around a new candidate who will uphold the principles that make our House one of the most exceptional, deliberative legislative bodies in the country," Phelan said in a statement. Phelan's campaign to hang onto the job reflected a broader power struggle within the GOP, which expanded its already commanding majorities in the Texas Legislature in November's elections." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. "**'Texas House speaker who faced blowback over Paxton impeachment drops bid to keep post,** " AP's **Nadia Lathan** -- "The Republican speaker of the Texas House abandoned efforts Friday to keep his powerful post in the face of unrelenting pressure from the party's hard right and anger over [the historic impeachment](https://substack.com/redirect/93ee08dd-3d1a-420e-b747-a5acec24ce9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last year of Texas Attorney General **Ken Paxton**.

**Dade Phelan 's** decision, a victory for the GOP's ascendant right flank, sets off a fight over who will become his successor at a time when Texas Republicans are eager to be a policy model for President-elect **Donald Trump 's** agenda.

The Texas House has long acted as a more moderate guardrail even as lawmakers under Phelan passed some of the nation's toughest restrictions over abortion, immigration and voting.

But Paxton's impeachment last year in the House over corruption accusations angered conservatives and drew a rebuke from Trump, plunging Phelan into an expensive battle just to win reelection and a vanishing path to keep one of the most powerful positions in Texas.

"By stepping aside, I believe we create the best opportunity for our members to rally around a new candidate who will uphold the principles that make our House one of the most exceptional, deliberative legislative bodies in the country," Phelan said in a statement.

Phelan's campaign to hang onto the job reflected a broader power struggle within the GOP, which expanded its already commanding majorities in the Texas Legislature in November's elections." name: Letitia James
subject: We WON'T stay silent.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98297664/516234168/-2022193277?refcode=jtk1767-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMWUyZC0zY2I0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5TlLauu27No-uJvddgUzDrUFZhQ7Z5HUt8OrHy3lL-8=)
---
Peter, I know this is a long email, but with so many of our fundamental rights at risk heading into 2025, **I wanted you to understand what we're up against.**
Right now, far-right lawmakers are intensifying their attacks on the values we hold dear – including abortion access, voting rights, and affordable health care. With powerful special interests backing their every move, they could undo the hard-won progress we've fought so tirelessly to achieve.
But with unwavering resolve, I'm committed to standing strong against their attempts to tear this country apart. I'm ready to fight harder than ever to protect the people of New York and those around the country from the extremism threatening our future. **But I'm missing your support in reaching my 1,000 Team James Membership donation goal****.**
**[Please, will you make your first donation of the year to my campaign and help us put a stop to far-right extremism in 2025 and beyond?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98297665/516234169/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1767-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMWUyZC0zY2I0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5TlLauu27No-uJvddgUzDrUFZhQ7Z5HUt8OrHy3lL-8=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98297666/516234170/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1767-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMWUyZC0zY2I0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5TlLauu27No-uJvddgUzDrUFZhQ7Z5HUt8OrHy3lL-8=)
---
But with Republicans set to take control of Washington in January, we know the challenges ahead will only intensify.

The gun lobby remains as influential as ever, far-right lawmakers are becoming increasingly aggressive in their efforts to control every aspect of our lives, and corrupt politicians are more eager than ever to evade accountability.
**Let me be clear: I will never back down from these battles.**

But the truth is, I can't win them alone. Every contribution from grassroots supporters has been the driving force behind our hard-won victories.
**And with your first donation of the year today, we'll be able to send extremists and their special interests a clear message in the year ahead: We _won't_ stay silent, we _won't_ allow our rights to be rolled back, and we _won't_ stop pushing for the progress this nation deserves. [So please, will you rush $5 or more right now to help me reach my critical 1,000 Team James Membership donation goal so that we can continue to fight for the brighter future we deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98297667/516234171/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1767-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMWUyZC0zY2I0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5TlLauu27No-uJvddgUzDrUFZhQ7Z5HUt8OrHy3lL-8=)**

name: CADEM
subject: 🎉The 2025 ADEM Election is Here! 🎉
body:
Check out our website | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e1883ad79740/dnc-convention-hotel-link-delegate-packages-and-more-12719292?e=ceda8b4f9a)
---
| | | | | California Democrats,
🎉**The California Democratic Party is excited to announce that we’ve launched the 2025 ADEM Election Website!** 🎉
💻 To assist you in becoming a Delegate, we’re excited to introduce our new 2025 ADEM website: [adem.cadem.org](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=eebceba315&e=ceda8b4f9a)! This website is a resource to support Democratic Party activists and Delegates who would like the role and the opportunity to:
* Increase your political impact by voting for the endorsements of the California Democratic Party for partisan legislative and statewide office in California,
* Vote for positions we take on the Ballot Propositions,
* Build a community with passionate and diverse California Democrats,
* Take on greater responsibility as a voice for your local district when establishing the official California Democratic State Platform (in even-numbered years), and
* Elect 16-25 CADEM Regional Directors who function as your liaison between the California Democratic Party, County Central Committees, and Democratic Party Clubs. 💻

Any Democrat registered to vote in California is eligible to run for Assembly District Delegate and/or Executive Board Representative, provided they are a registered Democrat and reside in the relevant Assembly District by November 5, 2024. Candidates who cannot register to vote due to citizenship status are still eligible to participate in the 2025 ADEM Procedures.
The application to run as an ADEM Delegate opens on Tuesday, December 9, 2024 at 12 p.m. and closes Wednesday, January 8, 2025 at 12:00 p.m. Please visit [adem.cadem.org](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=33fbb3fafa&e=ceda8b4f9a) to apply!
---
[CLICK HERE TO VISIT THE ADEM WEBSITE](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=946f82f19f&e=ceda8b4f9a)
| To learn more about the procedures and key dates for the 2025 ADEMs Election, please visit [adem.cadem.org](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=5668bbaeda&e=ceda8b4f9a) or email [adem@cadem.org](mailto:adem@cadem.org).
Thank you,Team CADEM
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=2bb6ca2812&e=ceda8b4f9a)
---
[](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=eefdf0409a&e=ceda8b4f9a)
---

_ Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
California Democratic Party 1830 9th St Sacramento, CA 95811 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=a20213d7f8&e=ceda8b4f9a&c=3b1f8df698) or [unsubscribe](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=a20213d7f8&t=b&e=ceda8b4f9a&c=3b1f8df698)

name: Bill Holland, LCV
subject: The good news we need: clean energy is winning across the country
body:
If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4NzI4NzIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDU2MjAyMgS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | Dear Peter,
---
| | In 2024, states continued to implement bold climate solutions and enact policies driving the clean energy transition. Our latest annual [**Clean Energy For All: Clean Energy Success in the States report**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrM8pzvzf~) details the top stories of exciting progress in 31 states across the country and the vital work of our affiliated organizations in the Conservation Voters Movement.
---
| | We can’t ignore the importance of this moment as we prepare for the return of an anti-environment Trump administration. During Trump’s first term, he rolled back over 100 environmental protections, attacked climate science, and proposed massive giveaways to Big Oil. He has already made clear that he intends to try to do the same in his second term. However, in the face of those attacks, **state leaders continue to prove they can and will lead on climate action to lower energy costs for families, create millions of jobs, bring important revenue to communities, and safeguard public health by reducing pollution across the United States.**
---
| | [ ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/z9e0fz3~7~)
---
| | The [**2024 Clean Energy Success in the States report**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_sLg8_) offers hope for the future and shows that clean energy progress is happening everywhere, thanks in large part to the advocacy of LCV’s state affiliates. This progress is bringing benefits and opportunities to communities nationwide.
---
| | In 2024, states expanded access to solar power, made critical investments in the electricity grid, held utilities accountable to keep costs down for consumers, protected communities from fossil fuel pollution, and utilized transformative federal investments from the Inflation Reduction Act. In addition, the country’s first commercial-scale offshore wind project was completed, powering as many as 70,000 homes on Long Island with clean, renewable energy. Since we launched the Clean Energy for All program in 2018, **more than 40% of people in the U.S. now live in places committed to 100%** – up from 1% before we started.
---
| | There’s a lot to celebrate from this year, maybe even in your own state. [**Read the full Clean Energy For All: Clean Energy Success in the States report and learn more here.**](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | Thank you for your continued support.
---
| | Bill Holland
Vice President of State Policy and Advocacy
League of Conservation Voters
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11872872&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDU2MjAyMgS2&spReportId=MjEwMDU2MjAyMgS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11872872&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDU2MjAyMgS2&spReportId=MjEwMDU2MjAyMgS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
|
* * *
---

This progress is bringing benefits and opportunities to communities nationwide. | | In 2024, states expanded access to solar power, made critical investments in the electricity grid, held utilities accountable to keep costs down for consumers, protected communities from fossil fuel pollution, and utilized transformative federal investments from the Inflation Reduction Act. Since we launched the Clean Energy for All program in 2018, more than 40% of people in the U.S. now live in places committed to 100% – up from 1% before we started. | | There’s a lot to celebrate from this year, maybe even in your own state. | | Thank you for your continued support. | | Bill Holland Vice President of State Policy and Advocacy League of Conservation Voters | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, . from our supporter list. mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject= , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. 740 15th St NW, Suite 700 Washington, DC 20005 202-785-8683 | | | | *

name: azdem.org
subject: The fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header]
Election denialism has staying power even after Trump’s win
— Missouri Independent, December 3, 2024
And in Arizona, Republican U.S. Senate candidate Kari Lake, who has spent two years disputing her defeat in the 2022 governor’s race, hasn’t acknowledged her Senate loss. While she thanked her supporters in a video posted to X, the platform formerly called Twitter, she stopped short of conceding to Democratic U.S. Rep. Ruben Gallego.

Folks — a second Trump Administration means that we’ll have to be continually vigilant against the misinformation and denialism that instills unwarranted distrust in our free and fair elections.

While we’ve finalized the counts and Ruben Gallego will be Arizona’s next Senator, Kari Lake still has yet to officially concede the race and has spent hundreds of thousands of dollars to drag losing election denial claims in court.

We need a coalition of Arizonans to stand up against election denialism and extremism. Will you add your name today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RTCDsKfbOE-z5BBA-v6hPA2]

SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RTCDsKfbOE-z5BBA-v6hPA2]

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Discover God’s Will for Your Life in 2025
body:
Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.
| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrh2i5c7pdpcrrdcc0nlorsrk96m2tqtaup8ngs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm4o30cth2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him.

I recently received a wonderful reminder of the importance of this practice from Timothy, a chaplain at Parkersburg Correctional Center in West Virginia. Timothy shared his morning routine before heading out to minister to inmates. Here's what he wrote:

_" My day starts by reading your daily devotional email, followed by listening to your daily message. I need to renew my mind and spirit to help me minister to the inmates, and I lean on these things to help me. God is using your ministry to touch lives behind the razor wire. There are no boundaries to God's love."_

What a powerful reminder of God's limitless love and how He reaches each of us wherever we are. No matter our circumstances, we can find strength, guidance, and renewal in His Word.

With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:

* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

---
| | For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities.

This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love.
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2od2si7gha8jtdguitsgo8rnm4fh5782igtogio_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm4o30cth2bs)
---
| | Request your copy here:
[https://secure.ptv.org/2025-navy-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional-generous-gift-1](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zphdnhfslnnjvjp4iaaeimsgv36h3f99dro3ppf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm4o30cth2bs)

Thank you for being a part of this ministry. I'm praying that this new devotional will be a daily anchor point of encouragement and wisdom for all who read it.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffres
---

Update For America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ztnvmctot5kgp9j8d24u0bg7rhclhnjksfgsjafo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekpjfcjk6mqj4t5m6gpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpjm8pj4chh238h1e8he4937cpj6aor2c1g6eoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z349rop06fnekidhkaqgra5c3a2t3qkpqvl4ce40_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm4o30cth2bs)_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A Year’s Worth of Faith-Building Devotions—Just for You
body:
Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za4205qqj8s3vgbp7m7ksh65nehjmohhcoqof148_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm4p71c5h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him.

I recently received a wonderful reminder of the importance of this practice from Timothy, a chaplain at Parkersburg Correctional Center in West Virginia. Timothy shared his morning routine before heading out to minister to inmates. Here's what he wrote:

_" My day starts by reading your daily devotional email, followed by listening to your daily message. I need to renew my mind and spirit to help me minister to the inmates, and I lean on these things to help me. God is using your ministry to touch lives behind the razor wire. There are no boundaries to God's love."_

What a powerful reminder of God's limitless love and how He reaches each of us wherever we are. No matter our circumstances, we can find strength, guidance, and renewal in His Word.

With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:

* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

---
| | For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities.

This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love.
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3121hsfvg8nl13h47tmo9v4t4h2ira6iqjoocpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm4p71c5h2bs)
---
| | Request your copy here:
[https://secure.ptv.org/2025-navy-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional-generous-gift-1](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5akn2gd7o5idc9vfrctac7t6sp2j4mbu5p56ec8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm4p71c5h2bs)

Thank you for being a part of this ministry. I'm praying that this new devotional will be a daily anchor point of encouragement and wisdom for all who read it.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffres
---

First Look News
---

President Trump will _**NEVER**_ give up on Pete Hegseth and neither should you!
As a combat veteran, Pete put his life on the line for America; now he’s fighting the hardest battle of all against the deep state.
Pete has led in combat, pulled the trigger, and faced bullets whizzing past him. Yet, his toughest battle is his new fight against the Washington D.C. insiders.
As you’re reading this, the war-mongering Democrats are trying to _**CRUSH**_ his nomination and _**STOP**_ President Trump’s America-First approach to our military.
If we’re going to save Pete Hegseth, it’s going to take an _**OUTPOURING**_ of _**SUPPORT**_ , like we’ve never seen before!

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6044bijuujnm88ngdqsa2jmk17q3blhetvaqfi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm6pb2c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z77lgin3b80hv0aqvni8icsh0tleqshbgn6pn0rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm6pb2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg3np2h6ojlhfs4t8iplgnnep57a1tvprdtn8m18_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm6pb2c9h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbcdagjh8ono1ht89b40csdh9mea590l9l9g3epo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm1pj2cph2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z00j9p4a5fjvgt57kj298ne5krq2k26h7ughuei0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm1pj2cph2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqtbu738kkca2bb1big5dmkdpjscr6tf7nuiocs0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm1pj2cph2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zigjua272nrdib6pfu938cpudkseomev19g3rg08_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm1pj2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpjm8pj6c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z59ee3frrkogmt3ukq282keht4v6necci7s6hmm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm1pj2cph2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk61nmthggj81qncnnt9q2kuv4q964ufc7fe6ngo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm1pj2cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Governor Glenn Youngkin
subject: Seriously, there could not be a better person!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z12maff09boprr12f9bkbchectgiunrtrttefqo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm9oj1cth2bs "Glenn Youngkin")
---
It's Governor Glenn Youngkin and I have an important announcement to share with you.

In 2021, Winsome Earle-Sears and I ran for Virginia's highest offices. We fought to defend parents' rights, back the blue and our military, and get Virginia's economy and jobs moving again. Together, we've worked as a team to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

I'm so proud of the work we have done. _But I 'm writing to you today not because our mission is over but because it's just beginning. _

**Next year, Winsome will lead Republicans to a crucial victory in November and keep Virginia on the path to prosperity!**

**[I'm proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zor02em0tqrai9odk4ksiq1br1mol49vs4j85qi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm9oj1cth2bs "I’m proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:")**
---
| | [SUPPORT WINSOME EARLE-SEARS FOR GOVERNOR](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2f0i90v71jnfdmg8gbj1oerj4gq8tagi82iga78_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm9oj1cth2bs "SUPPORT WINSOME EARLE-SEARS FOR GOVERNOR")
---
Winsome has been a fantastic Lt. Governor, and she will be an even better Governor. She brings the fighting spirit of a Marine to the office every single day.

Seriously, there could not be a better person to continue our success for Virginians for the next four years. That's why I'm giving Winsome my complete endorsement and total support. Today, I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart to please do the same.
---
