name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmhb8cmlt6dbrbd1sra5uei41gm9ce7ls273fesg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm9oj3cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkriipv5383ddjnokj6u5bquenaih8l18u47h728_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm9oj3cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zir3hm9ij1u5i2t6rcitugkrv2dlrn4cc9itnet0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6clhm9oj3cph2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Governor Glenn Youngkin
subject: Seriously, there could not be a better person!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5fei2nvilcgh2mutjam0pt3oggdlbi4aqet2rag_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cljm0p36c5h2bs "Glenn Youngkin")
---
It's Governor Glenn Youngkin and I have an important announcement to share with you.

In 2021, Winsome Earle-Sears and I ran for Virginia's highest offices. We fought to defend parents' rights, back the blue and our military, and get Virginia's economy and jobs moving again. Together, we've worked as a team to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

I'm so proud of the work we have done. _But I 'm writing to you today not because our mission is over but because it's just beginning. _

**Next year, Winsome will lead Republicans to a crucial victory in November and keep Virginia on the path to prosperity!**

**[I'm proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl350u1q1cf50pin663pqkpf9qbtl4bkam8un9m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cljm0p36c5h2bs "I’m proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:")**
---
| | [SUPPORT WINSOME EARLE-SEARS FOR GOVERNOR](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpbc1n2djgt5geggma70u7l3b366ibqs4s8082b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cljm0p36c5h2bs "SUPPORT WINSOME EARLE-SEARS FOR GOVERNOR")
---
Winsome has been a fantastic Lt. Governor, and she will be an even better Governor. She brings the fighting spirit of a Marine to the office every single day.

Seriously, there could not be a better person to continue our success for Virginians for the next four years. That's why I'm giving Winsome my complete endorsement and total support. Today, I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart to please do the same.
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Find Daily Encouragement with Our New Devotional
body:
Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh9hv7nde52ltb1sc8it667cnmc3j5g905mpnbvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cljm8o36c5h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him.

I recently received a wonderful reminder of the importance of this practice from Timothy, a chaplain at Parkersburg Correctional Center in West Virginia. Timothy shared his morning routine before heading out to minister to inmates. Here's what he wrote:

_" My day starts by reading your daily devotional email, followed by listening to your daily message. I need to renew my mind and spirit to help me minister to the inmates, and I lean on these things to help me. God is using your ministry to touch lives behind the razor wire. There are no boundaries to God's love."_

What a powerful reminder of God's limitless love and how He reaches each of us wherever we are. No matter our circumstances, we can find strength, guidance, and renewal in His Word.

With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:

* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

---
| | For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities.

This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb0uvk0is4hinph86tvcvroa4qmfkfqkp0advvm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cljm8o36c5h2bs)
---
| | Request your copy here:
[https://secure.ptv.org/2025-navy-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional-generous-gift-1](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhi2gun3mocbnegj95aj74relh63g67q2csdah78_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cljm8o36c5h2bs)

Thank you for being a part of this ministry. I'm praying that this new devotional will be a daily anchor point of encouragement and wisdom for all who read it.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffres
---

Trump Train News

clean_body: Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. | | | Hello Friend, Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him. I recently received a wonderful reminder of the importance of this practice from Timothy, a chaplain at Parkersburg Correctional Center in West Virginia. Timothy shared his morning routine before heading out to minister to inmates. Here's what he wrote: " My day starts by reading your daily devotional email, followed by listening to your daily message. I need to renew my mind and spirit to help me minister to the inmates, and I lean on these things to help me. God is using your ministry to touch lives behind the razor wire. There are no boundaries to God's love." What a powerful reminder of God's limitless love and how He reaches each of us wherever we are. No matter our circumstances, we can find strength, guidance, and renewal in His Word. With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new 2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you: In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know! Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians. * In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father. | | For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities. This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love. | | | Request your copy here: Thank you for being a part of this ministry. I'm praying that this new devotional will be a daily anchor point of encouragement and wisdom for all who read it. God bless you, Dr. Robert Jeffres Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Governor Glenn Youngkin
subject: Seriously, there could not be a better person!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zhfg2gnnqj57u82dnjh9gbdv27k0c56qqk7r3csg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cljm8o36c9h2bs "Glenn Youngkin")
---
It's Governor Glenn Youngkin and I have an important announcement to share with you.

In 2021, Winsome Earle-Sears and I ran for Virginia's highest offices. We fought to defend parents' rights, back the blue and our military, and get Virginia's economy and jobs moving again. Together, we've worked as a team to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

I'm so proud of the work we have done. _But I 'm writing to you today not because our mission is over but because it's just beginning. _

**Next year, Winsome will lead Republicans to a crucial victory in November and keep Virginia on the path to prosperity!**

**[I'm proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsq88msa9lc95at8dkr5tlfvbr7nsr0me40g3r50_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cljm8o36c9h2bs "I’m proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:")**

---
Winsome has been a fantastic Lt. Governor, and she will be an even better Governor. She brings the fighting spirit of a Marine to the office every single day.

Seriously, there could not be a better person to continue our success for Virginians for the next four years. That's why I'm giving Winsome my complete endorsement and total support. Today, I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart to please do the same.

body:
Pete Hegseth is a winner.

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9dlc2nmo7jm280jvaretp951jas5d3bomjbncr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cljm8p74c3h2bs)
---
President Trump will _**NEVER**_ give up on Pete Hegseth and neither should you!
As a combat veteran, Pete put his life on the line for America; now he’s fighting the hardest battle of all against the deep state.
Pete has led in combat, pulled the trigger, and faced bullets whizzing past him. Yet, his toughest battle is his new fight against the Washington D.C. insiders.
As you’re reading this, the war-mongering Democrats are trying to _**CRUSH**_ his nomination and _**STOP**_ President Trump’s America-First approach to our military.
If we’re going to save Pete Hegseth, it’s going to take an _**OUTPOURING**_ of _**SUPPORT**_ , like we’ve never seen before!
Do you stand with Pete Hegseth?
[YES, of course!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk7ov50aphf24ams7kv2jnev8af5k91tkce6qe9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cljm8p74c3h2bs)

Americans’ outlook of the quality of healthcare in the U.S. has fallen
to a 24-year low, according to a Gallup survey published on Friday.

healthcare is “excellent” or “good,” which represents a 10% drop from
2020, according to Gallup.

_December 7th, 2024_

Dear Patriot, If you’re tired of feeling vulnerable and defenseless in today's uncertain world then you’re not alone... [Many people have been searching for a simple, quick and non lethal way to protect themselves from an attacker, regardless of their size or strength.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19315/6374453/1f638fb347430945274a2def4763bffad87c4e14/6735bd0cc76211887b9ce7e71bd5f28603e7880f) Well, we have what you’ve been looking for! Introducing the Stingray, the ultimate compact zapper that's taking the self defense world by storm! This high-voltage stun gun is more than just a weapon – it's your force multiplier, your ticket to safety and security. Imagine being able to turn the tables on any assailant with the simple press of a button. [The Stingray's 10 million volts pack a punch that will leave even the biggest and toughest attackers begging for mercy. It's time to level the playing field, my friend!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19315/6374453/1f638fb347430945274a2def4763bffad87c4e14/6735bd0cc76211887b9ce7e71bd5f28603e7880f) Why You’ll Love The Stingray: ⚡️ Power: Neutralize any threat instantly, making their size and strength totally irrelevant.

name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left is hoping to break me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=552ff868761f472db11a6413e60cecdf&_e=3fxCYYXLJ6HkcY2GdP89qMvrVX_NkWyBLJowiCEdLFvtswJSc94IiS7sKRDqMmRm63LHGWFL85MpeWOm3LGk7k51eciul7X1acNPuSUYUhjEj8YsGq9y7O0ixccCFweY1eIs5stwIj0lvvkKTsr-pKtwlcch3aKGIGqXXPrOrYZRa9-lJBpTH7jdw6iPjtxPiFWo-Mh22SVt-gSlkRV1SNxRlLHoMeYH2SxhgVdNRttcBpWJWRQa1PAKV52RxSo4kyuE5xORd68LwqNeBH-9xw8Irr2xc2Uhz-IKhCpxCoe_biXm-U7AWGGklS-2vcKX1wOhZ-YyHZsMZ754OGXvxJz0-d4OM3FtyR9UbD2fdPjYET7ZgvGQhyxXYJ-kQk86Oh8lmDQDWNynR8AUudTJ90VNr8pcr1R6HA8waRb3mAw%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...All for speaking the truth.It is imperative that we rise up and resist when things feel wrong.And you and I both know that something was _very_ wrong...
---
When Democrats allowed illegals to vote without identification... When an Anti-MAGA election official said he wanted to “make life hell for Kari Lake”...When election officials destroyed evidence and refused to comply with discovery...
---
I’ve never been afraid to speak the truth.But corrupt sinister Leftist parties are trying to destroy me for it... When I spoke out against their blatant fraud and rigged electioneering...They decided to make an example of me.Yes, I dared to speak the truth about election fraud.I dared to listen to the people and fight to Make America Great Again. And that’s when I found out just how far the Left will go to silence and destroy American patriots like you and me.And for that, I’m now facing enormous fines.In the Left’s America, the truth will put you behind bars. Each day that the weight of this lawsuit feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what happened to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors, working with radical Never-Trump Judges, holding show trials in cities that voted 99% for Biden, tried to take EVERYTHING away from Donald Trump.His businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.And he fights on.I’m certain that if President Trump had suspended his campaign for President, all these lawsuits would have magically disappeared.But he didn’t give the Left what they wanted. He’s going to fight for America First. A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=614c7b9c565b4904905943478ea9ac2e&_e=FNxRiQyaRbaNQQy4hiqe6exuXJ7XJ78k5_LSiE0BfxeEQvTdTvIdI1_oKYHqbDQg6fuk8gtH-OJJDc0MqGGE__0jHF-Bu0Tk-JSoF54e55Z73miAhTLyOyVzDMGPxMbt05foag4Crx3XEE4_xah0L4Ncqb-0r4wimJ7nRABKbiObPzIJygbafQF7ibHVa3b9tTL5Lq87LZ5cvH5VPzelAtgwFpidaeip5fgCIrhkQ2WaUwT3bKyl777zJIfTiXrYJVKFU1fxMlO_L9sgNILVcw27Q9Jl6deag8Js7CJLFsDcrEs4YOspfgFq9ceRjStQ76zeFSvRl-E5XIyAB0o7c0QUYXlKxwGr5XV7-IXSO8aQefhZbwzI7AyaClLJuY1y6jPqcwpW7Cgf-_gQkIZo7Q%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: Troy Downing
subject: In remembrance of the 2,403 lives lost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
83 years ago today, the world changed.

| | | Peter,83 years ago today, the world changed forever.

The Naval Base at Pearl Harbor was attacked by a coordinated Japanese aerial assault, including fighter planes, torpedo bombers, and dive bombers launched from a carrier fleet, launching us into World War 2. Today, we remember the 2,403 lives lost that day and recognize their sacrifice to defend our nation and reflect on their courage and resilience.
---

clean_body: 83 years ago today, the world changed. | | | Peter,83 years ago today, the world changed forever. The Naval Base at Pearl Harbor was attacked by a coordinated Japanese aerial assault, including fighter planes, torpedo bombers, and dive bombers launched from a carrier fleet, launching us into World War 2. Today, we remember the 2,403 lives lost that day and recognize their sacrifice to defend our nation and reflect on their courage and resilience. We also recognize the unity in America that this tragic day brought forth and how people from all walks of life came together to fight for the Nation they love. Every American knew it was their duty to band together, from the soldiers on the frontlines to the families back home, fighting to preserve this great country and the values it stands for. Durbin and Senate Democrats to finish the job they started.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25946368-53a4-43e2-9d35-990dc6d7044b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | | | Over the last four years, Democrats have confirmed over 220 judges to the bench. These nominees under the Biden-Harris administration are some of the best we’ve had – they look more like America and understand what the American experience truly is. But their work is not done. With Trump calling on Republican senators to “Show Up and Hold the Line” by not confirming any more judges before his inauguration, we need to confirm every last judge before the 118th Congress is adjourned. [So please Peter, rush any amount to ensure that Democrats finish the job they started by confirming the remaining judicial nominees.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b052811-52ae-4a23-ac1d-55329d07efd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86c8cd44-b1c9-4325-b9fc-ecd572d5e3c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=17c30e00db364daebfe8e6652f8fd514&_e=RKZkC-BYuXHUW4-X3NcUCueFUezfpfQgSGvsOBKGvcYzgqeUOJhTCPRpnNO42ieeoy9mQkrfGBmIecNxiDK_Q16jcEV2WgMR3G-v5WKKFgh0AF1tkh2t8I-d56AJNM7WkOiITpetrLN4CTvd2ABX9E7tXZbjpDh5FM1semRrxwqUbi9jYpg7k5APCu-ySnv7hg-7mkdjCQ9XL1zb2HVfcrXJRDYJss3HyAttWK1v08DG-S2DfdkZyL2VhqKoi7Ed5B2KqIvRU546B9CCst3zguPO9P-FAhlJ4pN0GM1dc42kmyRd5HybHdXAI8RS8huWmxd371dCy17uaDd78xrxpi5l-vwy9PH7mRggima1ZuCGsxp_4diQJ3QaX1jN5QCV04KuB6NUH8-zSb-QwfFndQ%3D%3D)

| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=17c30e00db364daebfe8e6652f8fd514&_e=RKZkC-BYuXHUW4-X3NcUCueFUezfpfQgSGvsOBKGvcYzgqeUOJhTCPRpnNO42ieeoy9mQkrfGBmIecNxiDK_Q16jcEV2WgMR3G-v5WKKFgh0AF1tkh2t8I-d56AJNM7WkOiITpetrLN4CTvd2ABX9E7tXZbjpDh5FM1semRrxwqUbi9jYpg7k5APCu-ySnv7hg-7mkdjCQ9XL1zb2HVfcrXJRDYJss3HyAttWK1v08DG-S2DfdkZyL2VhqKoi7EdzVjivZ3ecjnwkdFYpY3-2RNurYsjNtfgOhrJMVzkZsDAwOcIYxdQRfcqwo397Ey4yX5ZaEQ7KXilvgnwluH71Ic-vYYDfNuzUUPcxUnFuV2fnVivhko_RALzWaST4RJBMCTLZr2QB9c8ecjT_uyENg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=17c30e00db364daebfe8e6652f8fd514&_e=RKZkC-BYuXHUW4-X3NcUCueFUezfpfQgSGvsOBKGvcYzgqeUOJhTCPRpnNO42ieeoy9mQkrfGBmIecNxiDK_Q16jcEV2WgMR3G-v5WKKFgh0AF1tkh2t8I-d56AJNM7WkOiITpetrLN4CTvd2ABX9E7tXZbjpDh5FM1semRrxwqUbi9jYpg7k5APCu-ySnv7hg-7mkdjCQ9XL1zb2HVfcrXJRDYJss3HyAttWK1v08DG-S2DfdkZyL2VhqKoi7EdHwrsnQ8HDmgOmYTHU0Kac1_TX-PLfli2uONlAPnR5V3akKUfEUtqk8vvEVJXjQ0fwO59E90n2H8P2nUxLYSzjsP_bsBGuCI5236xrzo9oG5nX9DnAktjTiPBgEgwSwza9X2AvjvHjHVeEShcJvv3qA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we... Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations. Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.** Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

It's Governor Glenn Youngkin and I have an important announcement to share with you.

In 2021, Winsome Earle-Sears and I ran for Virginia's highest offices. We fought to defend parents' rights, back the blue and our military, and get Virginia's economy and jobs moving again. Together, we've worked as a team to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

I'm so proud of the work we have done. _But I 'm writing to you today not because our mission is over but because it's just beginning. _

**Next year, Winsome will lead Republicans to a crucial victory in November and keep Virginia on the path to prosperity!**

**[I'm proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkbGK3DAQhp9G7mSkkW15CxcHhyHFhYMUKYUizfqG2JLRyN7btw8bLlWqrWfm_4bv__nm3jytlJbvfsOJmF1hV0_H6AtLxkL54PUuU64OFHRSg1TW6SZOPejxOjY4aWtMb-ECuvmYFOh4AfQ2WP_LwmWwRuHFamVHD1cdGpoeORqU1apXGlobhqgDwjDCGJQJolPHHn3FlhJTRA4573teqVLgNpelWaePWncW5kXALGBmDEfB9kapYGxD3gTMN0qcN5TXXOSSTywpFwHzPR9p-U1JYoq5MEb5tfhIMvOWE97dvmJcUJjXWg4UMBx1c8Fvu6clCfP69X_v3l_ktx_v0GptBmNc1f3Yd9pI0ykrYMBPVyk-cfCXk1PFVB_wUxKz_GdLwPB5pPP_QVOmuN9oXYkHKzq1bJ7Wh4WmPlPoOcGfAAAA__9mSKPQ "I’m proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! # Saturday, December 7, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1935, Houston received five inches of rain, flooding the bayous and inundating 25 blocks of the city's downtown business district. ([See Photos](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAUAL8Gb1i8h23wwNDF6pJOlTpaGHBAIn6WIXHy91W6dz7pTrqfy3yxKaft-mVvwdTnSjMK7DggF2r2NuXX3DXeLMKP0AQDSspegVDQRNMv2gc1OOd6LXTXr8MyWIfCo7QoBtck85YBCgWAGsdWASwjKtdbp7S0mnUi-FTpaGsMNTxtWfOLHuFoHd2abGKte2Hyg-HEcDrPs3XxoO1NGU52oXtlOJWcfCiRTobTdwz8k-6l0sbXTOQ5rRxG2XOQAlC1e9ybw_j9TDmnMijWievNpvxXrP8ueBj8DQAA__-PSVzs)) Flash flooding is possible in parts of Texas this weekend, so stay safe. And we hope you get a chance to take [your horse on a date](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQxvGnMZsj3x3pweChC1u6dkQHvgSrBlLbTZO3r5K986fvJ_0_T-NJYorb5UNW9fV-3kd02FpA63gMEtNjbJvgJxd6aNQDEx0ZHEOz-ElYtCWaGTSg9kTTPAkFImIA0Cb6JwboGAA77A8MMPXI81Fm7kg60zoNse75UBetepdyTo_9pvkw72uT_FLrtRh6NzgYHL6SfD8Hg8Mqm5Ut2GXPRe3rabOWKj9ZtloMDk324fobU4rljU3rLqvE9GLrv503j38BAAD__25rVVI) one way or another! Today's edition welcomes our newest advertiser, [Omni Barton Creek Resort & Spa](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn-N2Yx8h8EweOjClq4dkcEOnGrsCF9C8u-rtHPHT_r0nvS-LtPFUaS0fro9WH5e84QKtQSUykzeUXxNuvJ2Vn6AKlgwTdMaUAaqzYKee9dp1wxq6TvfauhVazoFQTcaWqjIvmGAygBgj0NtAOYBzdK6xfSN64VWwRPno-YtcHi6co2v_AhHveS9inZjvhXRfAgcBY7nedZ5T7RlDrG8LwLHvyFwdPfClOTsDs5JLkcI3wJH3iitRXKWPgsc77cl75RWGR4hcakO628nxUilM0KrdXcUf938b4yHxZ8AAAD__woOYe4) in Austin, where this New Year's Eve comes alive with a wine-paired dinner, a magical Snowdown Show with midnight champagne toast, and a Kid's Camp ensuring the whole family can celebrate in style.

## House Speaker Phelan Drops Out
Texas House Speaker Dade Phelan [withdrew his bid](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuO6yAQgOGngY6IGV9wCorT0OW0W1pjGAe02ESGzeXtV0m_9S99xf91mS-Uctqv_2lj255rmVFjrwCVNnOglF9zL4NddDiDZAum6wYD2oCMlnvte15pQVo9AEPAATwYD3qa0ASZ7BsD1AYAJzyfDMByRuMH8mbqaBK95pBaOU4tcuMn1TW_yp2Pky-bzDa2dqui-yfQCXQtckw5v5tAF8vGOz-qQFcbNVYPaj4KdIPGcRpH9fFULD-VVb0xffOhaKE9lL2qJQWBTh423B4p51RHI3p93Sh9fNn-nHG3-BsAAP__qMZhbQ) for a third term as Speaker on Friday, just before the GOP caucus vote today to fill the post. David Cook of Mansfield and Dustin Burrows of Lubbock are the two Republicans now under consideration. Phelan has been under [pressure from Republican colleagues](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OgzAQhJ8GOiLv2mbtwsU16XLtlWjB62CdExBY-Xn7E-mvHI1mPun7uQwXziXfr998k1BfaRlQoekAO0VD5Fzeg2ljGFX00EoA0toSKIJ2DmyS02l0vWLrLDmgOPokvbIeLPWuzeE4A1QEgA79iQBGjzRZnshpdo1REnNdtlOdpcqL91Tey0O207Tc2hLmWte90V8Nnhs883qX535UR9hqnoo0eP7sun0V_pWtW2cpfO-sHZVzKDZN2kOfvAcLPhkDPoEzqt1CXJ-5lLz31Bh1vXEuH2r9V8Mj4F8AAAD__x31XDA) after he initiated the House impeachment of Texas Attorney Gen. Ken Paxton last year. David Cook is currently seen as the favorite in [today's expected vote](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ_GdEbrtcFQuLiG7r_2SrTGS2zFiRE4IXn7U9L_3Uij-TT6_v3MP5Ryul_-0o1dfa1lRkAjFUqwc6CU37NpgvMQRtWwU1brziqwqokOwGszkGGwWlnvGUZNfVj1aPve-KVJ7gNTCFYpHHBsrVJ-RLt0tNhB0yAMcEi17G2NXPlFx5rf5cl7u5Rbk12sdTuE_iNwEjid59leY3l8SoET7TUtmQVOdz4PgdNWcqpp-cQvS8byOFgeG9OVdxkosNwiZ7rLM9UYdvrOcOgkBAxmGEEqCKs0PbP0zItUhm3HnV57z83uwnamnNPRW2HgcqOUv0frr-aeDv8HAAD__6Zlbvg), claiming to be backed by over half of House Republicans.
## Odessa Wages Hit Top 10
Odessa has joined sister-city Midland in the [top 10 U.S. metro areas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGngQ1kHyY2g4cubOna0brAAScZO8JunPTpK9K581_66e77urorsuewfuJONj-X6ECAaiQ0QrsZ2b-cqmd7E_Mga7JSd12vpdCy3iyikYu6qQUQlNDmIlD1isyCWgNd-prtiUkQWkowMLRaytsAeupx0qZDUylBM-d4tHmjTE9Mi3_FBx3tFPfa2y3ne6q6jwrGCsZSSnvw-hMDnb2CMVBJZ-CDKhjfgIvsXY4luDhTSuhCLA73GFb3ndBNnJmSK5w3t_G6Ucqu4Eqp6UQT4qP5e18bM5gGj8yTP-n6sPO9sPecLrpSYt2R_fvI_O9qDwu_AQAA__9yT3Eq) for highest weekly wages. Based on data from the [Bureau of Labor Statistics](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L-OpSAYBfCnwQ4DiHIpKLaxu9tuaT7hU8nyxyCj17ef3GkmU0x78svJyfn3nJ7gg0_rX4ho6mvJk2BCUi4oU5MDH-5JNs7MzGneoOGq63rFmeLNZiQb9CK5HDrtdD8oOTtmkSM4oeeeL4037zIumOJcPIRuFeezFsr2YNWjgweRDJ2vubR1w4ovOJZw5xNLa3Nsgtlq3Q_S_SFiJGK8rqudw9Gu-SRitBuUehAxRqwlUygIFOMe8h0xVQrJ0Y_0HfyEud50x2Lf0m6QVqQ-UTixwIr0QvwfbopQkk_r0W41NsW4_fIh-GNQRLI1gg9fK-uvt51GfAYAAP__CqxzHw) through October, Midland held on to the third spot behind San Jose and San Francisco, while Odessa debuted in the top 10 at number seven. The two towns, separated by only 20 miles, boast average weekly wages of $1,380.33 (Odessa) and $1,526.37 (Midland). Denver, in the tenth spot, also made the top 10 for the first time as Huntsville, Ala. and Trenton, N.J. dropped out.
## Texas, SMU Seek Conference Titles

clean_body: Texas House Speaker Dade Phelan for a third term as Speaker on Friday, just before the GOP caucus vote today to fill the post. | | | | | | Saturday, December 7, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1935, Houston received five inches of rain, flooding the bayous and inundating 25 blocks of the city's downtown business district. () Flash flooding is possible in parts of Texas this weekend, so stay safe. And we hope you get a chance to take one way or another! Today's edition welcomes our newest advertiser, in Austin, where this New Year's Eve comes alive with a wine-paired dinner, a magical Snowdown Show with midnight champagne toast, and a Kid's Camp ensuring the whole family can celebrate in style. Abilene 🌧️ 47/44° | Amarillo ☀️ 59/38° | Austin 🌧️ 47/45° | Brownsville 🌤️ 64/56° | Corpus Christi ⛅ 59/53° | DFW 🌧️ 49/46° | El Paso 🌥️ 56/39° | Houston 🌧️ 52/51° | Lubbock 🌥️ 53/39° | San Antonio 🌧️ 49/48° | Texarkana 🌧️ 55/46° | House Speaker Phelan Drops Out Texas House Speaker Dade Phelan for a third term as Speaker on Friday, just before the GOP caucus vote today to fill the post. David Cook of Mansfield and Dustin Burrows of Lubbock are the two Republicans now under consideration. Phelan has been under after he initiated the House impeachment of Texas Attorney Gen. Ken Paxton last year. David Cook is currently seen as the favorite in , claiming to be backed by over half of House Republicans. Odessa Wages Hit Top 10 Odessa has joined sister-city Midland in the for highest weekly wages. Based on data from the through October, Midland held on to the third spot behind San Jose and San Francisco, while Odessa debuted in the top 10 at number seven. The two towns, separated by only 20 miles, boast average weekly wages of $1,380.33 (Odessa) and $1,526.37 (Midland). Denver, in the tenth spot, also made the top 10 for the first time as Huntsville, Ala. and Trenton, N.J. dropped out. Texas, SMU Seek Conference Titles The Texas Longhorns and the SMU Mustangs are both vying for a college football conference championship today in the of their respective conferences. (2)Texas plays for the at 3:00 CT and looks to avenge their October loss against (5)Georgia, with a win likely securing a #1 or #2 seed in the college football playoffs. in Charlotte for the ACC championship at 7:00 CT, also with an automatic playoff bid on the line, though with a loss the Mustangs may still be able to slip into the playoffs with an at-large bid. The final playoff rankings will be revealed tomorrow on ESPN between 11:00 and 3:00 CT. The Flyover is just like The Texas Flyover, except it covers news from all fifty states. ! | Flying together with our sponsor Ring in the New Year at with a wine-paired dinner at Blind Salamander , followed by Snowdown—a magical snow show and champagne toast. Families can enjoy a Kid’s Camp with arts, crafts, and games. Reservations are available through . A festive celebration for all! | ➤ Austin: Gov. Greg Abbott has activated state emergency response resources ahead of heavy rains and potential flooding in East and Southeast Texas. () ➤ A North Texas woman was arrested at Washington Dulles Airport for allegedly attempting to smuggle 71 pounds of marijuana into London. () ➤ Houston: News photographer Tim Bristow was found dead in his vehicle Thursday afternoon after he was reported missing on Wednesday. () ➤ Sugar Land: Billionaire investor Carl Icahn has offered $324 million to boost his stake in Sugar Land's CVR Energy to 84%. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0870a997e674bdeb8d3cbf599484a43&_e=Z7ojA3r_uspu7v6irLCBbemvSTS0_a3iSxhS7GDhomuqv5-ruBXUQn-3KdeX8_40fDCPIr525hrCqEKHsLKMDgjzANdUbvdVJdlRxL8cm91TuaCnNWhzFCg3xUdUzhQZR_HamSvfDMkEYBOEQJaHe2Veo8xIt3ZsDgGCDA7MkXoS4Z0GFVQiXsOQj7guW-0VqlddwV2eqUPsWyfmWhvNgAuDkq2wA7950YdDly-aT06lXAS1zm9WPvKib4TBoV0NVuOuwuigJUyZGuRQSi_uvPq__8f8VoglOEEaFq26tZnlaVlPonEKCzBT8FAqhL5x_iml4BR8w4qeekj4eiFPzbZ9KhQhhEnuiU6uvObVxQAz91EV1zJAUS6pSo24LObl47fMgM1HeAHnlWlBdCUZ9XV2EufDeXLtDWQFuOHAm8O7D5YJV7M10tcxckKTsf_A)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0870a997e674bdeb8d3cbf599484a43&_e=Z7ojA3r_uspu7v6irLCBbemvSTS0_a3iSxhS7GDhomuqv5-ruBXUQn-3KdeX8_40fDCPIr525hrCqEKHsLKMDgjzANdUbvdVJdlRxL8cm91TuaCnNWhzFCg3xUdUzhQZR_HamSvfDMkEYBOEQJaHe2Veo8xIt3ZsDgGCDA7MkXoS4Z0GFVQiXsOQj7guW-0VqlddwV2eqUPsWyfmWhvNgAuDkq2wA7950YdDly-aT06lXAS1zm9WPvKib4TBoV0NVuOuwuigJUyZGuRQSi_uvLiULVzEjCvnag0LNOsusF2E54717AQMtqZm54v-lq6gpDI9BoDDNtC7lAva7xGBq3ieQ-5qzx-rJsYdjAawzxVQpmDMx5BAZ2yVW7sj5u3PIbyuGg9sKmbzi8I4C22RQ_7sS0qlzMZliEG9aljezp05-UbeVw4XxGWij7QtGehv)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0870a997e674bdeb8d3cbf599484a43&_e=Z7ojA3r_uspu7v6irLCBbemvSTS0_a3iSxhS7GDhomuqv5-ruBXUQn-3KdeX8_40fDCPIr525hrCqEKHsLKMDgjzANdUbvdVJdlRxL8cm91TuaCnNWhzFCg3xUdUzhQZR_HamSvfDMkEYBOEQJaHe2Veo8xIt3ZsDgGCDA7MkXoS4Z0GFVQiXsOQj7guW-0VqlddwV2eqUPsWyfmWhvNgAuDkq2wA7950YdDly-aT06lXAS1zm9WPvKib4TBoV0NVuOuwuigJUyZGuRQSi_uvIZQ7EywcuSzrT-nuIJKaHoI1QJN5uH0M4rIu2ryeSuhVXCxcwgLEecoMBqbk2qFrEx8xTWwdlgogAKkyMNk5a2Gp81iz0yGr6ZJyrN5NSkD0SSCCiPNCBdwKDfK1C4bZABXaxcx_BV7RsJxMwLEpCQtLqEOlMPFFUtUGktqrHVb)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

name: The Flyover
subject: CEO Shooter Still at Large, College Football Championships, and a Lighthouse Post
body:
Authorities believe the suspect in Wednesday's deadly shooting of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson [has left New York City](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEbMGEIoXLyGLq_dEhkzDrPr2JE9G8Tfr7L9dle60tHR-bgtN8eR0_2_e5CVkBfssNeAuhuXzXE8l77ZbCBCMg1ZGI0ZRoBpana7eggGQrhivw6DAT85mMj3zk8rAPqG7ZsG2I0AxsDQeryMjrbOXGg1eDWq72hjyaX9zJxkpxDP_KLS-vxoot1FnlWZfwpnhfNxHK1fa6Kjvn-F83sqnL8TC207uSi7d4W0p6zrnrNwuusnlZqTzkFzEipURSc69JnLl_Ysp8K5KXZ7Hhwj18uo-u7-cBx_HeSvJi-LPwEAAP__JElmEw), boarding a bus at a Manhattan terminal bound for Atlanta shortly after the incident.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMVuQfQd2GDxUitjStSMy8QFX2QYZJ1XeviJDO2W-nz7pf1_X4eo4cJo_XSRbpnUACc1JwUmawTsOz6GpvJ2IgLAiqwxia5TqumqxDpXUrsFWGjWOHY6j75xuJZhRt-CgYnusKZBGKUTV1jfQxpGXqGlEOKNoJHkua66_V05loSk81wfl-rbGKtillG0X-CGgF9BzetBe6imvqTBltx_qOGF_L3HY13u-kcCLj_nfBJc8p3lzMwnQh4vk-R4FXjaXS6K8L7ypszxhi8OrW4AuyUXaBV76v6F3elAGdSdNByCrbP32wyHwro1o5Bwdh1dLeffbh4XfAAAA__-6AnqZ) | |
# Saturday, December 7, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1941, Japan launched a surprise aerial attack on the U.S. Pacific fleet stationed at Pearl Harbor. The U.S. formally entered World War II the following day after President Franklin D. Roosevelt's legendary "[_Day of Infamy_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z8FOhDAQANCvaW9L2pnSgUMPJooHs16NJ1K2A1TLdgNlDX9v9L4_8JL3ce7PPqZ4nd79wq6MuQcF5qThpKgPPqajNzK4kRkYJTtNiDVp3bZydi21BJYaq3ywZmg0k7I4eq6h1nYwMro_TYMirRF1XV3Akueg0PKA0KAwikMsea2-cryWmcd05Duv1SUvMrm5lNsm8ElAJ6A78l72amABXXprps_XSYXvF4HdyL7sKwt83ma_cpCrC7efmFLcLAmjpsXH9E-WR8W7g98AAAD__4cGUVg)" speech. Nearly every family has a cherished holiday tradition. For John Pihaly, it was visiting Minneapolis' downtown [holiday window displays](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO8yAQBOCngc4WLBhCQfE37vK3V1rELPGeMEQBxfLbn3z9tfNJM5qv-3IPlKk8_4cdfU91AQF6kDAIu8RA-Vw0jz4hAiqOXlqlJiulc3zz6uYsOie1S9HiTa-TkSaoGDBBcpPh5K82CcJKqZScxhWMDRiFMvhQcFNMC4zU63v8rlT6himf9YPvca07z37r_dWY-sdgZjAfxzGuj1bwaJczmHcqBVvtgcF8xQzmGM5eSxu2mimGc4jUXjmcF_G3j6-DcqZmLNPiuQfKv0v9r-cfDz8BAAD__3Z6W4s) as a child. Learn how he's keeping it alive in today's _Holiday Section_. Today's edition is sponsored by Frontieras. Don't miss the chance to [become an early investor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMVuQfQd2GDxUitjStSMy8QFX2QYZJ1XeviJDO2W-nz7pf1_X4eo4cJo_XSRbpnUACc1JwUmawTsOz6GpvJ2IgLAiqwxia5TqumqxDpXUrsFWGjWOHY6j75xuJZhRt-CgYnusKZBGKUTV1jfQxpGXqGlEOKNoJHkua66_V05loSk81wfl-rbGKtillG0X-CGgF9BzetBe6imvqTBltx_qOGF_L3HY13u-kcCLj_nfBJc8p3lzMwnQh4vk-R4FXjaXS6K8L7ypszxhi8OrW4AuyUXaBV76v6F3elAGdSdNByCrbP32wyHwro1o5Bwdh1dLeffbh4XfAAAA__-6AnqZ) as they define a new era of energy.
|
---
## CEO Shooter No Longer in NYC
Authorities believe the suspect in Wednesday's deadly shooting of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson [has left New York City](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEbMGEIoXLyGLq_dEhkzDrPr2JE9G8Tfr7L9dle60tHR-bgtN8eR0_2_e5CVkBfssNeAuhuXzXE8l77ZbCBCMg1ZGI0ZRoBpana7eggGQrhivw6DAT85mMj3zk8rAPqG7ZsG2I0AxsDQeryMjrbOXGg1eDWq72hjyaX9zJxkpxDP_KLS-vxoot1FnlWZfwpnhfNxHK1fa6Kjvn-F83sqnL8TC207uSi7d4W0p6zrnrNwuusnlZqTzkFzEipURSc69JnLl_Ysp8K5KXZ7Hhwj18uo-u7-cBx_HeSvJi-LPwEAAP__JElmEw), boarding a bus at a Manhattan terminal bound for Atlanta shortly after the incident. Investigators confirmed the suspect arrived in New York City days earlier on a bus from Atlanta. The Atlanta Police Department said they were contacted by the NYPD and will provide assistance as needed. Police [have continued to recover evidence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb8Gb1jwwMYZGCpV3tKlqjpaz_Bs0xBjAUmUv6_SvfOVrs453-fpjCGGff3AK9m6pAkEaC6BCzN5DPE56cbbhQhINWSlUaozUp5OzWYXqeHkOiG00wPKYRC9UDCj9r02DrEJ9vUmQRgplZJd66A3SF6onmYFg2JakA815fYnhb1utMRnulNuXbo20W61HoWpNwYjgxFnt9OjtGt6zQzGr08G40aYa-FzThfa-W0PlfxGGOvG15xuBy8H4aVwXCpl7ijxOQfcGYylpvxkagyeqXcp-06-zJps_fEIMYbSG6bFesUQ_3jqf33uFn4DAAD__2zAZrI), including what appears to be the backpack carried by the suspected shooter, Friday evening in Central Park. Possible [DNA evidence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAQAL8GOiJYsDkXFNe4y7VXWhuzBO4wRPYmVv7-Ka9_9Ugz0vy9LlcstbT7H9wocOoLaHDKgNJ-iVjqe3EyhkQEZCUF460dvDHTJHPQ3g2EibSDiEOiKU4m3eK4OpsiAMgSPjYD2htjrRkuK4weKWo70s3CLyucpli475d_vTTOlOq7v2i_rH2TNWTmxyHsbwGzgJkz5VLrhwmYc9-o0XkImA9GJnUir1nAPGgY_eTVmZEVd_W_9VPhrT9ZcSbV6FSVMB6qNPVshSlmwsp5xZ3Uhi0_GwuY5R7i4yy1lmP0wun7huW7LfmnT68AXwEAAP__4IxrvQ) has also been collected. Authorities have confirmed that they recovered a water bottle at the scene, along with a fake ID and a cellphone.
## Economy adds 227,000 Jobs
The U.S. [economy rebounded in November](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMRvIvgOcDB66sKVrR2TDOXFk-5BxQ3n7Kt07f9Lvk_5ft_lmQwz5_mkTmep5Bgl9q6CVel5tiOfcN6vxREDYkFEacdBKXa_Nw3gHvXV2QMLVjQhOLoO6XKRX2uvBQRPMW1MgtVKIaugWGLWlVeJIDuGCope0hsqle3LI9UE-nvyi0i2cmmgetW67wA8Bk4DpOI7O_gTe36uA6W0LmBQImOQoYMr8ouSotE92e1to41Lb70xpi3wmyrWlhTOnsylm3Y4QY9hHLXp5TzbEv8_6X4OXgd8AAAD__43iXb8), adding 227,000 jobs despite unemployment rising to 4.2%, the Labor Department reported Friday. The new [numbers surpassed October's](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3O4yAQRZ_G7ohgwGAXFNuky7ZbWvwM8UQYLMwm8tuvsv1XXl3p6Oj8eawPR5nK87fb0fZUV-CgmADGzRod5WtVY7QJEVCOaIWRcjJCLMu4WY0LoNFOLwlDlFz6oKKIExglZ-XlSPZLE8CNEFKK6RZAG4eRS41ewiwHxTFSr-32qlT6hilf9Y3tFuo-Zrv1fpyD_DXAfYC7Owp-zu_1Ha1TyDjA_VX9yTZqVJ4MQy11vxiVlF2nWtjfgvuR67Vj6SxhxOYya3hieyPzHgKENC06JZw9n3lQEy5ziA7RBzU2G48P5UynNoPiz91R_u_Wf2r1tvAvAAD__6u6bR4) gain of 36,000 jobs, with hourly wages rising 0.4%, but the job market is showing signs of a gradual slowdown. According to [one economist](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGPhCAUBOBfA53m8UBZC4pr6PbaKw3Ic2WDYpBo9t9fvP7qmXyT-XmOTxdT3F7fbiVT5zwioGoENqDH4GL6jIoHMxMhSU5GaCk7LcQw8MV4h9iFwZN3EkIPMKmg9ANAgAQdNI_m1gSCFkJK0bUT9tpRANmTl_iQTAGFWHNp3zludaE5ffJJpZ3yypNZat0PJr8YWob2uq522vx0hwztTTO0Ahla6Bnad_ZHU2jPpTZbPmn1VJq71S51TbyYsF8xpXj0mil4rS6mv5363-_T4G8AAAD__1RYVxo), the increase in the unemployment rate against job and income gains could trigger a new cut in interest rates this month.
## College Football Preview

| Friend —
### Late-breaking additions to speakers list for Dec. 7-8 international Schiller Institute online conference
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-97yOHs-L49FaxEo6sWjJlnqmSE3rC1ZEU2FJXHms1oRATsvQeci60XPtz4KxPlr-Q&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241207_speakers_update&n=2) In light of the headlong escalations of threat and mayhem unleashed by Western elites against Russia, Syria, and the BRICS countries in general, the International Schiller Institute online conference December 7-8 takes on heightened importance by the hour. The Schiller Institute has announced the following names just added or confirmed for the outstanding roster of speakers at this historic deliberation. In the first panel, 9:00-12:00 Eastern time U.S., new or confirmed speakers include **Prof. Zhang Weiwei** (China), Professor of International Relations, Fudan University, China; **Scott Ritter** (U.S.), former UN Weapons Inspector in Iraq; **Col. (ret.) Larry Wilkerson, **(U.S.), former chief of staff to the U.S. Secretary of State; and **Amb. Hossein Mousavian** (Iran), former ambassador from Iran to Germany. **H.E. Naledi Pandor** (South Africa), former Minister of International Relations and Cooperation, South Africa, will deliver her major address, “How Should the South Respond”, as the second speaker in Sunday morning’s panel, rather than the Saturday morning panel, due to scheduling constraints. In the second panel, the speakers addressing the farm crisis have been expanded to include **Dr. Bedabrata Pain** (India), film director, former NASA senior research scientist, “Déjà vu, Where Past Meets the Future”; **Joe Maxwell** (U.S.), Co-founder of Farm Action, former Lt. Governor of Missouri; **Mike Callicrate** (U.S.), Owner of Ranch Foods Direct & Callicrate Cattle Co; joining previously-announced **Robert Baker** (U.S.), Schiller Institute Agriculture Commission. Note the full list of speakers list, plus titles and times of the four panels, is posted below. The first panel, beginning with **Helga Zepp-LaRouche** , also includes two former heads of state. Many other notable speakers will address the worldwide economic development progress and potential, as the basis for peace, and a cultural renaissance through a dialogue of cultures. All panels will be livestreamed via YouTube with the following links:[ **Preliminary Schiller Institute Conference Program******
**Saturday, Dec. 7** (all times are U.S. Eastern Time)
**Panel 1** (9 a.m.-12.30 noon): _“The Strategic Crisis: New and Final World War, or a New Paradigm of the One Humanity?”_
Moderator: **Dennis Speed** (U.S.), Schiller Institute: Welcome and Introduction
1. Keynote: **Helga Zepp-LaRouche** (Germany), Founder of the Schiller Institute
2. **Dmitri Trenin** (Russia), Professor, Academic Supervisor of the Institute of World Military Economy and Strategy at the Higher School of Economics University (Moscow)
3. **H.E. Donald Ramotar** (Guyana), former President of Guyana
4. **H.E. Ján Čarnogurský** (Slovakia), former Prime Minister of Slovakia
5. **Prof. Zhang Weiwei** (China), Professor of International Relations, Fudan University, China
6. **Ambassador Chas W. Freeman, Jr.**(U.S.), former U.S. Assistant Secretary of Defense for International Security Affairs, 1993-1994
7. **Scott Ritter **(U.S.), former UN Weapons Inspector in Iraq
8. **Col. (ret.) Larry Wilkerson** , (U.S.) former chief of staff to the US Secretary of State
9. **Amb. Hossein Mousavian** (Iran), former ambassador from Iran to Germany

_Question & Answer Session_
**Panel 2** (1 p.m.-4 p.m.): _“The Great Projects To Overcome the Migrant Crisis; The New, Quality Productive Forces; A New Just World Economic Order”_
Moderator: **Stephan Ossenkopp** (Germany), Schiller Institute: Welcome and Introduction
1. Keynote: **Dennis Small** (U.S.), head of the Ibero-America desk, Schiller Institute
2. **Dr. Alexander K. Bobrov** (Russia), Associate Professor at the Department of Diplomacy, MGIMO University, Moscow
3. **H.E. Prof. Dr. Manuel Hassassian** (Palestine), Palestinian Ambassador to Denmark
4. **Chandra Muzaffar** (Malaysia), Founder and President of the International Movement for a Just World (JUST)
5. **Michael Limburg** (Germany), Master in engineering, Vice President EIKE (European Institute for Climate and Energy
6. **Prof. Glenn Diesen** (Norway), Professor and Author
7. **Dr. Bedabrata Pain**(India), Film director; former NASA senior research scientist “Deja vu, Where Past Meets the Future”; **Joe Maxwell**(U.S.) Co-founder of Farm Action, former Lt. Governor of Missouri; **Mike Callicrate** ****(U.S.), Owner of Ranch Foods Direct & Callicrate Cattle Co.; **Robert Baker******(US) Schiller Institute Agriculture Commission

_Question & Answer Session_
**Sunday, December 8** (all times are U.S. Eastern Time)
**Panel 3** (9 a.m.-12 noon): _“The Science Drivers of Physical Economy Today”_
Moderator: **Jason Ross** (U.S.), Science Advisor to the Schiller Institute: Welcome and Introduction
1. Keynote: **Jacques Cheminade** (France), Former Presidential Candidate, President of Solidarité et Progrès
2. **H.E. Naledi Pandor** (South Africa), former Minister of International Relations and Cooperation, South Africa; _“How Should the South Respond?”_
3. **Theodore Postol** (U.S.), Professor Emeritus of Science, Technology and National Security at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology
4. **Michele Geraci** (Italy), Former Under Secretary of State, Ministry of Economic Development
5. **Sergey Pulinets** (Russia), Principal Research Scientist, Space Research Institute, Russian Academy of Sciences, Moscow
6. **Jürgen Schöttle** (Germany), Master in Engineering, Power Plant Construction
7. **Brian Harvey** (Ireland), Space Historian

_Question & Answer Session_
**Panel 4** (1 p.m.-4 p.m.): _“The Beauty of the Cultures of the World: A Dialogue Among Civilizations”_
Moderator: **Harley Schlanger** : Welcome and Introduction
1. Keynote: **Diane Sare **(U.S.), former candidate for U.S. Senate from New York, President of The LaRouche Organization
2. **Helga Zepp-LaRouche** (Germany), Founder, Schiller Institute
3. **William Ferguson** (U.S.), Schiller Institute
4. **Paul Gallagher** (U.S.), Schiller Institute
5. **John Sigerson** (U.S.), Musical Director, Schiller Institute
6. **Liliana Gorini** (Italy), Chairwoman of Movisol, and **Sebastiano Brusco** (Italy), Pianist
7. **Nader Majd** (Iran/U.S.), President and Director, Center for Persian Classical Music, Vienna, VA

_Question and Answer Session_
* * *
The LaRouche Organization
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241207_speakers_update&n=8)[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241207_speakers_update&n=9)[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241207_speakers_update&n=10)[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241207_speakers_update&n=11)[https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241207_speakers_update&n=12)

name: Chairman Steve Daines
subject: This one is just for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
we wouldn’t have won without you

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Transform Your Daily Routine with Our New Devotional
body:
Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jhBT5qcxNM4dgUi-rCM_Hw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNs9AP0S-~~)
---
Hello Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him.

I recently received a wonderful reminder of the importance of this practice from Timothy, a chaplain at Parkersburg Correctional Center in West Virginia. Timothy shared his morning routine before heading out to minister to inmates. Here's what he wrote:

_" My day starts by reading your daily devotional email, followed by listening to your daily message. I need to renew my mind and spirit to help me minister to the inmates, and I lean on these things to help me. God is using your ministry to touch lives behind the razor wire. There are no boundaries to God's love."_

What a powerful reminder of God's limitless love and how He reaches each of us wherever we are. No matter our circumstances, we can find strength, guidance, and renewal in His Word.

With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:

* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

---
| | For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities.

This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love.
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jhBT5qcxNM4dgUi-rCM_Hw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNs9AP0S-~~)
---
| | Request your copy here:
[https://secure.ptv.org/2025-navy-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional-generous-gift-1](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jhBT5qcxNM4dgUi-rCM_Hw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNs9AP0S-~~)

Thank you for being a part of this ministry. I'm praying that this new devotional will be a daily anchor point of encouragement and wisdom for all who read it.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffres
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cRAS3_nMfyoDWPsdpZOHaA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNs9AP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmdGXDZUZxOKNzlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jw0LsoHtHN8Bd7ubDMbWkw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNs9AP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnRlw2VGcTijc5UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Update from Lineberger, Today with CCA – December 6th, 2024
body:
Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!
One month Post-Election.
In my previous update, I covered some of the reasons why I didn’t win. It boils down to ‘I didn’t capture the attention of enough voters’. So, here is what I’m going to do about it.
I plan to stay active in my community. We have a lot of community needs and organizations working to meet those needs. I plan to participate with and help fundraise for some of those organizations. I’m also going to be fundraising for my campaign. And while I do, I hope to be getting my name out to the community as a trusted partner with their best interests at heart.
CCA, Christian Community Action here in Lewisville, TX is my first community organization of interest. They have been doing great work for this community for over 50 years. I donate to them personally and regularly, plus my donations to them are doubled by my employer. I have helped as a volunteer at their site.
Here is a link for donations directly to CCA, but specific to our effort so we can tell how much we have helped.
[https://ccahelps.harnessgiving.org/campaigns/17009](https://ccahelps.harnessgiving.org/campaigns/17009)
When you click the link above it opens to a page that looks like
The info also points out that CCA has a dollar-for-dollar match going on for all donations in December. So don’t just think on it, do it soon.
Here is a link to CCA’s 22-page booklet “Threads of Hope” that details some of the success, mission and history of CCA. This is a great introduction to the good work CCA is doing in our community. Providing this link gives you a lot of info while keeping this email shorter.
[https://online.fliphtml5.com/ovyuau/shmf/](https://online.fliphtml5.com/ovyuau/shmf/)
Now that the 2024 elections are over, my campaign committee has disbanded. So, it’s mostly just me. I’ve done what I can to minimize expenditures, but still have some readiness for next time. It takes a lot to grow an email system to support a campaign. So, you are getting this email to keep the system warm. These emails won’t be frequent and hopefully, they will be interesting.
Since the election, I have also been visiting some local Democratic clubs, listening to concerns and urging calm resolve to do better next time. I have come to the realization that winning won’t be easy. We are up against a pretty solid Republican machine. They have communication avenues that we cannot access. They have history, a lot of it based on errors and disinformation, but still deeply engrained. They have organization and financing that we cannot match. Theirs is a club that demands loyalty and many don’t want to risk losing their membership.
In this last election, I did get a lot of votes even though I was new to politics. However, for every 4, my opponent got 7. To get to 50%, I need another 62,000 votes. That is a big lift. The easy votes are already there. Some of this will come by getting my name out there deeper. Some will come from disillusionment with the new Republican government. But most of this is entrenched in the R-Club or in the Dem’s that refuse to come vote. This sounds negative, but my goal is to reassure you that I know we are still working to go up a very steep hill.
The good news is that we have time and this email is a start. The FEC has told me that I can still fundraise to recover debt from the last election. My website and ActBlue are still up and active. Every donation received to recover 2024 election debt will help put me in a better place for the 2026 election run. This congressional district (Texas Congressional District 26 for U.S. House) did not have a Democratic candidate in 2022. I was the first Democratic candidate to run for this seat since the new lines were drawn after the 2020 census. By running again in 2026, I hope to have a big head start on getting my name and message in the community.
Here is the link to my 2024 campaign website, which has a ‘donate’ link to take you to my ActBlue page.
[https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com](https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/)
Thank you for taking all of this in. It’s a lot. Just know that I’m working to help our community and positioning myself to be your Better Choice in 2026.
Ernest Lineberger

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: New Hunter Biden Bombshell
body:
| | | | **The following information is for MTG’s Top Advisors only...**_**If you are receiving this message,_that means you_.**___FOR YOUR EYES ONLY__
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxb/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend,

Joe Biden’s pardon of Hunter came as a shock to nobody... _**We knew they were dirty, but now, they aren’t even trying to hide it.**_
I'm staying at my office late to write this letter for you, because **The Fake News Media** & **Big Tech Conglomerates** are going to censor it...
**The Democrats, and the special interests they serve want the Bidens to ride off into the sunset with their millions of dollars they pillaged from our country...**
They are going to be mad as hell that I sent this out...
But I don't care, because I don’t work for them:
_**I work for the American people. I WORK FOR YOU. **_
[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxb/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
From 2014 until now, the Biden Crime Family received **over $27,000,000** from foreign individuals and groups as part of a **conspiracy** to get rich from Joe Biden’s positions in government... _**Thousands of these dollars can be traced directly back to _China_**_. The Biden Crime Family went as far as to set up shell companies to _hide these payments from our investigators._
Joe Biden used his position as Vice President to change American policies, making _**millions of dollars**_ for both his son, and his son’s _**foreign business partners**_. Witnesses say Joe Biden was directly involved in business dealings with **_Russian_ , _Ukrainian_** , and **_Chinese groups_.**
****
**You know it. I know it. Even the Democrats and the DOJ know it. **

But the DOJ and FBI _**gave special treatment**_ to Hunter because he is Joe Biden’s son.

We are even learning that the White House _**directly interfered with our investigators**_ by withholding key documents and witnesses!

Friend, the level of corruption we are witnessing is _**unprecedented, in the entire history of our country:**_
_****_
_****__**Joe Biden is the most corrupt President in American history...
And he isn’t even the one that has been controlling the White House.**_

Joe can issue as many pardons as he wants: _**this fight is far from over.**_

_**The American people are _done_ tolerating corruption at the highest levels: We demand better!**_
_****_
[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxb/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The Deepstate, Corrupt RINO “Republicans,” and Democrat special interest megadonors _**hate**_ that I am exposing this... they want these crimes to stay out of sight, and out of mind.
_**They want the pardons to be filed, and they want the Bidens to ride off into the sunset with their millions of dollars they pillaged from our country...**_
_**[We can’t let that happen.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxb/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
__**Now that we’ve got real, actionable evidence against Joe Biden, things are about to get much, much worse.**__
We need to raise awareness... We need to mobilize our legal experts... We need to shed light on the Biden family’s corruption _**once and for all...**_
Nobody who loves our country can sit on the sidelines in the face of this sort of corruption: __**[we need to fight back harder than ever.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxb/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__

_**[Can I count on you to join me in this fight, and help me EXPOSE THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9zxb/?__vbtrk=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MDAyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

body:

---
From the Desk of

# **[Kari Lake](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60c698657564498caa4e68b3dae21c68&_e=P0m_83wZYTo5wcAY3uP93fZ7bYOMr6IRKFaX7wz0r3_2o7E7fOVN4wa-8_q-x97292xxe1ljg3L_QU9c0zfd3o5q4jcQBUCWwmal0K2lCKQJr7en-fDhQ7DqNP_gbOKcYevvO6ZfAb2StJcil7jS-k6HQ9GVpyOOwSrZtuhEBFsUuwHIlEPQbpl_caqDkkF97YE_85DcRND42Pqa-d7_lSkBcxsoMoEUhtFJHfWTa2rV8ABQLQV2UjyN_5E34D3QdGaJsTO9WKrmVC0fIqaAlSpVzLmoeI8xRSpLehQltvIuLS2GG3Onz0vSFYq3awIi64mVU0UZR7iQZj_n9XoOySsdi8zVaHt1xjRxTXbtWCbIx6aXrUB7La2S5sHgTylMCDUAgbmpdh3najk-P-8lEJJ3rPIPWkv2uYtUtMx6Suo%3D)**

| | Dear Friend, They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...All for speaking the truth.It is imperative that we rise up and resist when things feel wrong.And you and I both know that something was _very_ wrong...
---
When Democrats allowed illegals to vote without identification... When an Anti-MAGA election official said he wanted to “make life hell for Kari Lake”...When election officials destroyed evidence and refused to comply with discovery...
---
I’ve never been afraid to speak the truth.But corrupt sinister Leftist parties are trying to destroy me for it... When I spoke out against their blatant fraud and rigged electioneering...They decided to make an example of me.Yes, I dared to speak the truth about election fraud.I dared to listen to the people and fight to Make America Great Again. And that’s when I found out just how far the Left will go to silence and destroy American patriots like you and me.And for that, I’m now facing enormous fines.In the Left’s America, the truth will put you behind bars. Each day that the weight of this lawsuit feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what happened to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors, working with radical Never-Trump Judges, holding show trials in cities that voted 99% for Biden, tried to take EVERYTHING away from Donald Trump.His businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.And he fights on.I’m certain that if President Trump had suspended his campaign for President, all these lawsuits would have magically disappeared.But he didn’t give the Left what they wanted. He’s going to fight for America First. Always.He’s truly unstoppable, and that inspires me every day.And I’m inspired to fight back against the Left and their schemes.I’m not going to be scared away.I will fight to my last breath.But I need help.[_Today I am asking you to support my First Amendment Fund which will help me fight the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy me._](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60c698657564498caa4e68b3dae21c68&_e=P0m_83wZYTo5wcAY3uP93fZ7bYOMr6IRKFaX7wz0r3_2o7E7fOVN4wa-8_q-x97292xxe1ljg3L_QU9c0zfd3o5q4jcQBUCWwmal0K2lCKQJr7en-fDhQ7DqNP_gbOKcYevvO6ZfAb2StJcil7jS-k6HQ9GVpyOOwSrZtuhEBFsUuwHIlEPQbpl_caqDkkF97YE_85DcRND42Pqa-d7_lSkBcxsoMoEUhtFJHfWTa2rV8ABQLQV2UjyN_5E34D3QdGaJsTO9WKrmVC0fIqaAlcd-_-9Lg8wdhW64dBa22iGrlRYftl8qIGlSwYASIMXwPZBWTDyF_E404GFQkvM1tkpSgCsBE8Nq6Dhhi_--8DnKQoajbQXrgGeBz4l_G-559R38JXrahKAhi6C7WJzSqtPR7OKW9mHhRtwhX2Fboxw%3D) American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare.My husband and I have been living off our savings. But there is no way we will be able to pay these massive fines.And I’ve got good reason to worry about that.The Left is hoping to break me – bankruptcy... defamation... whatever it takes.[_If you’re able, would you consider supporting my “First Amendment Fund” to help me defend myself and defeat the Left’s sham lawfare?_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60c698657564498caa4e68b3dae21c68&_e=P0m_83wZYTo5wcAY3uP93fZ7bYOMr6IRKFaX7wz0r3_2o7E7fOVN4wa-8_q-x97292xxe1ljg3L_QU9c0zfd3o5q4jcQBUCWwmal0K2lCKQJr7en-fDhQ7DqNP_gbOKcYevvO6ZfAb2StJcil7jS-k6HQ9GVpyOOwSrZtuhEBFsUuwHIlEPQbpl_caqDkkF97YE_85DcRND42Pqa-d7_lSkBcxsoMoEUhtFJHfWTa2rV8ABQLQV2UjyN_5E34D3QdGaJsTO9WKrmVC0fIqaAlcoljIRSYpvji6DdZOlGvv3CwpmBvp1AWHC5b6x_0MeKb_RG5aCIkUq2ULaqFE3seQz_zJiTQgy08K4YZZFvCcBNNpbNsJitadJ0KKXDj3Nut8NEAvmdCB-PZ05t9xLOqT8MNWECCmMiuDxdlHq6zDw%3D) Your gift of any amount is tax-deductible. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Explore God’s Purpose for Your Life with Daily Readings
body:
Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kb8hRV6S_xuhOTB75aaLXw~~/AARclAA~)
---
Hello Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him.

I recently received a wonderful reminder of the importance of this practice from Timothy, a chaplain at Parkersburg Correctional Center in West Virginia. Timothy shared his morning routine before heading out to minister to inmates. Here's what he wrote:

_" My day starts by reading your daily devotional email, followed by listening to your daily message. I need to renew my mind and spirit to help me minister to the inmates, and I lean on these things to help me. God is using your ministry to touch lives behind the razor wire. There are no boundaries to God's love."_

What a powerful reminder of God's limitless love and how He reaches each of us wherever we are. No matter our circumstances, we can find strength, guidance, and renewal in His Word.

With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:

* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

I need to renew my mind and spirit to help me minister to the inmates, and I lean on these things to help me. God is using your ministry to touch lives behind the razor wire. There are no boundaries to God's love." What a powerful reminder of God's limitless love and how He reaches each of us wherever we are. name: History Facts
subject: The cutest therapy ever
body:
The November 12, 1956 issue of Life magazine included a profile of a then-unique program at the University of Michigan’s hospital. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cmifhnh3pb315vh40yejvh89u8ptixve8jgevhbeyeo9c357fgxkddfge746ehfprphkz4c6cthplkbumtvwqhqp049ghgbl0p5tbbf98hp58g5ghy3t1k1yzcd3eohax2dqstf6nuko19q&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so4ho4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Ducklings were used for medical therapy in the 1950s.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so4ho4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so4ho4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so4ho4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he November 12, 1956 issue of _Life_ magazine included a profile of a then-unique program at the University of Michigan’s hospital. The facility’s youngest patients received [regular visits from animals](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so4ho4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to cheer them up during their long stays. Working animals included bunnies, kittens, puppies, and piglets, and some photos even showed coatis swinging from wires above the children’s heads. By the time the article was published, the university had maintained its animal program for 30 years, with a veritable menagerie of past visitors, including alligators and ostriches. But some of the most heartwarming photos were of kids with ducklings.
---
Hospital staff had at least one specific method for duckling therapy: Kids were encouraged to cuddle the sweet baby birds wrapped in a towel. But ducklings turned out to be pretty versatile, and were an accessible ray of sunshine for kids of most mobility levels. The largest photo in the _Life_ spread shows a crowd of children feeding a pool full of ducklings that had been set up on a hospital sun deck; some kids are standing, while others are in beds arranged along the sides. One 3-year-old polio patient attached to a chest respirator is pictured smiling and watching the ducklings swim around a small tub next to her bed.
Animal therapy programs are far more common in hospitals, schools, and other facilities today. But while species of therapy animals may be more diverse than you think — ducks are [still on the table](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so4ho4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)! — you’d be hard-pressed to find a therapy alligator in a medical setting now.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so4ho4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so4ho4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
