## The first American guide dog school opened in 1929.
While guide dogs for blind people have a long history, the idea really took off after World War I, when many soldiers in the trenches were blinded by mustard gas. The movement started in Germany and piqued the interest of Dorothy Harrison Eustis, a wealthy American who trained police dogs, in the 1920s. After visiting a German training school, she chronicled her experience in the _Saturday Evening Post_ , which caught the attention of a 19-year-old blind man named Morris Frank. Together, the pair founded [The Seeing Eye](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=53p517cis0ij2wv0l3evn1296uog1wm4acehh0rnle94g85x3w867q41y52m6msgfgjbu25344ciep1g9mij0p983xaj3k5hg575pmlsvepb50b871qufrnh3rdxa0s6v9f9fytjt5ki8qvzned6wkqclk0uh21bq79br46ab9tttuty5bpx9pyqb33kcb8w8d2n42dx8evdwn1xh7w3h3rzu9nl37t44dsltau7omunkbncim88y6rc9py2gj9p79m43h3160cyyouaynkhr2sgemd87uunrjb9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so4ho4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), a guide dog school in Morris Township, New Jersey, that’s still in operation today — and is where the term “seeing eye dog” comes from.
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!

subject: Will Anna Paulina Luna Be Silenced by the Radical Left?

Well, here we are and here we have it...

**Joe Biden, breaking his hard promise to the contrary, has granted Hunter Biden a FULL PARDON for any and all federal crimes committed over the last decade.** And you'd better believe this isn't just about protecting Hunter.

**This is about protecting the "Big Guy" from being held accountable for the Biden Crime Family's massively profitable influence-peddling operation!**

I can assure you I will not let up. The corruption of our justice system is an absolute travesty and the American people deserve answers and accountability. **_[**_RUSH SUPPORT TO FUEL OUR FIGHT AT TEAM CRUZ >>>_**](http://trk.tedcruz._sUkPK9Mmr8SYRkV8d_g)_**

Are you turning healthy fruits into highly unhealthy fruits, without even realizing it?
Fruit can be one of the healthiest things you can put into your body, but the majority of Americans are guilty of making this single mistake that can counteract all of the health benefits of fruit.
Some fruits can help with occasional constipation, reduce bloating, and even help burn calories.
Others can wreak havoc on your digestive system and energy levels.
In this viral presentation, world-renowned heart surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry showcases the three fruits to stop eating today.

subject: Create campus leaders
body:
| Peter, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Here’s our plan to achieve school choice in Mississippi
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/delbertvsdonald-11573508?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **Parental choice is the only certain way to raise standards and counter left- wing values in the classroom. **MCPP has a plan to make this happen in Mississippi.

**Mississippi is already surrounded on three sides by states that have school choice.** Arkansas, Alabama and Louisiana have all now passed legislation to give families control over their child’s share of the education budget.
---
|
---
_Real Conservatives Support School Choice. Fake Conservatives Don’t. _
| **However, perennial efforts to achieve something similar in Mississippi through Education Savings Accounts, or ESA's, have failed.** Each time a universal ESA proposal has been attempted the legislation dies. We would love to see a universal program of publicly funded ESA's in Mississippi, which families could use to pay for school, but I believe the chances of such legislation passing anytime soon are slim.

**That’s why MCPP is pursuing a different three step strategy to achieve universal school choice in our state:**
1. **Step One – An individual budget for every student: **During the last legislative session, MCPP spearheaded efforts to secure a school-funding formula in order that every public school student now has a personalized education budget.

We did so knowing that once each student has a personalized budget, it becomes much easier to argue that they should then be allowed to take their budget to a school of their choice. **We have achieved this. **

1. **Step Two – Public-to-public school choice: **Thanks to a bill (HB 1341) passed in the last legislative session, military families, including those in the National Guard, are able to send their children to a traditional public school of their choice—if it has capacity.

**We are openly pushing for legislation in the 2025 session to allow each student to take their personal budget to a public school of their choice, giving every family in Mississippi the right that military families enjoy. **

Responsible conservative policy means allowing school boards to have the final say over capacity and giving strong safeguards to school so that they do not have to take students with a history of disciplinary problems.

1. **Step 3 – Parental Choice Tax Credit: **Tens of thousands of families in our state choose not to send their children to public school, either because they homeschool or they send their children to private school. We believe they should be able to claim a refundable income tax credit to help them with expenses, like tuition and fees.

We have a carefully costed plan for a Parental Choice Tax Credit that would achieve this, building on the tax credit system we already have. Interestingly, the Republicans in Washington, D.C., have indicated that they might pass a similar tax credit federally.

These three steps would ensure universal school choice in our state—and give families in Mississippi the choices that families now have in neighboring states. **The good news is that Mississippi is already halfway to making this happen!**

Morton Blackwell, the great conservative activist, likes to say that “In politics nothing moves unless it’s pushed”.

**MCPP is happy to push – and to push hard .... **even if it upsets one or two anti-school choice activists. It’s what we exist to do.

**We are open about our goal and our strategy for achieving school choice because we know that sunlight is the best disinfectant. **There’s no need for mystery and opaque maneuverings.

Nor will we shy away from engaging directly those that might like to stop parental choice by stealth. **If school choice is opposed by lawmakers that sent their own kids to private school, we won’t hesitate to ensure that Mississippi knows. **

Over the course of the coming months as we head into the 2025 legislative session, I will be sure to update you on progress – and I’ll be sure to inform you who supports and who opposes parental choice!

**This is a fight we can win!**

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, Parental choice is the only certain way to raise standards and counter left- wing values in the classroom. MCPP has a plan to make this happen in Mississippi. Mississippi is already surrounded on three sides by states that have school choice. Arkansas, Alabama and Louisiana have all now passed legislation to give families control over their child’s share of the education budget. | Real Conservatives Support School Choice. Fake Conservatives Don’t. | However, perennial efforts to achieve something similar in Mississippi through Education Savings Accounts, or ESA's, have failed. Each time a universal ESA proposal has been attempted the legislation dies. We would love to see a universal program of publicly funded ESA's in Mississippi, which families could use to pay for school, but I believe the chances of such legislation passing anytime soon are slim. That’s why MCPP is pursuing a different three step strategy to achieve universal school choice in our state: 1. Step One – An individual budget for every student: During the last legislative session, MCPP spearheaded efforts to secure a school-funding formula in order that every public school student now has a personalized education budget. We did so knowing that once each student has a personalized budget, it becomes much easier to argue that they should then be allowed to take their budget to a school of their choice. We have achieved this. 1. Step Two – Public-to-public school choice: Thanks to a bill (HB 1341) passed in the last legislative session, military families, including those in the National Guard, are able to send their children to a traditional public school of their choice—if it has capacity. We are openly pushing for legislation in the 2025 session to allow each student to take their personal budget to a public school of their choice, giving every family in Mississippi the right that military families enjoy. Responsible conservative policy means allowing school boards to have the final say over capacity and giving strong safeguards to school so that they do not have to take students with a history of disciplinary problems. 1. Step 3 – Parental Choice Tax Credit: Tens of thousands of families in our state choose not to send their children to public school, either because they homeschool or they send their children to private school. We believe they should be able to claim a refundable income tax credit to help them with expenses, like tuition and fees. We have a carefully costed plan for a Parental Choice Tax Credit that would achieve this, building on the tax credit system we already have. Interestingly, the Republicans in Washington, D.C., have indicated that they might pass a similar tax credit federally. These three steps would ensure universal school choice in our state—and give families in Mississippi the choices that families now have in neighboring states. The good news is that Mississippi is already halfway to making this happen! Morton Blackwell, the great conservative activist, likes to say that “In politics nothing moves unless it’s pushed”. MCPP is happy to push – and to push hard .... even if it upsets one or two anti-school choice activists. It’s what we exist to do. We are open about our goal and our strategy for achieving school choice because we know that sunlight is the best disinfectant. There’s no need for mystery and opaque maneuverings. Nor will we shy away from engaging directly those that might like to stop parental choice by stealth. If school choice is opposed by lawmakers that sent their own kids to private school, we won’t hesitate to ensure that Mississippi knows. Over the course of the coming months as we head into the 2025 legislative session, I will be sure to update you on progress – and I’ll be sure to inform you who supports and who opposes parental choice! This is a fight we can win! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Census Blunders - Electoral College Winners and Losers
body:
The Future Looks Redder and Redder | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0b47459e995a/when-we-vote-we-win-14761209?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
[](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=22e1014266&e=8763c56857)
| | | | |
---
|
# Fix the Census: It’s time to count heads, not blunders.
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | _**By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**_
---
| The U.S. Census, once a symbol of precision and fairness, has become a political football—and not the kind you’d want to cheer for. Once upon a time, this cornerstone of American democracy was about counting heads, not tilting scales. But in recent years, Census blunders have become a national pastime, with significant errors and mismanagement creating a mess of miscounts that undermine its purpose.
These errors aren’t just academic; they distort representation, divert billions in federal dollars, and skew the Electoral College. And yes, it all started in 2020 when the Trump administration approved counting illegal immigrants as part of the Census—a decision that threw fuel on an already smoldering fire.
But let’s bring this debacle closer to home. The prize for one of the most absurd Census errors goes to Connecticut, where a whopping 70,500 mistakes left heads spinning. Initially, it was reported that the state gained 57,000 residents—a sunny tale of a population boom. The reality? **Connecticut lost 11,500 people.** Oops. Misclassified data from planning regions led to this embarrassing discrepancy, overestimating people moving into the state and underestimating those heading for the exits. It was a textbook case of sloppy data processing, masking the state’s real population decline and highlighting how far the Census had gone off the rails.
Unfortunately, this wasn’t an isolated incident. Errors like these cropped up nationwide, and the consequences weren’t evenly distributed. Democratic-leaning states like New York and Minnesota benefited from overcounts, retaining more Electoral College votes than they earned. Meanwhile, Republican-leaning states such as Texas and Florida suffered undercounts, losing votes they should have gained. The result? By 2024, overcounts handed blue states at least seven bonus Electoral College votes—votes that Republicans had to claw back to stay competitive. And the financial impact was no less significant: billions of dollars in federal funding, also tied to Census data, flowed disproportionately to states with inflated numbers.
The stakes couldn’t be higher. The Census isn’t just a tally sheet—it’s the foundation for congressional representation, federal funding, and the Electoral College. Get the numbers wrong, and you skew the entire system. But there’s hope for a course correction. If the next Census gets it right in 2030, we’re poised to see a dramatic shift in the balance of power. **States like Texas and Florida are booming, while high-tax, high-regulation strongholds such as California and New York are bleeding residents. Demographic trends suggest that red states could net as many as 14 additional Electoral College votes by 2030,** provided the Census doesn’t botch the count again.
Of course, more than waiting for population trends to do the heavy lifting is required. Washington needs to step in and ensure the next Census is handled with the kind of professionalism it deserves. That means auditing the 2020 Census, learning from its mistakes, and implementing safeguards to prevent future mismanagement. With a rejuvenated Department of Commerce and—one hopes—a no-nonsense, businesslike approach in place by the next administration, there’s no reason the Census can’t get back on track.
What’s at stake here isn’t just a handful of Electoral College votes or a few billion dollars in misallocated federal funds. It’s trust—trust in the institutions that form the backbone of our democracy. Congress must prioritize fixing the Census, ensuring that it delivers accurate, unbiased results that reflect the actual makeup of our nation. The American people deserve better than 70,500 mistakes. It’s time to count heads, not blunders.
_Dominic Rapini is a seasoned executive and lifelong Connecticut native from New Haven County. Currently a technology CEO in the cybersecurity sector, Dominic brings decades of leadership and innovation to his work. Previously, he was an award-winning account executive at Apple, Inc., driving success in the consumer retail business. A veteran of the personal computer industry, Dominic has held diverse roles, including as a manufacturing executive. In 2022, he was a candidate for Connecticut’s Secretary of the State, leveraging his deep commitment to public service and community engagement. Dominic is also a proud husband and father, dedicated to his family and his home state._

name: Kari Lake
subject: Now they are coming for me…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
All for speaking the truth. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5d68b7a5667048ad9be6de4b6016d288&_e=j77QMHrRwbIEctLaeROrjT9q8OLmJyCWGcXmirHFDpNEoBgJHxWF9_eIq3Rr9EfHE4eLhbY3JNupsfv03kLGyCb8RQl-lkvkJxnhIh3xcFL8NZ2-1RN-Do2RWG-PMJUx_L1ApyA7bj9I0avht8vw2g_zYW2bjXPY0lnSlYrJ1MvBbMAy3G9aqQm1a9Pp0BH89keBD_GNOlGHE4qVB3oRUV_V3-Sm8iC3jjrNoSWNGGzZIy4jl68I4XGr3dUPdAxIL43Yb4K0vRrHKX7X1haKdjdXAZidv31dm0wIYU5OX2QZ8aUJxKBBzup_ngTastlSaxnfG2RD8WSP5Jf6J_HcECkVBB-ljzntUnA0ic6iGLNrFm1XThh9IxkyVl4XahRvvcfvOTLzah65rB5RDZ31acLSEdc-6yECDmEevqJJzVY%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...All for speaking the truth.It is imperative that we rise up and resist when things feel wrong.And you and I both know that something was _very_ wrong...
---
When Democrats allowed illegals to vote without identification... When an Anti-MAGA election official said he wanted to “make life hell for Kari Lake”...When election officials destroyed evidence and refused to comply with discovery...
---
I’ve never been afraid to speak the truth.But corrupt sinister Leftist parties are trying to destroy me for it... When I spoke out against their blatant fraud and rigged electioneering...They decided to make an example of me.Yes, I dared to speak the truth about election fraud.I dared to listen to the people and fight to Make America Great Again. And that’s when I found out just how far the Left will go to silence and destroy American patriots like you and me.And for that, I’m now facing enormous fines.In the Left’s America, the truth will put you behind bars. Each day that the weight of this lawsuit feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what happened to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors, working with radical Never-Trump Judges, holding show trials in cities that voted 99% for Biden, tried to take EVERYTHING away from Donald Trump.His businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.And he fights on.I’m certain that if President Trump had suspended his campaign for President, all these lawsuits would have magically disappeared.But he didn’t give the Left what they wanted. He’s going to fight for America First. Always.He’s truly unstoppable, and that inspires me every day.And I’m inspired to fight back against the Left and their schemes.I’m not going to be scared away.I will fight to my last breath.But I need help.[_Today I am asking you to support my First Amendment Fund which will help me fight the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy me._](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5d68b7a5667048ad9be6de4b6016d288&_e=j77QMHrRwbIEctLaeROrjT9q8OLmJyCWGcXmirHFDpNEoBgJHxWF9_eIq3Rr9EfHE4eLhbY3JNupsfv03kLGyCb8RQl-lkvkJxnhIh3xcFL8NZ2-1RN-Do2RWG-PMJUx_L1ApyA7bj9I0avht8vw2g_zYW2bjXPY0lnSlYrJ1MvBbMAy3G9aqQm1a9Pp0BH89keBD_GNOlGHE4qVB3oRUV_V3-Sm8iC3jjrNoSWNGGzZIy4jl68I4XGr3dUPdAxIL43Yb4K0vRrHKX7X1haKdjXYNBk_lUE20pmD-hKitlX-_uXsjZTZf-HmMAAY-AiJU2wr-UaI0Z4_kTklIH50k-nsG1CrSRlyR_E4Rkn6TIJ2k1tNj1N0pDd6Rl9uZfxngANLUYXeh_fc1l__6SD03vYY2pA0VBKAU1qk63K0aiU%3D) American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare.My husband and I have been living off our savings. But there is no way we will be able to pay these massive fines.And I’ve got good reason to worry about that.The Left is hoping to break me – bankruptcy... defamation... whatever it takes.[_If you’re able, would you consider supporting my “First Amendment Fund” to help me defend myself and defeat the Left’s sham lawfare?_](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5d68b7a5667048ad9be6de4b6016d288&_e=j77QMHrRwbIEctLaeROrjT9q8OLmJyCWGcXmirHFDpNEoBgJHxWF9_eIq3Rr9EfHE4eLhbY3JNupsfv03kLGyCb8RQl-lkvkJxnhIh3xcFL8NZ2-1RN-Do2RWG-PMJUx_L1ApyA7bj9I0avht8vw2g_zYW2bjXPY0lnSlYrJ1MvBbMAy3G9aqQm1a9Pp0BH89keBD_GNOlGHE4qVB3oRUV_V3-Sm8iC3jjrNoSWNGGzZIy4jl68I4XGr3dUPdAxIL43Yb4K0vRrHKX7X1haKdhipsPiI1RfQcVQFhMEg8Ofe0dLDRgO7m8KkLMqGHQcOPxK-Pe1tl39FAGJtbzTEUZQ_T5lTrO2G6t8Qs9exXx06w5uxJ2cbA92r8NR7TIApqvX8a1xlf0tLvPHdgXQ0HzD10yYT0JPw_LjvCqxiGwQ%3D) Your gift of any amount is tax-deductible. And it will help me cover every expense associated with this insane attack on me.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5d68b7a5667048ad9be6de4b6016d288&_e=j77QMHrRwbIEctLaeROrjT9q8OLmJyCWGcXmirHFDpNEoBgJHxWF9_eIq3Rr9EfHE4eLhbY3JNupsfv03kLGyCb8RQl-lkvkJxnhIh3xcFL8NZ2-1RN-Do2RWG-PMJUx_L1ApyA7bj9I0avht8vw2g_zYW2bjXPY0lnSlYrJ1MvBbMAy3G9aqQm1a9Pp0BH89keBD_GNOlGHE4qVB3oRUV_V3-Sm8iC3jjrNoSWNGGzZIy4jl68I4XGr3dUPdAxIL43Yb4K0vRrHKX7X1haKdms05Yj0z46cRGGYEeWg9ztiZUCO4vAippToa9grzK581WxJjFkhiPfUhMCcSxqtXyhuaA5Nrsfva8qBKYsgsC-PRxnWD-bpUGUEL5dmSi-Lhp0Y5rU_0Od4yphwgeOz0mp88gVKnbsGhndto06jijM%3D)
---
Thank you for your support – and for giving me hope that truth will prevail! Yours truly,
---

Kari Lake

name: Data Team (FFR)
subject: URGENT: DC Statehood Poll for you
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
no taxation without representation!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22605%2E4449941%2E22PqWw)
---
**Here are 3 facts you MUST know about the fight for DC statehood:**

1️⃣ Public polling showed that a majority of voters are supportive of making DC a state!

2️⃣ _86% of DC residents even voted to become the 51st state!_

3️⃣ And if DC does become a state, we’d be almost guaranteed to have two more Democratic senators – _making it easier to take back the Senate!_ | If we get a HUGE wave of support, we can make an impact! That’s why we’re reaching you to ask: **[_Do you support DC statehood?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/dc_statehood/?source=FFR_20241207_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22605%2E4449941%2E22PqWw)** | [ YES, I DO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/dc_statehood/?source=FFR_20241207_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22605%2E4449941%2E22PqWw)
---
[ NO, I DON’T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/dc_statehood/?source=FFR_20241207_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=9&akid=22605%2E4449941%2E22PqWw)
[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/dc_statehood/?source=FFR_20241207_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=10&akid=22605%2E4449941%2E22PqWw)
**WE NEED 25,000 RESPONSES BEFORE MIDNIGHT FOR VALID RESULTS.**
_\- Fight For Reform_

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=22605%2E4449941%2E22PqWw). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=22605%2E4449941%2E22PqWw).**

Can I count on you to sign my Voter ID Petition before the end of the week? – Voter ID Petition – Signature Requested From: Peter Due: 12/08/2024 ADD YOUR NAME Thank you, Marsha Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@updates.marshablackburn.com "info@updates.marshablackburn.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. iCloud , Gmail , Outlook , Yahoo Mail , AOL Mail Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund PO Box 3750 Brentwood, TN 37024 This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Please let us explain why a donation to the Democratic Party is so important:
body:
We know that many of you are tired, disappointed, burnt out, and the last thing you thought you would be doing is making a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today.
---
We know that many of you are tired, disappointed, and burnt out, and the last thing you thought you would be doing is making a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today. But today is the day we need Democrats to step up and chip in if you're in a place to do so. Let us explain why: In just a few weeks, a new Congress will be sworn in. Shortly after that, Trump will become president. We’re already seeing how disastrous it could be. We need -- America needs -- a strong and robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party under his control. We get that you may be tired or feeling tapped out. But we cannot sit back and let Trump take us backward without a fight. So we have to ask one more time: [**We're asking you, humbly, to make a contribution to the Democratic Party today. It can be $5, $50, or whatever you can afford. It will all add up, and we will use your support to mobilize Democrats in the weeks ahead to stop the far-right Trump agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241207_2370_fr&refcode2=2370_22930333_b29HBr&akid=2370%2E22930333%2Eb29HBr) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241207_2370_fr&refcode2=2370_22930333_b29HBr&akid=2370%2E22930333%2Eb29HBr)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20241207_2370_fr&refcode2=2370_22930333_b29HBr&akid=2370%2E22930333%2Eb29HBr)**

But today is the day we need Democrats to step up and chip in if you're in a place to do so. Let us explain why: In just a few weeks, a new Congress will be sworn in. Shortly after that, Trump will become president. We’re already seeing how disastrous it could be. name: Jim Jordan
subject: I went into the belly of the beast…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by
body:
Following our historic Republican victory.

[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

By sending President Trump back to the White House, flipping the
Senate, and defending our House majority, voters like you delivered a
clear message:

You asked us to clean house in Washington so that _your_ government
would once again work for _you_ – the _PEOPLE_.

But there are those on the Left who – despite such a historic
mandate from voters – would still have you believe that putting our
country and _American_ citizens first is “extreme.”

THAT’S WHY I MARCHED RIGHT INTO THE BELLY OF THE BEAST ON _CNN_
FOLLOWING THE ELECTION TO COMBAT THEIR LIES AND FALSE NARRATIVES ABOUT
VOTERS LIKE YOU, FRIEND.

[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

_I went on air to PROVE that the American people demanded change –
and that no matter how hard they might try, the Democrats cannot deny
the voice of the people. _

But to fully prosecute my case against the Left’s continued lies and
smears, I’m counting on grassroots Americans like you to share YOUR
top priorities as we prepare to fight for you on DAY ONE of the new
Congress.

SO PLEASE, TAKE THE PEOPLE’S AGENDA SURVEY AS YOUR REPUBLICAN
ELECTED OFFICIALS COME TOGETHER TO PUT AMERICA ON TRACK FOR A BRIGHT
NEW FUTURE.
[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

TAKE THE SURVEY

Thank you – and let’s get to work and save our country.

[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=152683194&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNjgzMTk0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzM1ODM5MzcsImV4cCI6MTczNjE3NTkzNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9btvi5bFnI5Y34ui8AoFrBR0vuE-RDEafrnkFWgqwDY)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/why-do-people-keep-voting-against?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I'm going to share some thoughts with you today that you might find challenging. If you're reading this, you're likely someone who I've been able to count on over the last few years, and I hope you'll read this with an open mind while continuing to share your own perspective with me.
A couple weeks ago I wrote about my experience with Trump voters, particularly working people, on the campaign trail. A lot of the responses to that Substack reminded me of a question I have probably been asked once or twice a day for the last few years:
"Why do people keep voting against _their own self-interest_?"
Honestly, I've never understood where to even begin answering this question, so I usually just talked about what I was doing to connect with people across Missouri and how I would like to make our state better.
But as we all reflect on how to move forward after this election cycle, I think it's important for us to get uncomfortably real about it.
If we think about this question from the perspective of the voters it references, the people who are "voting against their own self-interest," this question--even if asked entirely in earnest--doesn't come off as a question. They don't believe they are voting against their self-interest, so it comes off as a statement: that they are stupid, and that the questioner knows more about what's good for them than they do.
Which is unfortunate, because that's the mentality that working people, independent voters, and persuadable people are told Democrats have, and it's one of the things they really don't like.
Even if the presumption in this question is true, that someone would have a better life if they voted for a certain candidate, there's no way forward from this question that comes to a mutual understanding. Because it comes from a place of superiority.
Instead, given the way elections have been going, I think we need to take a moment to ask if the presumption is even correct and why people would feel differently, so that we can reach a point of understanding and move forward. So, here we go...
_**Are people who are rejecting Democrats actually voting against their own self-interest?**_
If you [go back to the messages](https://substack.com/redirect/5fa51447-cfc5-46c9-b404-0398d7b77a51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) I got from Trump voters describing, in their own words, why they didn't vote for me even though they liked me more than my opponent, it's because they think Democrats are ruining the country and have jacked up the economy.
We obsess over policy a lot, but most people don't pay that much attention to policy, to what's happening in DC, or what long term infrastructure bill passed. They do, however, notice that they can't afford groceries anymore and that the President is a Democrat. Frankly, I'm getting killed by groceries every month, so I get it.
And when you look back over the last few years, being a normal person has not always been easy when Democrats were in charge nationally, so claiming that voting for a Democrat is in someone else's own self-interest goes against a lot of people's lived experience.
Here are a few examples from my own life.
When I got back from Iraq in 2009, I spent a large part of 2010 and 2011 trying to keep Marines in their homes who were illegally foreclosed upon by the same big banks that the government had just bailed out. Banks and bankers at the time were knowingly violating the Servicemembers Civil Relief Act (SCRA) left and right, breaking the law kicking servicemembers out of their homes--many of whom had the money to stay but hadn't gotten proper notice due to deployments. And it all happened under a Democratic President who had a Democratic majority in the House and 60 Democratic votes in the Senate.
I specifically remember these Marines and their families asking me how the bankers could get away with it. Didn't we all just bail these banks out? They would ask. I signed up after 9/11 when these guys were attacked in New York, they would say, how could they forget that and treat us like this? Who is the government supposed to be looking out for, anyway? Why isn't it us?
I didn't have a good answer for them, I just did my best to keep them in their homes. And in every single case where they came to me before the foreclosure was complete, I was able to keep them in their homes, because the law was on our side and the banks were egregiously violating it.
By the way, knowingly violating the SCRA is a criminal act punishable by imprisonment. Can you guess how many people went to jail for illegally kicking Marines out on the street?
You instinctively knew that the answer was zero. Before you even read it. Because it didn't matter that the President was a Democrat or that Democrats controlled Congress--there is no accountability for the rich and famous in our system no matter who is in charge. And Joe Biden pardoning his son Hunter just solidified every skeptic's view on Democrats for a generation.
Try telling those Marines or anyone else who struggled through the foreclosure crisis that the system is fair or that it works.
So many powerful people actively destroyed, actually ruined, the lives of everyday people in this country during that time and not a single one of those who caused the damage suffered or lost anything. Does that feel like an administration that was in a normal person's "self-interest?"
A couple of years later, when Democrats all around the country were bragging about how they had brilliantly saved the housing market by doing little more than pouring more money into this corrupt system, my dad put our childhood home up for sale.
That house sat for sale on the "recovered" housing market for two years before it finally sold for $43,000. My dad owed seventy-something on it at the time. He could have gotten $43k for it 25 years earlier. Try telling anyone in Missouri who experienced the effects of that era of national Democratic control that Democratic control is in their best interest.
Almost every time that I've been at the Hy-Vee here in Independence over the last couple of years I've seen people putting items back at the register because inflation has sent their grocery bills up more than they could afford.
This doesn't mean that policies supported by Democrats are bad for working people. They're certainly better than massive tax cuts for multinational corporations and the rich, which is likely what we are staring down again as the biggest accomplishment of the next four years. And maybe the timing was just bad luck for when Democrats were in charge. But the reality is that most people aren't looking at their lives and thinking, damn, my life is better when Democrats are in charge.

And they certainly aren't lining up screaming for people to save a system that feels entirely broken. When you are the party that stands for the system and the system is broken, it doesn't matter how bad the other side is.
I remember people on the campaign trail asking me how it's possible that working people don't realize that voting for the same people as their bosses could never be in their best interest.
Well, the great unifying theme of the Republican Party right now is that they are going to tear the system down. An agenda that has accomplished that neat trick of politically aligning working people with the big bosses. Building a big tent that's expanded the base of Republican voters in nearly every Midwestern state.
The billionaires, industrialists, and many others want the system torn down because they want to squeeze everyday people, the economy, our land and water, and our health for everything they can get. They want to transfer every spare dollar to the shareholder class and they're tired of the Federal Trade Commission, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, courts, laws, regulations on financiers, and everything else getting in their way.
Everyday people want to tear down the system because it is corrupt, they can't afford groceries, they can't buy a house, and they basically have to work until they die.
The response to these voters just can't be doubling down on "the system works" rhetoric and telling people that "no, it really works, and by the way you are voting against your own best interest by not supporting it."
That's a recipe for decades of 2024s, because people just don't think the system is in their own self-interest anymore.
Please keep the comments and emails coming. I read through them all even though I don't respond individually, and they are really helpful in showing me what people might find interesting and how my experiences relate to your thoughts.
More to come!
-- Lucas

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: The Fight to Protect Christian Attorneys
body:
Most Christians don’t realize this...| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c111d5a3524f4260a1ad263f64251655&_e=QfCE_aYMOtd2_PeBVB9TVev2wiQsnRtRJrd3rQo6VyAykPFM02oiWjiuSScsQCOGi-YLn2KNX_0DkWSlqlhv8OczfCaxr66RA8B6W3BLAEGXewrfI-8S6C37FGfIBiQiDuuOiVo3NJPMLGkbmboH1nWzbRUJvyWkD2zlsnqPHgug709iyUCNux6sObOCyrQlir8DBT5sT9H-HYR_hIulOmRIsCkpDAVWTkrWGpv5msZYWQheDNFcAz6diDoRplTnSayfn86Vu9mITOAkGarO21kc1Fh9piQBEKhFtZo-5Q15w3JIAwRMZ8JkwYD_xxPR)
---
Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Friend, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c111d5a3524f4260a1ad263f64251655&_e=QfCE_aYMOtd2_PeBVB9TVev2wiQsnRtRJrd3rQo6VyAykPFM02oiWjiuSScsQCOGi-YLn2KNX_0DkWSlqlhv8OczfCaxr66RA8B6W3BLAEGXewrfI-8S6C37FGfIBiQiDuuOiVo3NJPMLGkbmboH1nWzbRUJvyWkD2zlsnqPHgstGzSuEaSpgpleANHc8-9Jfa0ZyDOJiSh7cbz3_mD7GBTQZYgd17CWKSPU135TrmjjQM4ILxX602K79FOb8xdllBcNfILBO0cuTqMx71gowrcfT2qKU-FymalItGt8aODfaHfiH1tUQqphb51rpgLc)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c111d5a3524f4260a1ad263f64251655&_e=QfCE_aYMOtd2_PeBVB9TVev2wiQsnRtRJrd3rQo6VyAykPFM02oiWjiuSScsQCOGi-YLn2KNX_0DkWSlqlhv8OczfCaxr66RA8B6W3BLAEGXewrfI-8S6C37FGfIBiQiDuuOiVo3NJPMLGkbmboH1nWzbRUJvyWkD2zlsnqPHgtTSzogbtCT-KWsly8pjV4KyRa0E4y5RIw4dTH901wMAQ7UGAhfhBhF8Q2obBXUF9WJBAr5gommLbzdNLqfwNQJydMCUz5hybaF7bYQTcnrDM2sNOoglzIOnEDleIPp1odbpDVrU4nHugAdX9LLDTQi)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Friend, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c111d5a3524f4260a1ad263f64251655&_e=QfCE_aYMOtd2_PeBVB9TVev2wiQsnRtRJrd3rQo6VyAykPFM02oiWjiuSScsQCOGi-YLn2KNX_0DkWSlqlhv8OczfCaxr66RA8B6W3BLAEGXewrfI-8S6C37FGfIBiQiDuuOiVo3NJPMLGkbmboH1nWzbRUJvyWkD2zlsnqPHgtv5SQm-LoqPdvHzqIFlYjXJY0bdfB-R6c79dr1oJ9k8RzT-gO9uxWuGgmjlWeszMI9W42KjFR2YkuaXZjfGcApEO9g9crgOlx9U53grRwFKD-_W5fyIqNQaAXN7RYPL28BVFnoOGUSMEKF-CV4_j8R)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c111d5a3524f4260a1ad263f64251655&_e=QfCE_aYMOtd2_PeBVB9TVev2wiQsnRtRJrd3rQo6VyAykPFM02oiWjiuSScsQCOGi-YLn2KNX_0DkWSlqlhv8OczfCaxr66RA8B6W3BLAEGXewrfI-8S6C37FGfIBiQiDuuOiVo3NJPMLGkbmboH1nWzbRUJvyWkD2zlsnqPHgv6WiGlxggSs2yVP10M1Opn_I4Si759CUbES14iHdHisdCIxkV-mVYtH0WtXYiMleqcz2ZYL3NjoKl0lxuH-Ql6-kf2UGQ5ZWRMgYa1QW7v7XHiNGYqhJlPGDKq-eaaCHphX-io1-BirnyOw-GzeZeU)

Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. clean_body: Most Christians don’t realize this...| | | Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states. That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of personal prayer without getting fired, protection of moral conscience so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a Christian student club --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! Friend, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state. For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change. Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to: discourage or punish attorneys from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke"); stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches, sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious; prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work to defend religious freedom on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values! Friend, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work. Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society. Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo Executive Director & CEO Christian Legal Society Christian Legal Society P.O. Box 7712 McLean, VA 22106-7712

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A Year of Devotionals Awaits You!
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsie_6xWNo

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osie_6xWNo

Hello
Friend,

In our
busy world, setting aside time each day to connect with God is
crucial. It can renew our strength, fill us with His peace, and
keep us anchored in His truth, no matter what the day may bring.

That's
why I'm excited to offer you the brand-new 2025 Pathway to
Victory Daily Devotional-one of our ministry's most popular
resources. This beautiful new resource is filled with an entire
year of weekday messages designed to inspire, encourage, and draw
you closer to Christ throughout the year.

With its
rich, navy leather cover, decorative accents, and large print,
this devotional makes a meaningful resource for your spiritual
growth or a thoughtful New Year's gift for someone you care
about. Each season in the devotional is crafted to enrich your
walk with Christ:

Begin
the year by exploring God's purpose and will for your life,
setting the stage for meaningful growth.
As
the months turn warmer, journey through the book of Colossians,
deepening your understanding of what it means to live fully in
Christ.
In
the latter months, reflect on the parable of the prodigal son,
experiencing afresh the boundless grace and love of your heavenly
Father.

For your
gift of $100 or more, I will send you the 2025 Pathway to Victory
Daily Devotional along with Reigniting Your Passion for Christ,
Volume 1, a powerful DVD and MP3-format audio disc set. This
15-message series from the Gospel of Luke is designed to help you
mirror the heart of our Savior in your daily life, igniting a
renewed love and passion for Christ.

Or, if
you feel led to give a generous gift of $125 or more as we begin
the new year, I'll be delighted to send you three copies of the
2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional-perfect for sharing with
friends and family-along with Reigniting Your Passion for Christ
to strengthen your own spiritual walk.

Choose
your bundle here:
https://ptv.org/donate/2025-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/

I know
you don't give to Pathway to Victory to receive gifts. You give
because you believe in the work we are doing to broadcast God's
truth. But it's my privilege to share these resources with you as
a way of saying thank you for your partnership in helping this
ministry pierce the darkness with the light of God's Word.

Gratefully,
Dr.
Robert Jeffress

Peter,

Reflecting on this past year, **we have a lot to be proud of right here in Pennsylvania.**

This election cycle, we were able to mobilize voters in down-ballot races across PA, retaining control of the state house. We saw record breaking numbers of volunteers – with 114,000 grassroots supporters knocking a total of 7.2 million doors in key districts.

We have to do everything we can to fight back against MAGA extremism in our state, and that starts with building resources for our next elections. **[Before the new year, we need you to join us so we can keep up our momentum. We have to do everything we can to fight back against MAGA extremism in our state, and that starts with building resources for our next elections. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = As we prepare for a second Trump administration, it’s up to us to keep up our grassroots efforts in Pennsylvania. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I refuse to give up my rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aef09378b38c4827855d1137abdb6af4&_e=q0g3cSxKAOCrdWdjVqHFqLN6ZchdRKLRZY1z8xaO0HHMvHpCmqx-1dxdwPNNZpL2wsVQ6nZH123pJZANPPBMz5xMKnhE85xPKJXjEW9U-tmbCDb0yuusZ4GW_c8yxTYidCJIMLS34NOXQrgWGEEUMCEHwVSn8fu4dnGeZqJssHV0Z9vWH6c3gGnTYFReURu14qrLfh6R2MnqTFcKoqO-hVQ-6SsY0oMzSSgNnMWWNUezWsEAvrwsLxjWjzJB7YSVrjBg9xnlueFlN8cMtyI-6a8TMSG1Dak47qgRwRp1q_dGnN6ymWecfGOQebM64Fy0aWIwmLCXvAmCbqGJxBdHRdBZMGPFFuoJWSiWSniqh4fOSg2fAAv9yweyjpbLtlX6K5Nz9IPFErUWqNXCAgLyoQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aef09378b38c4827855d1137abdb6af4&_e=q0g3cSxKAOCrdWdjVqHFqLN6ZchdRKLRZY1z8xaO0HHMvHpCmqx-1dxdwPNNZpL2wsVQ6nZH123pJZANPPBMz5xMKnhE85xPKJXjEW9U-tmbCDb0yuusZ4GW_c8yxTYidCJIMLS34NOXQrgWGEEUMCEHwVSn8fu4dnGeZqJssHV0Z9vWH6c3gGnTYFReURu14qrLfh6R2MnqTFcKoqO-hVQ-6SsY0oMzSSgNnMWWNUdxvt0sOZHJ_BZLlRHFbJTImyH8JGZcUCAcn2KVbOnUYHRGCce4itJA4kWYP5Dx8zrZiiknqy2x-0877BnEa4Ux8-Ip2W9jHm3DjddHdt-dJ4i2Kt2QhA1UJUOdh5m722vnb_L9Iccq1qytc2Q70styq_h1x1Y8N-zFVdgnhqZZ5A%3D%3D)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: A high-water mark for the movement to end the occupation of Palestine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The genocide in Gaza is a world-historic tragedy, but we must hold on to hopeful moments like this.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1404%2E791427%2EsZnrJU)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3015?t=2&akid=1404%2E791427%2EsZnrJU)
Friend — For those of us who have been pushing for years for an end to Israeli occupation of Palestine and self-determination for the Palestinian people, we know that last month’s vote on Israeli arms sales was a high-water mark.
Just a few years ago, it would have been inconceivable that 19 Democratic senators would vote to block the sale of weapons to Israel’s occupying army.
The genocide in Gaza is a world-historic tragedy, but we must hold on to hopeful moments like this. The tide is turning, and one day in the not-so-distant future we will see justice, peace, and prosperity for Palestine.
In solidarity,
Ilhan
* * *

**Hey, before you scroll away ❗**
Can you take just 30 seconds and sign our petition calling on President Biden to put an end to military aid to Israel? There’s still time for the President to take action to bring relief to the people of Gaza. **[Use this link or the button below to add your name >>](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-dec24-gaza-petition/?refcode=em241207-1-gm&akid=1404%2E791427%2EsZnrJU)**

#### Welcome to PolitiBrawl!
Politibrawl recently moved you from another platform to PolitiBrawl, hosted on [Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/57490c84-30ad-4d88-a55b-e8d6e3253a05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). New posts will be automatically delivered to you via email or via [the Substack app](https://substack.com/redirect/33dcab05-aecf-42ac-a94e-da2b6bc2e20d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
To set up your profile and find more to read, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/a0e6f2ee-04ef-4d8f-8f8c-ad81fdb5c6f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If you do not want to receive emails from PolitiBrawl, you can unsubscribe [here](https://substack..aZuNoMzh_BsEJowuvrXcoMk14Fj79-2VoqK4VAQSG5o?).
Secret Service director Ronald Rowe _**[CLASHED](https://substack.com/redirect/8e2ae6bf-1180-4973-9ac7-e4d9b44b69b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ big-time with Texas republican Rep. Pat Fallon during a Trump assassination attempt task force hearing, Thursday.
Sparks began to fly when Fallon showed a photo of director standing near Trump without a protective agent in view during Trump's visit to Ground Zero in NYC.
"Were you the special agent in charge of the detail that day?" _**[Fallon asked Rowe.](https://substack.com/redirect/8e2ae6bf-1180-4973-9ac7-e4d9b44b69b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8e2ae6bf-1180-4973-9ac7-e4d9b44b69b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8e2ae6bf-1180-4973-9ac7-e4d9b44b69b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Rowe replied with a tangent about how he responded to the terrorists attack at Ground Zero on 9/11/2001.
"Actually, congressman, what you're not seeing is the SAC [Special Agent In Charge] of the detail out of the picture's view. And that is the day where we remember more than 3,000 people that have died on 9/11,..." Rowe explained. "I actually responded to Ground Zero. I was there going through the ashes of the World Trade Center," he added. "I was there congressman -- I was there to show respect for a Secret Service member that died on 9/11. Do not invoke 9/11 for political purposes."
But that's not what Fallon asked... and he did not like that answer one bit. _**[Watch him fire back at the director](https://substack.com/redirect/8e2ae6bf-1180-4973-9ac7-e4d9b44b69b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ with one heck of a response.
"I'm not asking you that,... You know why you were there, because you wanted to be visible, because you are auditioning for this job!"
* * *
# Senator Hawley SNAPS AT reporter who confronts him with ridiculous question
Senator Josh Hawley _**[snapped at a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/ba93a05d-910a-4ed7-83fc-aef18d0e9ab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ for suggesting Hunter Biden would not have been charged for his crimes if he weren't a political target of the right.
"That's totally false, that's absolutely false," Hawley insisted. "You can look at the charging memo in the DOJ for crimes similar to this one,... This guy would have been in prison long ago had he not been a Biden."
_**[Watch the confrontation below:](https://substack.com/redirect/ba93a05d-910a-4ed7-83fc-aef18d0e9ab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ba93a05d-910a-4ed7-83fc-aef18d0e9ab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ba93a05d-910a-4ed7-83fc-aef18d0e9ab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
President Joe Biden pardoned his son Hunter from all federal crimes he did comit or may have committed reaching back to 2014 even after telling the American people he would not pardon him, the Associated Press _**[reports.](https://substack.com/redirect/23def8db-5334-4281-acf5-8c7145a0b141?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
"I'm extremely proud of my son Hunter. He has overcome an addiction. He is one of the brightest most decent men I know," Biden said during a press conference in June. "I abide by the jury decision. I will do that and I will not pardon him."
Hunter is convicted of _**[an outrageous million dollar tax evasion crime](https://substack.com/redirect/c1a97a56-023b-406e-9849-b92b8d129d73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ as well as a separate gun-related charge.
* * *
# Woman has racist drunken MELTDOWN after going on a hotel rampage, she is one-of-a-kind crazy!
Police Body cam footage shows the arrest of a female suspect in Artesia, New Mexico on June 19, 2024.
_**[Click below to watch the chaos unfold!](https://substack.com/redirect/d3c690be-168b-450b-b927-d6903180da4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6d348f3d-6943-44bd-bf46-84e983ae7901?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/6d348f3d-6943-44bd-bf46-84e983ae7901?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The female suspect was staying at a local hotel with her husband when hotel staff asked the couple to leave the hotel due to erratic behavior, property damage, and noise complaints from other guests.
When a guest reported a purported assault between the couple, cops were called to the scene. When officers arrived on scene, the female suspect was highly agitated and aggressive, and unwilling to cooperate with the hotel staff and officers' orders to leave the premises.
When the suspect escalated the situation and belligerently confronted the hotel manager, officers stepped in and arrested her. Once in custody, the woman had a meltdown of epic proportions, screaming and hurling insults and racist remarks at hotel staff and law enforcement, while also kicking and punching the arresting officers.
She was charged with Battery on Law Enforcement Officer and Assault.
* * *

body:

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5cd61d2-0cc5-41ae-8a35-7abf72b81ebf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: COURIER
subject: NBC Poll: Misinformation tipped disengaged voters toward Trump
body:
We urgently need to reach independent voters and we need your help.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98325292/516288958/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDAyOTAxYTQtYjJiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p_HB7fBSSQNhLcE0DoSi2o18tpHe68ppuw4xcXxEV4c=&emci=f87ea05d-e0b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d02901a4-b2b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
A new NBC poll of 2024 voters revealed a stark divide between those who voted for Kamala Harris and those who voted for Donald Trump.
**According to the poll, Harris was +5 among voters who followed politics closely. But voters who didn’t follow politics closely went overwhelmingly for Trump—a +14 advantage.**
[**We’ll explain why that matters and what we can do about it in a moment, but first, if you support COURIER’s mission to take on the right-wing media, can you chip in $25 now so we can keep expanding our reach?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98325296/516288962/-593472309?refcode=20241207-EM-EngagedVotersResend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDAyOTAxYTQtYjJiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p_HB7fBSSQNhLcE0DoSi2o18tpHe68ppuw4xcXxEV4c=)
The 2024 election results have made one thing clear: trust in legacy media like _The New York Times_ and CNN has been eroding for decades, especially among independents and voters on the right.
While many on the left still look to these outlets for factual journalism, Trump and the MAGA right have long since filled that void with a sprawling, online media empire—Fox News, X, Tucker Carlson, and a vast network of podcasts and influencers—designed to spread fear, conspiracies, and disinformation.
**These platforms target disengaged voters with a relentless drumbeat of lies, amplifying fringe ideas and reshaping public opinion. **
And, in 2024, we saw that it works.
At COURIER, we’re fighting back and we need your help.
We were founded to provide a progressive counterweight to right-wing media. Our goal is to protect democracy by delivering factual, local reporting where voters need it most. Here’s how:
* **Targeting Key Battlegrounds:** Our 11 state-based newsrooms are embedded in battleground states and ‘news deserts,’ where quality local news is often missing.
* **Delivering Critical Reporting:** Our reporters tackle the issues that matter most to local communities, offering fact-based, values-driven reporting to correct right-wing misinformation and cut through the noise.
* **Meeting Voters Where They Are:** We publish our stories on the platforms people actually use—social media feeds, podcasts, and email inboxes—countering right-wing propaganda head-on.

The results speak for themselves: with 4.5 million followers and nearly 2 billion social media impressions in the 90 days before Election Day, COURIER is reaching Americans where they are, providing the factual reporting they need to stay informed.
**But with Trump’s allies amplifying propaganda and shaping the narrative, our work has never been more urgent. **
The right isn’t slowing down, and neither can we.
[**COURIER’s reporting is always free to access—but that means we rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep the presses running. clean_body: We urgently need to reach independent voters and we need your help. Peter – A new NBC poll of 2024 voters revealed a stark divide between those who voted for Kamala Harris and those who voted for Donald Trump. According to the poll, Harris was +5 among voters who followed politics closely. But voters who didn’t follow politics closely went overwhelmingly for Trump—a +14 advantage. = The 2024 election results have made one thing clear: trust in legacy media like The New York Times and CNN has been eroding for decades, especially among independents and voters on the right. While many on the left still look to these outlets for factual journalism, Trump and the MAGA right have long since filled that void with a sprawling, online media empire—Fox News, X, Tucker Carlson, and a vast network of podcasts and influencers—designed to spread fear, conspiracies, and disinformation. These platforms target disengaged voters with a relentless drumbeat of lies, amplifying fringe ideas and reshaping public opinion. And, in 2024, we saw that it works. At COURIER, we’re fighting back and we need your help. We were founded to provide a progressive counterweight to right-wing media. Our goal is to protect democracy by delivering factual, local reporting where voters need it most. Here’s how: Targeting Key Battlegrounds: Our 11 state-based newsrooms are embedded in battleground states and ‘news deserts,’ where quality local news is often missing. Delivering Critical Reporting: Our reporters tackle the issues that matter most to local communities, offering fact-based, values-driven reporting to correct right-wing misinformation and cut through the noise. Meeting Voters Where They Are: We publish our stories on the platforms people actually use—social media feeds, podcasts, and email inboxes—countering right-wing propaganda head-on. The results speak for themselves: with 4.5 million followers and nearly 2 billion social media impressions in the 90 days before Election Day, COURIER is reaching Americans where they are, providing the factual reporting they need to stay informed. But with Trump’s allies amplifying propaganda and shaping the narrative, our work has never been more urgent. **TO: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: Peter Willis**
Subject: I stand with you.

**Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,

_I am FURIOUS that Trump is trying to take out his revenge on you!_**

You’ve done an incredible job working to hold him accountable and uphold the law – so it’s no surprise MAGA Republicans are attacking you at every turn.

We know Trump must be TERRIFIED for your final report to be released, so he’s doing everything he can to attack you.

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

**[I can’t thank you enough for your work over the years to hold Trump accountable and ensure he faces justice. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98326131/516291653/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzI1MWIyNTItYjRiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KuKw0hGSKYtHoAEBnEOZ9cuIgN7RrgOrrVDewvdQh-8=&emci=19ddb1bf-1fb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c251b252-b4b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
We know you’re frustrated, maybe even scared and angry about Trump’s return to the White House.
We’re concerned about the possibility he could add even more radical right-wing justices to the Supreme Court and lock down the MAGA majority for decades.
We’re not going to let that happen. We have a plan and need your help!
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.
We’re working with Adam Schiff, Hakeem Jeffries, Sheldon White, Jamie Raskin, and a total of 75 co-sponsors of the TERM Act in the House and Senate.
We need a majority in both Houses to get it done. We’re backing candidates pledging to support the TERM Act and mounting a major public pressure campaign to force Congress to act.
If you care about the rights of women to make their own healthcare decisions. If you want to do something about money in politics and gun violence, join our movement and help us get the job done!

**[>>>We’re not alone. Polls show over 70% of Americans want to term limit SCOTUS. Let’s get to work!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98326134/516291659/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzI1MWIyNTItYjRiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KuKw0hGSKYtHoAEBnEOZ9cuIgN7RrgOrrVDewvdQh-8=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

body:
URGENT MEMO

[ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3f8f62062a5b41aea7ccb5a4d8a632b8&_m=cee7cabd7cce454a9da0370f5d7ddac5&_e=VD7n01q2aeUCgH6q4LpSjND-zixZacL16hPPRrQX2JfV0qLOCknmp5ydFsvbdQN1SDb8RXC84ULi6YeAnbDOBxNC6M-z0hWHQai_gcVt772n7ryE4L7-_I9HcxuROS0OtQhZgogd6WhQ0OpIo_h8xzScKOAzRXTjkQDdCTlHaC8breOL3EcC4w7FWHOVLRMiSBlkzNWe5nEtprmC43avKnKAs6SfWhBLvG9g3SkxQgGwYms5adY8Idd9CitChsW3sSGw0zLn6ioRJ_AGq-ivk7Kj4AUS1NRPRsb_D3-kX8_GI7-ovUqAy2KbelUEg7e0mcF3cQTv98grDQVx2fS1cr4L0BdhnyUsWs3aFF2ATqG7Zrr9kA0tHpUmGzW_DZ-h0zwb-ny_KwZSBrfkYSIye45XS2tOptV8NegXkDXxk_w%3D "Eric Burlison for Congress")

**It 's hard to believe, but this is what's happening in America's armed forces today:**

\- If you've ever taken ADHD medication, you're _**INELIGIBLE**_ to serve.

\- But if you're a man who thinks you're a woman, not only can you join the military, but _**the U.S. government will pay for your sex change surgery.**_

This is madness, and it's a direct attack on the strength and readiness of our military.

The Radical Left has infiltrated every corner of our armed forces with their woke ideology, prioritizing political agendas _**OVER**_ the safety and security of our nation.

This isn't about defending America anymore--_**it 's about pushing the Left's narrative at all costs.**_

This has to stop.

We need to put an end to the insanity, restore common sense, and refocus our military on what it was built for: **_defending this country, not funding social experiments._**
Can I count on you to help me DEFEND our military?
**[YES](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3f8f62062a5b41aea7ccb5a4d8a632b8&_m=cee7cabd7cce454a9da0370f5d7ddac5&_e=VD7n01q2aeUCgH6q4LpSjND-zixZacL16hPPRrQX2JfV0qLOCknmp5ydFsvbdQN1SDb8RXC84ULi6YeAnbDOBxNC6M-z0hWHQai_gcVt772n7ryE4L7-_I9HcxuROS0OtQhZgogd6WhQ0OpIo_h8xzScKOAzRXTjkQDdCTlHaC8breOL3EcC4w7FWHOVLRMiSBlkzNWe5nEtprmC43avKnKAs6SfWhBLvG9g3SkxQgGwYms5adY8Idd9CitChsW3XcwONIVz1kwFZ-ahj6c96CL5S01wf-Dzd7ZbJF4J04hLhfka5SF4PTHEXOAHFAjVpez9lXYUKcmQB9cG4ZuPYbOq4BsZQrze28_1XKgd9j6ugQdPibhptF4M3kLeoCP1ZJyxqfbcDCnqq43dG2LHVpc9ya01VOvhVKy6I9TwT-M%3D)**** [ NO](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3f8f62062a5b41aea7ccb5a4d8a632b8&_m=cee7cabd7cce454a9da0370f5d7ddac5&_e=VD7n01q2aeUCgH6q4LpSjND-zixZacL16hPPRrQX2JfV0qLOCknmp5ydFsvbdQN1SDb8RXC84ULi6YeAnbDOBxNC6M-z0hWHQai_gcVt772n7ryE4L7-_I9HcxuROS0OtQhZgogd6WhQ0OpIo_h8xzScKOAzRXTjkQDdCTlHaC8breOL3EcC4w7FWHOVLRMiSBlkzNWe5nEtprmC43avKnKAs6SfWhBLvG9g3SkxQgGwYms5adY8Idd9CitChsW3Tfd6WnBZ_OfyYlget1MoH8eHb_0w1q_aKC3gv3ulAG38mInuRGJJ23D7bIQqfVEw7XGnQ3MMNJwQzA0y1tfBXL4cxQlyxvrSoSLmx2CkSkOCLifgTT4Reaezij8Tca-nZ6BPkZI-vX11XeNLb1IzFtSLPQKgDnfYTlOnPl1lCZc%3D)**
I'm standing up in Congress to fight back against this attack on our troops, our values, and our country. But I can't do it alone.

**I 'm calling on 50,000 America First Patriots to stand with me and help stop the Radical Left's woke infiltration of our military. **
[**STAND WITH OUR TROOPS** >>>](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3f8f62062a5b41aea7ccb5a4d8a632b8&_m=cee7cabd7cce454a9da0370f5d7ddac5&_e=VD7n01q2aeUCgH6q4LpSjND-zixZacL16hPPRrQX2JfV0qLOCknmp5ydFsvbdQN1SDb8RXC84ULi6YeAnbDOBxNC6M-z0hWHQai_gcVt772n7ryE4L7-_I9HcxuROS0OtQhZgogd6WhQ0OpIo_h8xzScKOAzRXTjkQDdCTlHaC8breOL3EcC4w7FWHOVLRMiSBlkzNWe5nEtprmC43avKnKAs6SfWhBLvG9g3SkxQgGwYms5adY8Idd9CitChsW3IfaLNZvDsdt95wHFoJZf67PVz7MlCUa5FV4bAtorTdPZJkT1Vq-DbzZBnRQlb2FyOc3wF4vNDV3tEyFm-o5BT2AseIz0JeCpAVFUQ2ia8dUu2n3z1Igs8osO3VRumHDC5ekQ5mbcpD_3nR2pgyspKAbCF3m2zQyTZdJ64d2xtTs%3D)
