name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Why we need Christian attorneys
body:
Most Christians don’t realize this...| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c120571a8b234326becec23298ad7e5e&_e=E73jCdHAB-_yrtKifaJ5aY4r3U7gjevx8DgkZKglzmnzWmnQuqkRHLahvfOaJ86cmENaGA1rOwntv9lLSCdzmLrtFzS2e5bT2NzBSjEYe2MvCNtUGOQO5MHz4Ra2tqM1IXrJGdOblYipi5sbTf1w2QO2_icSfbGCjwArUqZo0eosx3N14rdZbA-aoVK5aSOFrggeEIEPX7Qk-u8v8NEuMwIAZMqSiJwC5gVqAWQEhWZOwav6-W4XukmZy-a4VMj1wf45YqLnsKpxrv7ITVXV9-SAIqqOgNnFIuw-iXSdPl9uf1j8sHi_1vCxA7ydU51d)
---
Peter, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Peter, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c120571a8b234326becec23298ad7e5e&_e=E73jCdHAB-_yrtKifaJ5aY4r3U7gjevx8DgkZKglzmnzWmnQuqkRHLahvfOaJ86cmENaGA1rOwntv9lLSCdzmLrtFzS2e5bT2NzBSjEYe2MvCNtUGOQO5MHz4Ra2tqM1IXrJGdOblYipi5sbTf1w2QO2_icSfbGCjwArUqZo0eo98uU4vU8XVCsoGPt3Lfg2Bu9lWrtS3e2sm8_-5Wg7GfMiG9RHlWDHpphhp6GdKjHsyrLw8LC1fggGcT6bQGokbwUuaN1NBUOnoAgQyv1kMqKgpVaN6Jy8evUsuQGNCLzttdnGHINLVT1TUwzDPMVL)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c120571a8b234326becec23298ad7e5e&_e=E73jCdHAB-_yrtKifaJ5aY4r3U7gjevx8DgkZKglzmnzWmnQuqkRHLahvfOaJ86cmENaGA1rOwntv9lLSCdzmLrtFzS2e5bT2NzBSjEYe2MvCNtUGOQO5MHz4Ra2tqM1IXrJGdOblYipi5sbTf1w2QO2_icSfbGCjwArUqZo0eqW-jps6pi5pSF_KBvpVMQjwnt_PKfjW12qLQd60g48CfRevKXK0gh5lX4VJpvkObPH6_u0wuGIA6CwYYJuG7gTTBsZoOvjD9EtlkBEWBd1I9_GkyjZQtfpU3WrIzJ-mIo5N0n8GP-YKT8EoewhywBF)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Peter, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c120571a8b234326becec23298ad7e5e&_e=E73jCdHAB-_yrtKifaJ5aY4r3U7gjevx8DgkZKglzmnzWmnQuqkRHLahvfOaJ86cmENaGA1rOwntv9lLSCdzmLrtFzS2e5bT2NzBSjEYe2MvCNtUGOQO5MHz4Ra2tqM1IXrJGdOblYipi5sbTf1w2QO2_icSfbGCjwArUqZo0erjDOLcBw62IMpPyaZ05qBCjLVVwUOXezsNNKyoAaCptix5xGs1rnT2ZYoDqr5K6DzTAeseDgczdVS9s50b7OAj99mcV_fhEV-HlqXDrFJhhl9IYGDlqpRpBwcIL7m67G1dIBuvh1ZbDPV_ccDJPO_x)**_

Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c120571a8b234326becec23298ad7e5e&_e=E73jCdHAB-_yrtKifaJ5aY4r3U7gjevx8DgkZKglzmnzWmnQuqkRHLahvfOaJ86cmENaGA1rOwntv9lLSCdzmLrtFzS2e5bT2NzBSjEYe2MvCNtUGOQO5MHz4Ra2tqM1IXrJGdOblYipi5sbTf1w2QO2_icSfbGCjwArUqZo0eq_r1Be--9HxDuu3kUUlihMI_9ov1JEG_RKzTXLr6VOvq5v8taiO2h4uZ0KmuM_2pjMjZ_v3d9OAErSMBzmTwR1DXKe1kG1HyTtgjRdMQA_DkHPHJsURySuEQHCxV4jlNtOPBDC7ztwPuVEC2-Ii93m)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo

name: Center for American Liberty
subject: The Department of Education’s worst nightmare.
body:
Too inappropriate for X but not for young children in public schools seems to be the Department of Education’s position on pornography. | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fb9a9ea9e1fb4abd91b5a73df3ee5279&_e=B-dqdKcnFYPYn-fvtPEHkVnt7gMOGoob2vR6mFlCJupIzeJBjvvcZP0OThp1Rcs3f-ZrQaqusmb4fwP-O1uDYk3UJ102HrvM3IcfjholqPornb7fBdgvadoVn9DMW1Eut89E2kWV1hihW9QHW_lI9oyreLPwbKpYrDusBdTJNOF2Zm5knkIVHlfRMlm5XRlHTK1vmpE6tUqwXYjWao27C9yu70wyapdGCsGbcdbQhu58HYCC1AIQv-8pBVpwUqZ6SvO4JfHJmtiHoLyGdD-ssiWLpXs532oQIU9jYWTFo5Q0vysuW9UOYbrGQ0TLnZRlklDfV-L0rR3raai85hPElexiYUPeAfNyjsTJ1FNHeAabu_E_H1iC9Nwv-dYnXFOlene4YB8wrB0Ud3kKdLwrUw%3D%3D)
---

| | Peter, it's not every day I get to share that WE'RE SUING THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT! Let me be more specific -- we're suing the Biden Administration's Department of Education Secretary Miguel Cardona for censoring parents who dare to speak out against the left's sinister plan to hijack your child's mind. **[**And I'm asking you to sign this CITIZEN PROTEST in support of our newest lawsuit.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fb9a9ea9e1fb4abd91b5a73df3ee5279&_e=B-dqdKcnFYPYn-fvtPEHkVnt7gMOGoob2vR6mFlCJupIzeJBjvvcZP0OThp1Rcs3f-ZrQaqusmb4fwP-O1uDYk3UJ102HrvM3IcfjholqPornb7fBdgvadoVn9DMW1Eut89E2kWV1hihW9QHW_lI9oyreLPwbKpYrDusBdTJNOF2Zm5knkIVHlfRMlm5XRlHTK1vmpE6tUqwXYjWao27C9yu70wyapdGCsGbcdbQhu6S2l2lvMWbgM25YNgIj1BnwRi6Qtr4TXY397yT1vrg9H0W238V1MCU8dMfqmHxTaOOWvcwZEBqkBj-TwMejxbjOyDt4jrJQ2W53knetnXmbjSABcB_qsK5S89K5E_C11Bx4f67MNM_ZaUnmriG1eFOTlz5Wfn1E8IrK6-l98ycJw%3D%3D)** Please let me explain...Our client, Nicole Solas, is a courageous mother of two from Rhode Island. She refused to blindly trust that the leftists running her children's school had their best interests at heart -- so she requested to view the curriculum being taught in her child's _**kindergarten**_ class.Nicole quickly learned the only way to find out what's really going on in schools is to file public records requests -- and it cost her $74,000 in fees just to obtain public records that should be readily available to parents!Worse, the teachers' union SUED Nicole to try to stop the school district from providing her with the curriculum and public records she requested.Peter, you're probably wondering _what is the school district hiding?_ Well, Nicole did not back down. She did not waver. **And now, she's exposing the pornographic materials educators use _in the classroom_ to sexualize young children.**No child should be exposed to pornography -- but we're specifically talking about a kindergarten curriculum. Little 5 and 6-year-old children! _Is this what you want for your kids or grandkids?_ I have an 8-year-old daughter and a 4-year-old son, and just thinking about this makes me sick -- so __**[**I hope you can see why I'm asking you to sign this CITIZEN PROTEST right now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fb9a9ea9e1fb4abd91b5a73df3ee5279&_e=B-dqdKcnFYPYn-fvtPEHkVnt7gMOGoob2vR6mFlCJupIzeJBjvvcZP0OThp1Rcs3f-ZrQaqusmb4fwP-O1uDYk3UJ102HrvM3IcfjholqPornb7fBdgvadoVn9DMW1Eut89E2kWV1hihW9QHW_lI9oyreLPwbKpYrDusBdTJNOF2Zm5knkIVHlfRMlm5XRlHTK1vmpE6tUqwXYjWao27C9yu70wyapdGCsGbcdbQhu6YXJblNLGE7KVS_xge-SEFUKYBc3moPTyFDvUcEcyrQ7qywFtvTqY19mC_pMuSz0SlgbNJH5hp10E8R55ec0P-1DS6hVhSc16ak7b7Qkq2mu0KCtde7JBZBTznsRstd9JqixXuD5SbdFtY2J-2xGJNpJ7M7ZKmFas6UzmcuLugSw%3D%3D)** Because believe it or not, this story gets worse... name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: 🗞️ Hey team, here’s some good news for your Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hey friend, we’re excited to share some good news with you today:
**This election cycle, we endorsed 341 gun safety candidates for office, and 86% of these candidates won their races.**
What’s more is that over 70% percent of these endorsed candidates were women, people of color, or LGBTQ+.
This is a big deal, and we hope you’re as proud of these statistics as we are.
We know how disappointing the outcome of the presidential election was, but we wanted you to know that regardless of that result, we still elected hundreds of gun safety champions up and down the ballot this year.
We never, ever could have had this success without the help of grassroots supporters like you. Thank you so much.
Of course, the work ahead isn’t going to be easy. But as Gabby always says, the fights worth having rarely are.
[**If you’re ready to help us keep making gun safety progress in 2025 and beyond, will you please make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241207-1-b&t=1&akid=9575%2E3935704%2EyO1FWc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec24.YP__Dn&amount=3&refcode=em241207-1-b&t=20&akid=9575%2E3935704%2EyO1FWc)**

| | Dear Fellow American,

My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I serve as president of Hillsdale College. I'm writing to you today because you're a concerned American who keeps up with current events.

That means you know something is seriously wrong in too many of our nation's schools.

You know a fierce ideological battle is raging in classrooms across the country, and our children are at risk.

**This is no accident.**

The far-Left, guided by a Marxist vision of a radically transformed society, has strategically targeted education, including K-12 classrooms across America.

That's why I'm asking you to complete the **NATIONAL OPINION SURVEY ON THE MARXIST HIJACKING OF AMERICAN EDUCATION.**

You can take your survey at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/marxist-hijacking-of-american-education-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ab8efa53bdb24803a1c8aa95052c23e4&_e=v3KE1OWhZymr4wYbgT4Q-5u9HZ5EKsuFkPZqyryVOUTqIxNTghRUojAul-pFmABQ9DxH1W9Xry7ARlnzkQfet3BAdH4yMM6-MZC-MpDE-eYqGiB25TwXe9FLOEVcknwt9wlIvO4K-KTQ0Ckr8hyMjHBkSJhL-LAfh4sahAheG8OQKJSjHVliETNCZxi2obokxjhJM92t8isqXPDfHkfB8TLQpHtyJwmkM-j8lPSd2qIGIZsVRq94vb2FGFKeB3SqCgpGPATA3Ge_dWn0Avjm_KV2oblAo0rjMj4dZLthwojSBC_lPTH5b-5M3GbBbrfoXww-SZYt5LtvoMa-EgrVNVk6jVct56Q9i5bX1LqTHYRk3NOPQAKbl_K2CBeO_rtfMgZW2hxrRZeuCkmHon57j7tx46KNLP1Ce9yjpqS9JliV-KMN5l43L7V_QH9LausO)

Thank you in advance.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| | Peter, yes Republicans have a trifecta, but their House majority is SLIM – _and we know how to fight it_. When I came into office in 2023, I came into a divided House of Representatives. A House gridlocked by partisanship and a far right with only one goal in mind: to further the MAGA agenda. I didn’t let that hamper my work in Congress. Instead, I allowed that to fuel me. To fuel my fight against fascism. To fuel my mission of progress for working families. To fuel my organizing of young people across the country. **So while this isn’t the outcome any of us wanted, it’s nothing that we’re _not_ prepared for. ** Instead, I’m even more fired up. I’m ready to fight even harder, to mobilize even more young voters in time for the next election. And that fight starts now. clean_body: | | | Peter, yes Republicans have a trifecta, but their House majority is SLIM – and we know how to fight it. When I came into office in 2023, I came into a divided House of Representatives. A House gridlocked by partisanship and a far right with only one goal in mind: to further the MAGA agenda. I didn’t let that hamper my work in Congress. Instead, I allowed that to fuel me. To fuel my fight against fascism. To fuel my mission of progress for working families. To fuel my organizing of young people across the country. So while this isn’t the outcome any of us wanted, it’s nothing that we’re not prepared for. Instead, I’m even more fired up. I’m ready to fight even harder, to mobilize even more young voters in time for the next election. And that fight starts now. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Ask Biden to pardon more people while he still can:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Pardoning his son, while other fathers and loved ones are left behind is wrong. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWX118CvuM13gOte0ypoklwMQq0lkxVrm3hYZv5Iz3XtfHcACxwBujXU53-wl3dURoHdyxbxIoXkjEla-h-Li8vDd33ecx7EKTcDXpY4Om9seggPCAM7TheEHfv61X-0jtW1UfC3-mBkiENQvUFhRUEl25Cvby6MJuM0J7Z-UJEaP3lovRlpYNY7GjMBZcFk-g5hdSedcsGR2c6nspe5cQTg/4c3/Pvuwv3XeRGGvwVjT43SgrA/h0/h001.vcI-fOB77EuKPcAMDn8jBQTxrj7SGhtrlINaheJfYNI)
---
Friend, After President Biden recently pardoned his son, I am joining the call by grassroots groups and my colleagues in Congress to urge him to pardon thousands more people in his last months in office. Our community's fathers, brothers, mothers and loved ones deserve to be pardoned and join their families. They may not have a President as their father, but still deserve the same chance. Pardons restore people’s rights, reunite families, and start to address unjust sentences and mass incarceration. President Biden can pardon anyone in federal prison, about 90% of whom are serving time for non-violent offenses. I want to lift up the group Unified U.S. Deported Veterans’ request for President Biden to sign 25 pending requests to**pardon undocumented U.S. veterans who served our country. They grew up in the United States, and when I met them, I was brought to tears hearing how they were ripped from their families and the only community they knew.** It's a shame that our country has abandoned and deported them after their service for minor infractions like marijuana use. After sacrificing and being willing to lay down their lives for the U.S. military, they deserve better than being left behind and separated from their communities. [**Can you add your name to ask President Biden to pardon more people while he has the chance, including veterans at risk of deportation?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5d-QvZCtV-awj_iMOT_-4mM4pIuECjJosR-GXN9HDAe71mqs_IEsaYD4g0EYWRaaf2Mq8bydGn2HtK4ndF8KcJUBITDYVCsGDFYLzNjdqRGjzH9B-cL5AsI5B78BB0PJMYwhmQLBlc-43TTAmBXJ4tCzHVR7ppZn5qgf4DpkJat3l-v6ybdOV_1gjUuqopelMhS5Axuo3sAGTjI56WVlWY8CC36teLqMOrWmsc2sV0LZz50kVzAvQygtUOPEviXsOuCBES23T_166Q7TMT1Q8cf2MgHI-t6y1xZSazXlZR6XMQBIkQwsfqSNbtfIAXSge0WEZZUXX6CjKFSVgFRyQ77cT-EZlPyeSA1CmkqmtDlsRh47MqmpTMtO5hXJc1XbEpTqjH3YHRHUPu_EE8ri_FQ/4c3/Pvuwv3XeRGGvwVjT43SgrA/h1/h001.09GuZqFLZbp6_TyCJPNP8yPunlDaXMNg5RutFzGOibE) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5d-QvZCtV-awj_iMOT_-4mM4pIuECjJosR-GXN9HDAe71mqs_IEsaYD4g0EYWRaaf2Mq8bydGn2HtK4ndF8KcJUBITDYVCsGDFYLzNjdqRGj8Pz8hpO3s2EV8hC-u_5nPsBtTNH7x2NukAP-1VDjjl7KUhadItqf3fZIJDx1KrEE753jGLkBWwtNszTHiclPQDAc9PE3nrws7vk2OCSZ6NExzJOhToeNp1Cvxe-9UlMSNHseg_rOlEBDng19TaIyHApYI3wJ7edyetzjce4w3XBAz8woWweGJry8PMMveKmU4zmnNwnCRfqIz3HZih8CzNnnJH4axhen04-DqfcN_YMWiYt6uB5W4iwX3Tjuvml9cuHG1mLsQH1xBKwPzct0_0f8sxEjo-J2qthAd8gbFhg/4c3/Pvuwv3XeRGGvwVjT43SgrA/h2/h001.7OdOvG2UW1daj7LE6XDZ8h3hiMiS40P3UO2S9pU37LE)

There are more people President Biden can pardon right now:
I recently joined more than 65 members of Congress urging President Biden to use his pardon powers to issue pardons to people who’ve been unjustly imprisoned, people on death row, elderly and chronically ill people, and women who were punished for defending themselves against their abusers.
Grassroots groups and Congresspeople have also called for President Biden to use his clemency powers to free 3,000 people serving time for marjiuana-related charges (as he pledged and has done for a few people so far) and free the longest-serving U.S. political prisoner, Native activist Leonard Peltier.
Since Trump has announced plans to speed up killing the 40 people on federal death row, there’s a narrow opportunity to save lives and clear all of these people before Trump takes office.
[**Please add your name to ask President Biden to pardon more people in his last few months of office, including veterans, people on death row, elderly and chronically ill people, and people with marijuana-related charges.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5d-QvZCtV-awj_iMOT_-4mM4pIuECjJosR-GXN9HDAe71mqs_IEsaYD4g0EYWRaaf2Mq8bydGn2HtK4ndF8KcJUBITDYVCsGDFYLzNjdqRGj33KonEoy5WR0LNhwkzLQRhIZpGF16ngVW3pPIyTVLatj31KNTxVNyK06nRV4Gtxqbn6P1lUWS0G8LSIqQ4B3yLFiGOwW-jZKRkyxBEMWTTAdEOYNUA2Jbc_8zXbFVu8BZ8WwhW-2e_mP0per5nxF-CWM689bMpGwAFIdfLDHoNv9CwJKarrCXwhIm8OeztKUULKKrJaHNOmmgiNc3eUzPXjk2MQgJtTrlikyD4UupnmghZRDQhTX0D7IgxiBuPrOjtTL6HHawI5ENk98GQbd98r6VWZuZ0g1a7hHWTaInow/4c3/Pvuwv3XeRGGvwVjT43SgrA/h3/h001.APXTh5sZTimJQSn2ci1LZws-X3BxLq0dI1JYoEaCGWk)
Thank you for taking action to address injustices in our criminal-legal system. Together, we will keep fighting for a humane immigration system and for true public safety, not over-criminalization or mass incarceration.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: Pardoning his son, while other fathers and loved ones are left behind is wrong. | | | Friend, After President Biden recently pardoned his son, I am joining the call by grassroots groups and my colleagues in Congress to urge him to pardon thousands more people in his last months in office. Our community's fathers, brothers, mothers and loved ones deserve to be pardoned and join their families. They may not have a President as their father, but still deserve the same chance. Pardons restore people’s rights, reunite families, and start to address unjust sentences and mass incarceration. President Biden can pardon anyone in federal prison, about 90% of whom are serving time for non-violent offenses. I want to lift up the group Unified U.S. Deported Veterans’ request for President Biden to sign 25 pending requests topardon undocumented U.S. veterans who served our country. They grew up in the United States, and when I met them, I was brought to tears hearing how they were ripped from their families and the only community they knew. It's a shame that our country has abandoned and deported them after their service for minor infractions like marijuana use. After sacrificing and being willing to lay down their lives for the U.S. military, they deserve better than being left behind and separated from their communities. | There are more people President Biden can pardon right now: I recently joined more than 65 members of Congress urging President Biden to use his pardon powers to issue pardons to people who’ve been unjustly imprisoned, people on death row, elderly and chronically ill people, and women who were punished for defending themselves against their abusers. Grassroots groups and Congresspeople have also called for President Biden to use his clemency powers to free 3,000 people serving time for marjiuana-related charges (as he pledged and has done for a few people so far) and free the longest-serving U.S. political prisoner, Native activist Leonard Peltier. Since Trump has announced plans to speed up killing the 40 people on federal death row, there’s a narrow opportunity to save lives and clear all of these people before Trump takes office. Thank you for taking action to address injustices in our criminal-legal system. Together, we will keep fighting for a humane immigration system and for true public safety, not over-criminalization or mass incarceration. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. You can learn more about the group Unified U.S. Deported Veterans at . Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Did you hear, team?
Oxford Dictionary’s Word of 2024 is:
# Brain Rot
_“the supposed deterioration of a person’s mental or intellectual state, especially viewed as the result of overconsumption of material.”_
Seems like the MAGA playbook is to say as many incendiary things to overwhelm, frustrate, and exhaust us — _but we cannot succumb to brain rot._
We are in for tough fights ahead with a Trump administration and Republican majorities in the Congress. Trump is building a cabinet to enact his Project 2025 agenda from separating families via mass deportation, abolishing the Department of Education, banning abortions nationwide, and more. _Our freedoms are on the line and in more danger than ever before._
Nevada families need us to be ready to fight for their rights against the worst of Trump and Project 2025. We spent nearly all our money in the leadup to the 2024 Election and curing ballots. We need to reset for the legislative battle coming up and make critical early investments in the ground game that will take back the Governorship and finalize abortion rights in our state constitution in 2026. _That work starts right now._

clean_body: | | | | Did you hear, team? Oxford Dictionary’s Word of 2024 is: Brain Rot “the supposed deterioration of a person’s mental or intellectual state, especially viewed as the result of overconsumption of material.” Seems like the MAGA playbook is to say as many incendiary things to overwhelm, frustrate, and exhaust us — but we cannot succumb to brain rot. We are in for tough fights ahead with a Trump administration and Republican majorities in the Congress. Trump is building a cabinet to enact his Project 2025 agenda from separating families via mass deportation, abolishing the Department of Education, banning abortions nationwide, and more. Our freedoms are on the line and in more danger than ever before. Nevada families need us to be ready to fight for their rights against the worst of Trump and Project 2025. We spent nearly all our money in the leadup to the 2024 Election and curing ballots. We need to reset for the legislative battle coming up and make critical early investments in the ground game that will take back the Governorship and finalize abortion rights in our state constitution in 2026. That work starts right now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | LFG, NV Dems The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. I'm often asked to provide calls to action on how to protect our human rights. Please act by sending one of 1500 needed letters to Texas elected officials by December 10.
* * *
### Protect Climate Before Trump Enters Office
In 2021 the Texas grid collapse led to dozens of deaths statewide. Help us raise awareness, especially if you're in Texas, to demand Texas invest in renewables to prevent such deadly collapses in the future. **We need 1500 signatures ASAP**.
**Click & Email Electeds --> [INVEST IN RENEWABLES AND PROTECT THE GRID](https://substack.com/redirect/6cf1fa4b-583d-465a-8dd7-78aa89e129d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
### Last Call For Coffee Before The Holiday
Last month I announced a new coffee company, Grounds for Peace, that is ethical and invests in humanitarian causes. Your response has been incredible! So, if you're looking for a fun holiday gift, please order by December 8 to ensure it arrives in time for Christmas. **-- > [ORDER YOUR GROUNDS FOR PEACE COFFEE](https://substack.com/redirect/0328278d-4452-4cce-8ef0-0ebe5fce1375?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I showed this chart to fellow Democrats in Congress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need to get back to our roots as a party for the working class.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241207-4570-footer&t=1&akid=4570%2E420207%2E7W951-)
Democrats are losing the working class, Peter.
I’m not trying to be an alarmist, but that’s what the data shows after this year’s election. Take a look at this chart that I shared with some fellow Democrats in Congress:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241207?refcode=em20241207-4570&amount=3&refcode2=4570_420207_7W951-&akid=4570%2E420207%2E7W951-)
**We need to get back to our roots as a party for the working class, and I need your help to make that happen.** [**If you can, please pitch in $3 to my campaign today, and read on for more details on the work ahead.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241207?refcode=em20241207-4570&amount=3&refcode2=4570_420207_7W951-&akid=4570%2E420207%2E7W951-)
This year we lost many voters who are typically considered part of our base, and this wasn’t the first time in recent years that’s happened. Aside from losing all of the swing states, every state besides my home state of Washington shifted redder this year.
There’s no way around it: This happened because Democrats were seen as defenders of a broken status quo. Poor and working people – our base who have long been taken for granted – are angry (rightfully so) with a system that is rigged against them. Meanwhile, Donald Trump promised to blow up the system.
Part of it was the fact that too many Democrats embraced wealthy donors instead of committing to get big money out of politics. Many working class voters were left with the impression that we wouldn’t stand up to corporate interests.
**So despite this year’s setbacks, there is a clear path forward: We need to rebuild our brand and people’s belief that we are on the side of poor and working people.**
Over the next four years, we need to be both an opposition party to Trump’s chaos and cruelty, but also a proposition party that has a clear, bold economic agenda. We need to lead on health care, getting big money out of politics, and more.
Just look at the ballot initiatives that passed with big majorities in states where Trump won. We saw multiple Trump states vote to raise the minimum wage, protect abortion rights, implement paid sick leave, and more.
An agenda focused on supporting poor and working people is clearly popular. We just need to rebuild voters’ trust and belief that Democrats will actually deliver on that agenda when we get the chance.
I’m doing everything I can to make that happen, Peter, but I need your help. I don’t take corporate PAC money, which means supporters like you are crucial to powering this movement.
[**Will you pitch in $3 or any amount you can today to help us rebuild the Democratic Party as a party that’s truly for poor and working class people?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241207?refcode=em20241207-4570&amount=3&refcode2=4570_420207_7W951-&akid=4570%2E420207%2E7W951-)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241207?amount=3&refcode=em20241207-4570&refcode2=4570_420207_7W951-&akid=4570%2E420207%2E7W951-)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241207-4570-footer&t=2&refcode2=4570_420207_7W951-&akid=4570%2E420207%2E7W951-)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4570%2E420207%2E7W951-)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4570%2E420207%2E7W951-)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Most Christians don’t realize this…
body:
Why we need Christian attorneys| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=64df3a6878804c478b819757d2c422cc&_e=yCzEXrXMVM3nQvM8OVYa6slLwk5tt1lij3xjUDSK5XgHtVSdvxEFmf1sZI7JMSWwMl_cTdRKIPra_EixYxYq3F9oY1t8dW2l5wmQ9b0VXPyYA2XF8k4gzZBaa4ZlVm7PSxjoqNiFaJtl9JFGAXGrcqTR3h-nE-IQvQEbbDci_Tv6hq1dbKhFaP7twWCkh0oay4rqWFjKdWZEXC8yB90KdRBjGwPvlq0sBK2nDFWVaptAwcULz4aWaN8NIdEHzI_l8UjMhTprlsSFhaDQqLMA5bHfvQ96tYcgeh-T8SHZ1hT0qxPBl9AKFzSjMvEYFfOD)
---
Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Friend, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=64df3a6878804c478b819757d2c422cc&_e=yCzEXrXMVM3nQvM8OVYa6slLwk5tt1lij3xjUDSK5XgHtVSdvxEFmf1sZI7JMSWwMl_cTdRKIPra_EixYxYq3F9oY1t8dW2l5wmQ9b0VXPyYA2XF8k4gzZBaa4ZlVm7PSxjoqNiFaJtl9JFGAXGrcqTR3h-nE-IQvQEbbDci_TsuiFgq4sVkmUHK614GP7wR3hQZZvrt_V7ganNPmuM9HRwxtDpdYjZlF8O22H3ya6mTHJxH5W9J-gLd0QrV3eBgVWkxPb6YVWibLhUa_ipWVfNPUqhf5dYFBHVhPYT8jT1elP5ZDBbJwVx4TZsLqNFI)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=64df3a6878804c478b819757d2c422cc&_e=yCzEXrXMVM3nQvM8OVYa6slLwk5tt1lij3xjUDSK5XgHtVSdvxEFmf1sZI7JMSWwMl_cTdRKIPra_EixYxYq3F9oY1t8dW2l5wmQ9b0VXPyYA2XF8k4gzZBaa4ZlVm7PSxjoqNiFaJtl9JFGAXGrcqTR3h-nE-IQvQEbbDci_Ts41Ur-w74UYi-OhQmEyjQkCjTQPbeNck0CkODarUtp673kT6NdBMLNYmBtRmfjuoxJTEyvZDVQrRR5AvoRaB5Yx98wVi2YjdpnWwDiinQmOs3M-64HeU49_1eoVcvkW6lyM5dvjZ8PSDW028lS3iPG)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Friend, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=64df3a6878804c478b819757d2c422cc&_e=yCzEXrXMVM3nQvM8OVYa6slLwk5tt1lij3xjUDSK5XgHtVSdvxEFmf1sZI7JMSWwMl_cTdRKIPra_EixYxYq3F9oY1t8dW2l5wmQ9b0VXPyYA2XF8k4gzZBaa4ZlVm7PSxjoqNiFaJtl9JFGAXGrcqTR3h-nE-IQvQEbbDci_TtMbRla2DWdqQf0NRySy-ngfWMg6-sFLOxzTcYeSH78mH9KSx-NqmCSZ5Cl6c9iusO5kflJ4jyDtZXEoIvQbFyiHdafrY_yJr_yORKlhv2Owjqkn7HcHlpFnaBeeR2-zF1qCHXNH562wlNNXckhpCsx)**_

clean_body: Why we need Christian attorneys| | | Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states. That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of personal prayer without getting fired, protection of moral conscience so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a Christian student club --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! Friend, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state. For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change. Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to: discourage or punish attorneys from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke"); stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches, sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious; prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work to defend religious freedom on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values! Friend, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work. Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society. Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo Executive Director & CEO Christian Legal Society Christian Legal Society P.O. Box 7712 McLean, VA 22106-7712

body:

[ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=66f692fd6fb744d7a79510f553ab1058&_e=lRkgS4W8a0REnuGl6yDAk3_c_NnbcPJ_zKYK1aHzTDMtpZaaRmzmtQ0ZfAuXZhjHJHOC8v1n5uH-4bRoBtF73YQw8BBvA_YfHwwfD55QMtrJxU-s0ZwagmOvZRJ9It5oqECWaJGZpLMlbYkJ7-dd4VP2q2uQI0eYsqLEtEE_lbjOP1BIQLEJ9dlD_M-2FkO6D4Yfqetqmr8VyQ6XjLfWqnIREeliv2VztfQPjzAj1L4kGdttO_wpm3UvUEjR7PC2Kp-gb6lqDAPpsjsFwLhQ5EG2Z0oT8pGSKgZt0-To6k4MHJ7yJCMs2BXxOjFfdkLfEyQ97wn0d0O31J7MInuRL_x0_Se-hjnPR7yeXQcp2Wg%3D)
#
Friend of Life,

My name is Lila Rose. I'm the founder and president of Live Action.

Today Live Action is the online, educational leader of the pro-life movement. We reach millions of Americans each month--changing minds and hearts and saving lives.

I wanted to alert you about a growing threat to preborn babies, one that is contributing to the growth in abortion numbers this year.

That's right. Even though _Roe v. Wade_ is gone, abortion rates are _growing_ instead of decreasing. Reports say that a preborn child in the United States now loses its life every 31 seconds.

And, corporate America has decided to jump on board and expand the killing.

**You see, at least 114 big corporations are paying --often pressuring--their female employees to fly to pro-abortion "sanctuary" states like California to kill their preborn children.**

Corporations like Amazon, Nike, Uber, Target, Disney, Starbucks, Sony, eBay, CVS, Apple, Bank of America, and 103 others are offering women $4,000, $5,000, $10,000, or unlimited "travel" and "lodging" to go abort their children.

It's beyond sickening.

Killing a baby is cheaper for businesses than maternity leave. Bosses can get the mother back to work faster. This is calculated evil, sugarcoated as "affirming" and "healthcare."

Corporate America should _help mothers_ embrace the lives of their children, not pressure them to have them killed!

**[Will you give $50 right now to help save at least one baby from this corporate greed?](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=66f692fd6fb744d7a79510f553ab1058&_e=lRkgS4W8a0REnuGl6yDAk3_c_NnbcPJ_zKYK1aHzTDMtpZaaRmzmtQ0ZfAuXZhjHJHOC8v1n5uH-4bRoBtF73YQw8BBvA_YfHwwfD55QMtrJxU-s0ZwagmOvZRJ9It5oqECWaJGZpLMlbYkJ7-dd4VP2q2uQI0eYsqLEtEE_lbjOP1BIQLEJ9dlD_M-2FkO6D4Yfqetqmr8VyQ6XjLfWqlUXixD5qNJv17FM8fchmXPAr-ZTLKi8kF5mzBl8k_SnynoW-9h63L7Fk5ehFGXhP3omRwCGUHkc7KxapgK41rDf7JBaENcJ6Jg4UCNhyW0NJdpU8zr-exGNT6PVkiC4hpgpKJ9vWFpE4GfhVU3FOto%3D)** You will also spare parents a lifetime of loss and regret.

Your gift will reach parents moments away from an abortion decision with the truth they need to embrace life.

We discovered that spreading TRUTH in compelling and persuasive online videos is the single best tool to reach and compel millions of Americans, especially abortion-minded parents, and prevent abortions. Our videos include:
* Eye-opening facts about the humanity of a baby in the womb
* Raw, horrific truths about the abortion procedures
* Shocking details about the ugly, corrupt abortion industry

These high-quality videos change minds and hearts. 43% of those who follow Live Action say our content changed their position from pro-abortion to pro-life!

Your donation will also reach parents with _Window to the Womb_ , a state-of-the-art, Hollywood-quality, 3-D animated video showing the development of "Baby Olivia" from fertilization to birth.

**Some pregnancy resource centers share that 75% of abortion-minded women who view ultrasounds reject abortion.** One single mother sent us this note after viewing _Window to the Womb_ depicting "Baby Olivia":

"_I can barely pay the bills on time. . . . I was considering abortion for my 5th child, but after watching, I came back into the light and realized it would be so wrong to deprive a child of this wonderful thing we call life. Her name will be Olivia, too._"

We even developed an app to put the lifesaving truth of Window to the Womb at the fingertips of abortion-minded people on their cell phones.

But as long as corporate America keeps pouring millions of dollars of funding into abortion, we face an uphill battle. **That 's why we are looking for 79 courageous pro-life people in your state who are willing to give as little as $50 before midnight so that we can reach more parents with these videos before it's too late for their children.**

body:
We remain steadfastly focused on the fundamentals of our 10 Year Plan.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98331965/516309358/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NzcxZmIzLWJjYjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SDYkKBQFEXdLHHvxrukMeqmYyU7uBd1gboAiIhbLFfs=&emci=8032380a-1db4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a9771fb3-bcb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)

Peter, Like you, I am profoundly concerned about the incoming administration and what Republican control of the federal government means for our country. These results sting. Right now, lots of us are considering the most effective ways to use our time and energy to defend our democracy. At the NDRC, we have a tried-and-true strategy that’s delivered fairer maps and fairer representation, and we are ready to lean our weight into those efforts. As Executive Director of this organization, I may be biased, but I _truly_ think this is some of the most important work we can do during the incoming administration and leading up to the next nationwide redistricting cycle. Earlier this year, the NDRC published our 10 Year Plan with our strategic roadmap. We will refine our work as we continue to fully understand the changes and chances coming out of this year’s election results, but this election was just one part of the plan. We remain steadfastly focused on the fundamentals of our 10 Year Plan:
* **Best-in-class mapping:** The NDRC Geospatial Analytics Department will continue to lead the development of best-in-class mapping tools. Technology and the use of AI are changing the game rapidly, and our investments will ensure we have the best tools available to support the mapping and analysis of congressional and legislative redistricting plans for Democrats nationwide.
* **Electoral investment:** The NDRC and our affiliates have a strategic plan for political and electoral engagement throughout the decade, to build and shift power so that the right people are in the right places in advance of the next redistricting cycle. And looking ahead to 2025, we have opportunities such as state house elections in Virginia, a state supreme court seat up in Wisconsin, and three state supreme court seats up in Pennsylvania.
* **Grassroots mobilization and public education:** As we inch towards the 2030 Census, we need to continue to build our community of pro-democracy, fair maps supporters so we have the capacity we need to mobilize efforts that build toward fair redistricting.
* **Redistricting reform:** And of course, we’re committed to advancing reforms and policy changes where redistricting processes need improvement.

I deeply believe in the power of this organization and its supporters. I’m committed to doing everything I can to position the NDRC to be successful in ensuring fairness in our democracy. [**Are you with me? If so, please add your name here to recommit to the long-term fight for fairness.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98331967/516309360/2098600543?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_10yrPlan_email_20241207-NDRC-Tier1-10yrPlan_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20241207-NDRC-Tier1-10yrPlan_&utm_campaign=10yrPlan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NzcxZmIzLWJjYjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SDYkKBQFEXdLHHvxrukMeqmYyU7uBd1gboAiIhbLFfs=&emci=8032380a-1db4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a9771fb3-bcb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045) Together, we’ll ensure states with independent redistricting commissions run full and transparent processes that result in fair maps, call out elected officials who are working to draw bad maps, build and participate in a strong coalition that exemplifies fair map-drawing practices, and support legislation to support fair maps. We can do this. We have a smart plan, the right team, and a _truly_ remarkable community of supporters all across the country. [**So if you’re onboard — if you’re ready to get back to work — let me know by adding your name here.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98331969/516309362/2098600543?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_10yrPlan_email_20241207-NDRC-Tier1-10yrPlan_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20241207-NDRC-Tier1-10yrPlan_&utm_campaign=10yrPlan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NzcxZmIzLWJjYjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SDYkKBQFEXdLHHvxrukMeqmYyU7uBd1gboAiIhbLFfs=&emci=8032380a-1db4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a9771fb3-bcb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045) Thank you — and more soon. Marina Marina Jenkins

We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Never Fear Blackouts Again: Discover the 8-Pound Solar Generator that Defies Blackouts and Toxic Fumes!
body:
| | | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/d4730d8ad80a6da2ce7fab829667a2a3b7cd3b0f/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) here at any time.
---
| | |
---
December 7th, 2024
|
---
| | |
Why This Tiny Device Is Taking America by Storm | **– FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE –**
# AMERICA'S SECRET WEAPON AGAINST BLACKOUTS IS HERE
_This new breakthrough in solar technology protects millions of families against deadly power outages_ [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) **– IMPORTANT MESSAGE FROM –
FORMER NAVY SEAL** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ Millions of Americans know the truth. It's no longer a question of _IF_ disaster will strike – it's a matter of _WHEN_. The last few years have been a wake-up call. A pandemic brought the world to its knees. Blackouts plunged millions into darkness. Storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest, crumbling power grids, and even terrorist attacks have disrupted our lives in ways we never imagined. And in the chaos, families turned to gas generators for backup power, only to face deadly carbon monoxide poisoning during critical moments. This isn't fear-mongering. These are the facts. **Crisis Mode Is The New Normal** If you're reading this, you already know the truth. You see what's happening around you. And most importantly, you understand the need to protect your home and family. Let me be absolutely clear: The right backup power system isn't just a luxury – _**it's a lifeline.**_ **Prepare Now. Prepare Properly.** Imagine this: The power goes out. It's pitch black. In that split second, your entire reality shifts. Your critical devices – your phone, medical equipment, even the fridge holding your family's food – are now on borrowed time. You can't reach loved ones. Your home, your comfort, your _**safety**_ is suddenly in jeopardy. This isn't a hypothetical. It's what millions of families endured after recent hurricanes – some left without power for _**weeks**_. **Will You Be Ready?** When disaster strikes, the choices you’ve made in advance determine everything. Will you be vulnerable? Or will you be the one who stays strong and secure when others are scrambling? The right backup power solution can mean the difference between chaos and calm. Between fear and confidence. Between devastation and survival. You owe it to yourself and your family to be ready for anything. Because in a crisis, there are no second chances. _**"You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget."**_ Well now you can! Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889)
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) [**Order Today And Get $243 of FREE Gifts!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

Take action today. Protect what matters most. Ensure that when the lights go out, your home doesn't just survive – it thrives. Don't wait until it's too late. Equip yourself with the peace of mind you deserve. Click below to secure your backup power system now. [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere – very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ **We Can't Predict
The Future** It's impossible to know when the next blackout will hit. [**Claim your Patriot Power Sidekick now**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889), and we'll rush it to you right away, while we still have introductory stock. You'll be glad you did. Remember, your new Patriot Power Sidekick makes FREE electricity from the sun and charges faster than ever before. You could be at home, or in your RV, cabin, or undisclosed, completely off-the-grid location. It DOESN'T MATTER. And then rest assured knowing that you can power your phones, medical devices and more whether you're staying put or bugging out. Don't delay. **Skip Bedell On FOX & Friends Recommended The Patriot Power Sidekick As the Perfect Gift!** [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) _"You can keep it right in the house because there’s no fuel, no fumes, no exhaust. So this will power up your devices in case of an emergency. And it packs up into a really nice kit. This makes a fantastic gift."_ _Skip Bedell
FOX & Friends
_ To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) **CUSTOMERS LOVE THEIR PATRIOT POWER SIDEKICK!** **Rita L.**
"This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price." **Steve G.**
"Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable." **Thomas B.**
"Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning." **Jana H.**
"Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it." **Allan D.**
"Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!" **Chris S.**
"Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!" **Richard B.**
"Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!" **Frank S.**
"We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product." [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19310/6374453/5eac7888da95c72e0e121eeacf6687845d8b8115/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889)
---

| This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by **support@nationalgunowner.org**

514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US

[1-Click Unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/one_click_unsubscribe/19310/6374453/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) | [Edit Profile](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/edit_profile/19310/6374453/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) | [Manage Subscriptions](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/unsubscribe/19310/6374453/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) | [Report Spam](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/report_spam/19310/6374453/905e019ae1ac1d1299f0e55574fef271de014889) |
---|---|---

subject: Urgent Update: America's Secret Weapon Against Blackouts Is Here
body:
| | | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/d4730d8ad80a6da2ce7fab829667a2a3b7cd3b0f/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811) here at any time.
---
| | |
---
December 7th, 2024
|
---

# AMERICA'S SECRET WEAPON AGAINST BLACKOUTS IS HERE

And in the chaos, families turned to gas generators for backup power, only to face deadly carbon monoxide poisoning during critical moments. This isn't fear-mongering. And most importantly, you understand the need to protect your home and family. Let me be absolutely clear: The right backup power system isn't just a luxury – _**it's a lifeline.**_ **Prepare Now. Prepare Properly.** Imagine this: The power goes out. It's pitch black. In that split second, your entire reality shifts. Your critical devices – your phone, medical equipment, even the fridge holding your family's food – are now on borrowed time. You can't reach loved ones. Your home, your comfort, your _**safety**_ is suddenly in jeopardy. This isn't a hypothetical. It's what millions of families endured after recent hurricanes – some left without power for _**weeks**_. **Will You Be Ready?** When disaster strikes, the choices you’ve made in advance determine everything. Will you be vulnerable? Or will you be the one who stays strong and secure when others are scrambling? The right backup power solution can mean the difference between chaos and calm. Between fear and confidence. Between devastation and survival. You owe it to yourself and your family to be ready for anything. Because in a crisis, there are no second chances. _**"You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget."**_ Well now you can! Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/bce13b0e01ed0ee7118c864fa092ee2171bdf2f9/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811)
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/bce13b0e01ed0ee7118c864fa092ee2171bdf2f9/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811) [**YES! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/bce13b0e01ed0ee7118c864fa092ee2171bdf2f9/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811) [**Order Today And Get $243 of FREE Gifts!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/bce13b0e01ed0ee7118c864fa092ee2171bdf2f9/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

Take action today. Protect what matters most. Ensure that when the lights go out, your home doesn't just survive – it thrives. Don't wait until it's too late. Equip yourself with the peace of mind you deserve. Click below to secure your backup power system now. [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/bce13b0e01ed0ee7118c864fa092ee2171bdf2f9/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811) [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/bce13b0e01ed0ee7118c864fa092ee2171bdf2f9/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere – very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer_ **We Can't Predict
The Future** It's impossible to know when the next blackout will hit. [**Claim your Patriot Power Sidekick now**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/bce13b0e01ed0ee7118c864fa092ee2171bdf2f9/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811), and we'll rush it to you right away, while we still have introductory stock. You could be at home, or in your RV, cabin, or undisclosed, completely off-the-grid location. It DOESN'T MATTER. And then rest assured knowing that you can power your phones, medical devices and more whether you're staying put or bugging out. Don't delay. **Skip Bedell On FOX & Friends Recommended The Patriot Power Sidekick As the Perfect Gift!** [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/bce13b0e01ed0ee7118c864fa092ee2171bdf2f9/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811) _"You can keep it right in the house because there’s no fuel, no fumes, no exhaust. So this will power up your devices in case of an emergency. And it packs up into a really nice kit. This makes a fantastic gift."_ _Skip Bedell
FOX & Friends_ To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/bce13b0e01ed0ee7118c864fa092ee2171bdf2f9/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811) **CUSTOMERS LOVE THEIR PATRIOT POWER SIDEKICK!** **Rita L.**
"This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price." **Steve G.**
"Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable." **Thomas B.**
"Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning." **Jana H.**
"Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it." **Allan D.**
"Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!" **Chris S.**
"Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!" **Richard B.**
"Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!" **Frank S.**
"We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product." [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19307/6374453/bce13b0e01ed0ee7118c864fa092ee2171bdf2f9/f5b342e9d69f11a8449f9c73ea8cb77790ac3811)

name: John Fetterman
subject: This kind of stuff just turns politics into a game. 🙄

body:
It’s time to start focusing on real solutions to real problems for a change.
#
Derek, I’ve had enough of the sh*tty takes and the fake scandals.
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241207?refcode=em20241207-9666&refcode2=9666_434096_4t1_fS&akid=9666%2E434096%2E4t1_fS)
**Dumb insider-y takes have _nothing_ to do with real-life problems that working people are facing.**
This kind of stuff just turns politics into a game, and it helps *no one.* 🙄
It’s time to start focusing on real solutions to real problems for a change.
[**I’m trying to cut through the noise and fight for yinz every day. If you’re with me, please consider chipping in $5 or $10 to fuel my campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241207?refcode=em20241207-9666&refcode2=9666_434096_4t1_fS&akid=9666%2E434096%2E4t1_fS)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241207?amount=5&refcode=em20241207-9666&refcode2=9666_434096_4t1_fS&akid=9666%2E434096%2E4t1_fS)**
Thanks,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241207-9666-footer&t=1&refcode2=9666_434096_4t1_fS&akid=9666%2E434096%2E4t1_fS)**

It shouldn’t have to be said, but Congress has a responsibility to keep the government open so it can continue serving the American people.
We have 13 days before a partial government shutdown, and I’ll be working every minute from now through then to strike a deal on spending and avoid it. Congress needs to agree on military spending and natural disaster aid, two areas of critical importance.
Look, not everyone agrees. That’s just the nature of a democracy. But it’s times like these where we need our leaders to step up, listen, and come to a consensus.
What we do in the next 13 days will set the stage for how the next session of the House (with an even smaller GOP House Majority) will act. **I’m ready to get to work, and I hope you’ll support me in this fight.**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parade on Blues Clues?
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=290af33d58024c3094668070f8aafa25&_e=BNCBXJUnc7lvE50MkdQC5SW2rrMyJeU4UsbV_XAyZ0NhwqBt3422IStiT1biBSvFmGi4zZV64hTzYfYDTXJED04SiIrhz7s_w-ydl-8RuUoCc9LfyiQoSdsV-gZaPfqXEqPG8Ye-BmjanPKD-bsUs4t6wAaz9W_Qiw3HuX3QVaVzisWyvbPihLX95k_1tR3bFsv47olYMUjfmL_bpzOCGtNOAC41ysI6JYHF6bItK73p8peUB2Ao9DV1rq3V3mV6vBL13iDXVnlipZF8hhEOIK0z8BAfwb9jRv9bUs945Ch822aF63ktrIjS3CVDQ0T21BUAa6iHJFFi9nkyarnamhJbfoVq_HIN_GBtFadvD_cTvA_ErBzba0Ybk6MjqDS7J1sSC_uDRYUBLE1MwdWu9Q%3D%3D)

| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=290af33d58024c3094668070f8aafa25&_e=BNCBXJUnc7lvE50MkdQC5SW2rrMyJeU4UsbV_XAyZ0NhwqBt3422IStiT1biBSvFmGi4zZV64hTzYfYDTXJED04SiIrhz7s_w-ydl-8RuUoCc9LfyiQoSdsV-gZaPfqXEqPG8Ye-BmjanPKD-bsUs4t6wAaz9W_Qiw3HuX3QVaVzisWyvbPihLX95k_1tR3bFsv47olYMUjfmL_bpzOCGtNOAC41ysI6JYHF6bItK70js80OwXgNB9Xzxv0RkDvBBCLtHdGZTQz9PoljHBCThVTXS9ubd6b5SygcnJPRjO4bZ7hp8COhUpKqLBKZyyQrgbuNrqNKCO0qYGqOdHqIGgmovSjdgdxogtp39x0LD6d8WroFIWnfSTf83k0mzs9_E67zArVU2nputDmrAdjY1A%3D%3D)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=290af33d58024c3094668070f8aafa25&_e=BNCBXJUnc7lvE50MkdQC5SW2rrMyJeU4UsbV_XAyZ0NhwqBt3422IStiT1biBSvFmGi4zZV64hTzYfYDTXJED04SiIrhz7s_w-ydl-8RuUoCc9LfyiQoSdsV-gZaPfqXEqPG8Ye-BmjanPKD-bsUs4t6wAaz9W_Qiw3HuX3QVaVzisWyvbPihLX95k_1tR3bFsv47olYMUjfmL_bpzOCGtNOAC41ysI6JYHF6bItK71OzDtvd6RAyCOQfHjZ3CW9tZ815LGAt1IdyobjwyVFk9bV4c3I3j_QywdhMIR-7inTexCJzJOd9hy-hjJWlhXKCoDKYKoG-GPcp4sCtCuxShuyo_i90g6D3V9N6EpwHBRLslBy5GEa1JglQZRlyJokB40wl9Wm298GAtUhB4wXuQ%3D%3D) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.
