name: Pearl Harbor @ USO History
subject: Remembering the attack on Pearl Harbor …
body:
83 years have passed since the USO responded to the attacks at Pearl Harbor
[](https://www.uso.org)
[GIVE NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.)
USO Supporter,
The USO has always been committed to being there for our service members -- and it didn't take long for that commitment to be put to the test.
On Dec. 7, 1941 -- just 10 months after the USO was founded -- hundreds of Japanese fighters, bombers and torpedo planes launched a brutal surprise attack on unsuspecting Americans at Pearl Harbor that left more than 2,000 dead and 1,282 wounded.
In response to the devastation, the newly established USO quickly stepped up to meet the overwhelming needs of military families and civilians alike.
USO workers in Honolulu opened their doors for more than 1,000 displaced women and children, providing shelter, comfort and a sense of stability in the face of chaos. They organized efforts to reunite families, arranged housing and lifted spirits through music and moments of community.
Over the coming months, the USO's operations expanded rapidly to support the large influx of service members deployed to Hawaii and around the world. Today, we operate over 250 USO Centers worldwide that continue to keep military families connected and provide essential supplies and entertainment to those who serve.
We have never wavered in our commitment to support our military heroes -- and it's people like you who have made it possible for us to always remain steadfast in our mission.
**We hope our service members never face a tragedy like Pearl Harbor again. But no matter what challenges arise, thanks to supporters like you, the USO will always be there to stand by their side.**
Thank you for helping us always be there for those who serve.
--The USO
P.S. As a nonprofit organization, we rely on military supporters like you to help power our mission. **[Will you please make a tax-deductible gift of $29 or more now so we can continue our important work to support service members?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/LaXVHga0-NM-/dG13QlUwRVZ6UHRsUkFHcmFtOWN3MWg0YXI2YjUycVpvOGdsWXZ5OWpNK3RpVGUva3E0ay9qQ2lZRWxuYjM4RzA5S2lYZzVEK2czNUZlU1dyenpjTExDWk12KzVMeW5vQlhUZFFqRU9VZms9S0/dzg5bWRTNS9HeTFsSVQvUUphWmFTWnNTaVdTY09iOXhXRlpsczRKcnhwY2lJUDRJT2xHMUdnZ1dFWjMrMlhMdVFJSXZEeWJLT0tEQUhBUitNaTRKaXp4UndvK2tXOWh6S0)**

Top Democrat,

Last week, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to stand with Jack Smith after Trump said Smith should be thrown out of the country.

**But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed.** We’re still [17] signatures short of our goal!

[**Team, we can’t abandon Special Counsel Jack Smith. | | | **[
](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38vRmK7lMiKTroDaNcAayxOoBrU2y89A_W9qPUWhztplaGK13jQY4wQA7Q79GugmUg_X44ygKPLd29DiYhxFTttpeQ4bsywvYoa-zeLwHRp-UtaUy13JZ_OETGUzhq_WcaDo-u2WDzLUl7vyE3-SDYm2L0-VnT4uP7O3zMPYUi-5C_aQBHziqXmWQMR59nrXltdnRiGCz6dq-B_ktakhRTv7SA0I9HVp6S0Rpj69UCW5kDDZRqJAidVJDlFz4AbxLpTSHiYdlPyI1saGtKp6BL21Xen5TEB3kD8Muky0qjhgPlYHctd_0VNbFi9CtvDQ90JIUOnfXeMYlhzEijMMg76simQwzxJHubqRNO8dui8-roc0T9cAYpCrT7-f5l0DZh1B1GlLtCNtnEYbX2l2Bv2LkmfQzZxFu7xqIg0qSL3VRBsTHugHMGtfhW3iYMcpWcMIc38X6OQ7C9DMIeRO2F3bikA8shLWA8MEj-TuHNGQqFCZutyYANFJJHm7QbZczY/4c3/G_3T46oASmS4O19Sksk0vQ/h0/h001.XfIeSAzShGhYUS4MnG1Vcnk1u0lJH3zq6Yj9HBekBOk)[Join us and sign on to REJECT Islamophobia in the People's House!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38vRmK7lMiKTroDaNcAayxOoBrU2y89A_W9qPUWhztplaGK13jQY4wQA7Q79GugmUg_X44ygKPLd29DiYhxFTttpeQ4bsywvYoa-zeLwHRp-UtaUy13JZ_OETGUzhq_WcaDo-u2WDzLUl7vyE3-SDYm2L0-VnT4uP7O3zMPYUi-5C_aQBHziqXmWQMR59nrXltdnRiGCz6dq-B_ktakhRTv7SA0I9HVp6S0Rpj69UCW5kDDZRqJAidVJDlFz4AbxLpTSHiYdlPyI1saGtKp6BL21Xen5TEB3kD8Muky0qjhgFTOWSO-wko5ZMv8pRmT-6kinH7CzeZc5t_U7gZx_k9zpVIZfxw7NPbG3PdArJELdXmMaJ-vxgiN5AZWx98AbaVVedIdd7aIMzWtJjBBne7uWeSoLMww-LykNgFqaxPQN9HTc5TA5hfh2zTE1pAWTsFJdvrudGy8H5Mf8joLBTx6r7CDEv96vTWp2Y0Umm4R-M3XAQuCkDDZu02ZvoFUVr4/4c3/G_3T46oASmS4O19Sksk0vQ/h1/h001.tdkzYnG-MPOSPN3d0cXfFIo6xxVnP9ZNSbuMAwFYeYQ)
**
* * *
Recently, Florida state Sen. Randy Fine, a Trump-endorsed Republican running for a soon-to-be-vacant seat in the House of Representatives, threatened Congresswomen Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib, the only two Muslim women in the chamber. His message suggesting they “leave” was accompanied by the ominous hashtag “#BombsAway.” This is not only deeply troubling but also perpetuates Islamophobia. **We stand at a critical juncture where the values of respect and inclusivity are being challenged by divisive rhetoric.** **[We urge you to join us in signing a petition to condemn this Islamophobia and demand accountability.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38vRmK7lMiKTroDaNcAayxOoBrU2y89A_W9qPUWhztplaGK13jQY4wQA7Q79GugmUg_X44ygKPLd29DiYhxFTttpeQ4bsywvYoa-zeLwHRp-UtaUy13JZ_OETGUzhq_WcaDo-u2WDzLUl7vyE3-SDYm2L0-VnT4uP7O3zMPYUi-5C_aQBHziqXmWQMR59nrXltdnRiGCz6dq-B_ktakhRTv7SA0I9HVp6S0Rpj69UCW5kDDZRqJAidVJDlFz4AbxLpTSHiYdlPyI1saGtKp6BL21Xen5TEB3kD8Muky0qjhgFXnEEpebNm3RN0dt2835ci8JLo0O6QRgv2XeLKanzh-ONP8OXqpMCJOVHuxanoDbFfsywBq2A-kdPbyihJQxn4Tg-mY8LdruzTobU6--IHZYIbZZbf_4GQx6M-aZCybS9r-n6RQ9RdLKHx3n2oyjuvgwhVgNzghhXqThbJ1baL87USo-pOfHB6avKDtZM2AL2fvDmX6frVWojjncF0EAes/4c3/G_3T46oASmS4O19Sksk0vQ/h2/h001.HRh-EIQu82lLXRxpdEnwEO0BAWNqQ7V5DvA1kR29yO4)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38vRmK7lMiKTroDaNcAayxOoBrU2y89A_W9qPUWhztplaGK13jQY4wQA7Q79GugmUg_X44ygKPLd29DiYhxFTttpeQ4bsywvYoa-zeLwHRp-UtaUy13JZ_OETGUzhq_WcaDo-u2WDzLUl7vyE3-SDYm2L0-VnT4uP7O3zMPYUi-5C_aQBHziqXmWQMR59nrXltdnRiGCz6dq-B_ktakhRTv7SA0I9HVp6S0Rpj69UCW5kDDZRqJAidVJDlFz4AbxLpTSHiYdlPyI1saGtKp6BL21Xen5TEB3kD8Muky0qjhgByqHrirvyQVFoAKb65a-5xpuPMLBvFl-hzRfLLiBc2RpZql-2ZzV2QxWdA8u97tH2hBnzeMkEksouo2HfWvR9t-peWq-eU-pwgxjF3wwyUkVFa00j9B5kZyy-bVZL5myL2w6GPnRcZ7X2_y6B4ZsEux614uQoGlklQc1as9qY3rGLC38zySszgcNf8zHiPTE_SGLQ-OTFHZNYqttsVwlLY/4c3/G_3T46oASmS4O19Sksk0vQ/h3/h001.ux_Q-o9xait5PB51SRkEBw7sBiF8nGtOF46UTZmDj-0)
---
Fine's history of inflammatory remarks against Muslims, including calling President Biden "Jihad Joe" and making derogatory comments about Muslim holy sites, underscores a pattern of hate that cannot be ignored.
Such behavior is dangerous and undermines the principles of equality and justice that our nation strives to uphold.
**By standing together, we can send a powerful message that hate has no place in our society or our government.**
**[Let us advocate for a political environment that respects all individuals, regardless of their faith, and promotes unity over division. clean_body: | | | Recently, Florida state Sen. Randy Fine, a Trump-endorsed Republican running for a soon-to-be-vacant seat in the House of Representatives, threatened Congresswomen Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib, the only two Muslim women in the chamber. His message suggesting they “leave” was accompanied by the ominous hashtag “#BombsAway.” This is not only deeply troubling but also perpetuates Islamophobia. We stand at a critical juncture where the values of respect and inclusivity are being challenged by divisive rhetoric. | Fine's history of inflammatory remarks against Muslims, including calling President Biden "Jihad Joe" and making derogatory comments about Muslim holy sites, underscores a pattern of hate that cannot be ignored. Such behavior is dangerous and undermines the principles of equality and justice that our nation strives to uphold. By standing together, we can send a powerful message that hate has no place in our society or our government. ** Stand with us against hate and fear. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: There's a battle brewing in the Senate (Bernie vs. Oz)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1011?refcode=email-20241207_v&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, there’s a
battle brewing in the Senate.

Dr. Oz is Trump’s handpicked choice to privatize, and destroy, Medicare.
But Dr. Oz has to be confirmed by the Senate in order to become head of
the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS). And Bernie’s in the
Senate.

Bernie, the strongest advocate we have for Medicare and Social Security,
won’t just let Trump and his cronies destroy the health care so many
seniors rely on. Oz’s investments in big health corporations like CVS and
UnitedHealth and financial ties to Big Pharma companies like Novo Nordisk
are completely disqualifying.

His role at CMS would allow him to make decisions profitable for these
companies and devastating for the American people. Our grassroots movement
is organizing a massive opposition to Dr. Oz, but we can only do it if you
chip in and help us see this battle through.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241207nd&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Can you chip in to help us stop Dr. Oz? We’re mounting a strategic
campaign to stop Trump's extremist agenda and protect Medicare from a
corporate takeover.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241207nd&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241207nd&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241207nd&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241207nd&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241207nd&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241207nd&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20628?t=1060&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ][IMG]

Why do Dr. Oz and Trump want to privatize Medicare? Because their
corporate friends stand to profit in a BIG way.

Dr. Oz has been hauled in front of Congress to explain why he promoted
diet scams on TV. He’s boosted fringe conspiracy theories. He promoted
Novo Nordisk drugs on his TV show. He ran his 2022 Senate campaign pushing
Medicare privatization. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20629?t=1061&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]We’re in this fight to stop all of Oz’s plans —
can you join us with a donation right now?

On the other side, Bernie has spent his career fighting to protect and
expand Medicare and Social Security. He’s fought for lower drug prices, to
hold health care executives accountable, and for Medicare for All.

One of our greatest organizing goals under Trump must be protecting Social
Security and Medicare. Without these long-running and extremely popular
social programs, tens of millions of people would lose health coverage and
the benefits they need to live.

Republicans have spent decades trying to slash these programs, and now,
they have the best chance they’ve ever had. And Medicare has already been
partially privatized through Medicare Advantage — a boon for the companies
Dr. Oz owns stock in.

We must wage this fight now — with a massive media push to expose Dr. Oz —
and show Congress and the Trump admin that we won’t let the GOP destroy
Medicare. But we can only execute our campaign plans with grassroots
donations from people like you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241207nd&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Can you donate now to make sure we have the funds to take on Oz and
Trump's extreme agenda? Medicare is on the line. We’re 100% funded by
grassroots donations from the people — that’s why we’re ready to defeat
corporate-backed hacks like Dr. Oz.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1007&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13139?t=1010&akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7359%2E5885482%2EQjNJvZ

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: We’ve got a challenger—time to gear up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
Here’s how you can help!| | |
---
| | Hi Peter, It’s official: I have a challenger in this election. **This race is about more than one seat—it’s about protecting the values that matter most to our community.** From fighting for better schools to affordable healthcare and clean energy, I have always stood up for what is right. With this new opponent in the race, we have to act fast to build the resources we need to defend this seat and work for our families. **Here are three ways you can help today:**
---
| | 1️⃣ **Invest in ways to help us fight back!** Every dollar helps us get my message out to voters and push back against outside influences trying to undo our progress. 2️⃣ **Host a fundraiser or meet & greet! I want to talk to your neighbors, friends, and community.** Host an event for your network to meet with me and talk about how I can represent you in the General Assembly.3️⃣ **Volunteer!** Whether it’s knocking on doors, making calls, or hosting an event, every bit of time you can give makes a huge difference.

subject: This is scandalous.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:

|

[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_7_24_unnd1&n=4)

Kennedy Denied, Fauci Protected
[DOUBLE STANDARD EXPOSED](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_7_24_unnd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
This is scandalous.
Recent news media reports reveal **Dr. Anthony Fauci** , now a private citizen, enjoys taxpayer-funded security costing more than $15 million since his retirement in January 2023 — **complete with U.S. Marshals, a chauffeur-driven limousine, and armed protection.**
Meanwhile, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. was denied Secret Service protection for all but 43 days of his campaign. Even after multiple extremely alarming threats to his life, the Biden administration ignored the long-established practice of affording protection to high-profile candidates.
Think about this for a moment. Fauci, who was paid more than the President of the United States, now enjoys an eight-figure net worth and a record-breaking pension. He asserts his protection is necessary.
Yet Kennedy — a man who has risked everything to fight corruption and speak the truth — was forced to pay millions out-of-pocket for his safety.
Why? Because the establishment fears RFK Jr. They know he is a threat to their agenda — a man who won’t be silenced — and who can’t be bought.
So they left RFK, Jr. exposed, even as they spared no expense to shield one of their own — a lifetime bureaucrat who made arbitrary, non-science-based decisions that led to the worst COVID outcomes in the industrialized world.
Now, Kennedy is carrying the burden of millions in debt, forced to pay for his own safety while fighting for a better future for all of us.
[**Our goal is to retire this debt by the end of the year. Your support can make a difference. Please chip in $25, $50, or more to help pay down Kennedy’s private security debt.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_7_24_unnd1&n=6)
[My Debt Reduction Gift](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_7_24_unnd1&n=7)
The fight for truth and justice shouldn’t come at the cost of personal safety. Let’s stand with Kennedy so he’ll be able to focus fully on the task ahead: **protecting the health and well-being of every American**.
Your support matters more than ever.
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_7_24_unnd1&n=8)
[**Donate now to retire the debt >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_7_24_unnd1&n=9)

name: David Horowitz
subject: the enemy within
body:
50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a55ee3720ce4907bfa131676bde1429&_e=CYa66RuA48qY2vPiHD7BWtjzWm7CRVb4TbE8jbqYVmwM2sflxPYhP1IpzAFQKSFdWLVk5gF-MwtXbLcSCbYxy1xx-GPNq4Zb2RFDsPat8v0FauqezOaZfLHo4IUr2z4MgnAEQx2ia0yAuPvVWVZxJXagpb1HlBS1i8mI0WSxXUIKnxM_vmPoxYl0i0-2oYriJ-3VbkJt7KF2pxG8wqWXZbLKItgJH-UYPPBGf_iQpJK1tF16Npoho9lUopgKJDfigu41FNhWp1AlNsmZElzF4wb3EUOxi3ipU0IUZWDeAJcCQNUB7_ApTU3CeS8uUum5r0VmF-8K5YzSzfyZJTeIdeYY9K8AZ-SeuCDd9LA-PsBaJiz7XPHMlZFEHS3RHa4_i_2wxqHTQitDbxcf60KTFQ%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a55ee3720ce4907bfa131676bde1429&_e=CYa66RuA48qY2vPiHD7BWtjzWm7CRVb4TbE8jbqYVmwM2sflxPYhP1IpzAFQKSFdWLVk5gF-MwtXbLcSCbYxy1xx-GPNq4Zb2RFDsPat8v0FauqezOaZfLHo4IUr2z4MgnAEQx2ia0yAuPvVWVZxJXagpb1HlBS1i8mI0WSxXUIKnxM_vmPoxYl0i0-2oYriJ-3VbkJt7KF2pxG8wqWXZbLKItgJH-UYPPBGf_iQpJK1tF16Npoho9lUopgKJDfiGVTyDLPxBtf1BU4foTVJaNqAKe4E6fliCrSq-aL2kamVDfSJeAQkWtpGVFYnFQjKFwy7C-y84sna1KJ1wAEfM-BdrcqKM8kU6Dff2l1H1LVkXlNvYsi_eEvlEhEU7M6rxzvMn1xQd8fTkDkB-_w0ZA%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a55ee3720ce4907bfa131676bde1429&_e=CYa66RuA48qY2vPiHD7BWtjzWm7CRVb4TbE8jbqYVmwM2sflxPYhP1IpzAFQKSFdWLVk5gF-MwtXbLcSCbYxy1xx-GPNq4Zb2RFDsPat8v0FauqezOaZfLHo4IUr2z4MgnAEQx2ia0yAuPvVWVZxJXagpb1HlBS1i8mI0WSxXUIKnxM_vmPoxYl0i0-2oYriJ-3VbkJt7KF2pxG8wqWXZbLKItgJH-UYPPBGf_iQpJK1tF16Npoho9lUopgKJDfizLa9cTPbhNxqSxTq7V8CqarMCMKNdl7hP1bQb9v5ple_jy6F8BGzhDMCbuksSeHjAqC9FqqVyYB2Nt7VcY3G7D6WOPPliGnMliMZpek1JH6H0lUamaJBsQX2NMMjjyKmXDPAq-5UbJdsodGr_06N9A%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a55ee3720ce4907bfa131676bde1429&_e=CYa66RuA48qY2vPiHD7BWtjzWm7CRVb4TbE8jbqYVmwM2sflxPYhP1IpzAFQKSFdWLVk5gF-MwtXbLcSCbYxy1xx-GPNq4Zb2RFDsPat8v0FauqezOaZfLHo4IUr2z4MgnAEQx2ia0yAuPvVWVZxJXagpb1HlBS1i8mI0WSxXUIKnxM_vmPoxYl0i0-2oYriJ-3VbkJt7KF2pxG8wqWXZbLKItgJH-UYPPBGf_iQpJK1tF16Npoho9lUopgKJDfiOI9gzDk_Uc8cqCgt5C4GpVReOj5wJDrEoHw0INOJi4HiZvmt2XrebTkpCZN6L1OlHNUggtQgVtSE-ZfXz8aY9Zryr-WfTvKhFgqcPhZkUFhMpuYzmOTyXPxi-23xoF9cUPDK6pDjCis-h9IzSx2hbg%3D%3D)

With the new year fast approaching, there’s a lot of work on Sharice’s to-do list — and whether it’s fighting to protect abortion rights, lowering everyday costs, or defending Social Security and Medicare, we want to make sure your priorities are heard loud and clear.
Whatever’s on your mind, we want to hear directly from you. After all, input from supporters like you is vital as Sharice keeps up her fight for progress in Washington.
Thanks in advance for your response!
Team Sharice

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Inmate Number P01135780
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Dear Friend,

There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both
President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.

Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and
President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just
got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.

According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_,
_“SHE’S GOING FULL TILT WITH VENGEANCE AND EMOTIONS.”_

How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and
“vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the
Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the
cold hard _facts_.

But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch
hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk
free.

“‘IT IS UNDISPUTED’: FANI WILLIS HARSHLY CHASTISED BY JUDGE FOR
VIOLATING OPEN RECORDS LAWS IN LAWSUIT SEEKING HER COMMUNICATIONS WITH
JACK SMITH AND JAN. 6 COMMITTEE”

[SOURCE: _Law & Crime_]

When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as
INMATE NUMBER P01135780.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]
__

IN FANI’S EYES, THE “P” STOOD FOR “PRISONER.” BUT, AS AN
INNOCENT MAN FIGHTING FOR HIS FREEDOM, TO ME THE “P” STANDS FOR
“PATRIOT.”

And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your
last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this
despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I
fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in
Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!

_(Of course, if you cannot make a contribution at this time, please
don’t even think twice!)_

IF YOU CAN, AND, SERIOUSLY, ONLY IF YOU CAN, PLEASE MAKE A
CONTRIBUTION TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM
FUND – AS I KEEP FIGHTING FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AS THE
DEMOCRATS’ DEEP STATE TRIES TO JAIL ME FOR LIFE.
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

CONTRIBUTE $25
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&amount=25&utm_term=vbout]

CONTRIBUTE $50
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&amount=50&utm_term=vbout]

CONTRIBUTE $100
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&amount=100&utm_term=vbout]

CONTRIBUTE $250
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&amount=250&utm_term=vbout]

CONTRIBUTE $500
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&amount=500&utm_term=vbout]

CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Reconnect with God Each Day in 2025
body:
Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=3a93051e8fce43d18b1c636dfcbdde3d&_t=mbSNmRHuiCC9ytcb_-pb6ofvKKv2nMbr1mN0Ie5q506Yx4zZVqv5-vsKQQfSs1O-jXWEs6mjwwKpRyeL4ewceMq8xmS0rzXIlWdFmw9qMCQ8aULARNM2RQYbrgzSiwB5)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3a93051e8fce43d18b1c636dfcbdde3d&_e=JTqK5PE7llPK-dZQ9ZSnpmuvv0M2fPSlMC3wUhybhcM4jZtr57Xj-G2wXREgUbV9Sy0tXjIYB8fAwRqpeUZs_XXpXe1qHPWjpKOEQ6mKwAgRcVyVioLcPc6nG3yW8spNXhCvzQtlnCoAApkOJZN0WVW0zJFjVfcrJ7Fbxf8U4ZYlX0yWfeli8KK-0th4y-ZWK_JohmCMPcLR-SKZh9aMuDxJS3b6pMuvRXJsTyHh_pcM1tcWfoSFEubOQt7Ur6rLpoESRHxM2fdJdCMtrW7L8BnBaVHcRlFxzc3kIxvMkIshAqDNfVPRq8SF4AaHlPe4xubl-jLmnpz4-1ol4MGc6MebtX5pK8H1KEWgmq8Ftd5rMHqwfpmj5LznYQ_CndgryDqCqjujZbSrBnGqsBQCDulfPh8Fg6e63PL0z1h8DRw%3D)
Dear Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him. | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3a93051e8fce43d18b1c636dfcbdde3d&_e=JTqK5PE7llPK-dZQ9ZSnpmuvv0M2fPSlMC3wUhybhcM4jZtr57Xj-G2wXREgUbV9Sy0tXjIYB8fAwRqpeUZs_XXpXe1qHPWjpKOEQ6mKwAgRcVyVioLcPc6nG3yW8spNXhCvzQtlnCoAApkOJZN0WVW0zJFjVfcrJ7Fbxf8U4ZYlX0yWfeli8KK-0th4y-ZWK_JohmCMPcLR-SKZh9aMuDxJS3b6pMuvRXJsTyHh_pcM1tcWfoSFEubOQt7Ur6rLvzjwojdSZcpJo5UYiDc5mnn6Lm_K2i-LlUIs7OaSRJaFFZxj1ijsGRBz041s36fOIWOvYFakisH3aGESRdtLjugCQBSE9QzQbQqLcQD0af7dPbyRGtmBfx7QuArXmUaLqtgxKJw5PIvzlCmRwPOgwgMfyMwi6EnQd222tgszAVc%3D)
---
| | | | | With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:
* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities.

This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love.

Request your copy here: [https://secure.ptv.org/2025-navy-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional-generous-gift-1](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3a93051e8fce43d18b1c636dfcbdde3d&_e=JTqK5PE7llPK-dZQ9ZSnpmuvv0M2fPSlMC3wUhybhcM4jZtr57Xj-G2wXREgUbV9Sy0tXjIYB8fAwRqpeUZs_XXpXe1qHPWjpKOEQ6mKwAgRcVyVioLcPc6nG3yW8spNXhCvzQtlnCoAApkOJZN0WVW0zJFjVfcrJ7Fbxf8U4ZYlX0yWfeli8KK-0th4y-ZWK_JohmCMPcLR-SKZh9aMuDxJS3b6pMuvRXJsTyHh_pcM1tcWfoSFEubOQt7Ur6rL-873slJ-8IxgisCDdOrz5JxsgZOUTWm5cNQE4SwOMXYixI7hYGgjSR4c7ak4VzMDKtRF1i49p6ShMeOnxSM928Y0rCOO5epgRqk_bn7IBmrkEa-okr0Ie-AXLWZEFZ4N3FheiwzuR2lvt0PT7lQLMnM1h7uONhMdgW8OGSLFLk0%3D)

Thank you for being a part of this ministry. I'm praying that this new devotional will be a daily anchor point of encouragement and wisdom for all who read it.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Eliza Walton
subject: The Owyhee is calling!
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98336818/516326560/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmMTU1Zjc4LWNkYjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Gv5S2T9Si_AhSf6xRCjFWpuzVYNMdVO_V0fPKoJwCHU=&emci=8a45895e-d2b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=7f155f78-cdb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98336819/516326574/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmMTU1Zjc4LWNkYjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Gv5S2T9Si_AhSf6xRCjFWpuzVYNMdVO_V0fPKoJwCHU=&emci=8a45895e-d2b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=7f155f78-cdb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)P[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98336820/516326585/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmMTU1Zjc4LWNkYjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Gv5S2T9Si_AhSf6xRCjFWpuzVYNMdVO_V0fPKoJwCHU=&emci=8a45895e-d2b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=7f155f78-cdb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)rotecting the Owyhee Canyonlands has been our top priority campaign this year, and for good reason. The Owyhee Canyonlands is a vast, magical, and sacred place of more than 2.5 million acres, presenting the largest conservation opportunity in the American West. This one-of-a-kind treasure has no protections even though it faces encroaching threats of oil, recreation, and farming. **[But it needs you!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98336821/516326592/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmMTU1Zjc4LWNkYjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Gv5S2T9Si_AhSf6xRCjFWpuzVYNMdVO_V0fPKoJwCHU=&emci=8a45895e-d2b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=7f155f78-cdb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)** We’re running a fundraising drive to fund our final push to protect the Owyhee. Our goal is $5,000. If you donate now, your gift will go towards gathering petition signatures, recruiting volunteers to attend town halls, and empowering volunteers to write letters to the editor (LTEs) in support and speak to elected officials. clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, the Owyhee Canyonlands has been our top priority campaign this year, and for good reason. The Owyhee Canyonlands is a vast, magical, and sacred place of more than 2.5 million acres, presenting the largest conservation opportunity in the American West. This one-of-a-kind treasure has no protections even though it faces encroaching threats of oil, recreation, and farming. We’re running a fundraising drive to fund our final push to protect the Owyhee. Our goal is $5,000. If you donate now, your gift will go towards gathering petition signatures, recruiting volunteers to attend town halls, and empowering volunteers to write letters to the editor (LTEs) in support and speak to elected officials. The Owyhee is a special place that needs our protection, and we need the power to do it. We need our volunteers to continue to show up for the Owyhee, and we need the continued support of our generous donor base. Activism is what gets stuff like this done, but it takes all of us doing and giving what we can at every step of the way. With gratitude, Eliza Walton OLCV Coalition Director P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, but still remain on our general email list! | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. | ---|---

| Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | [CONTRIBUTE TO SUPPORT MY SON RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98336960/516327109/-1361974956?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20241207_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWMyZjY3MS1jZGI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oD3BvrEgtdgzXgcXeO-OwtYlKq4kpTI-CGvFo1rlNY=)

I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. **He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage.**

Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter.**

And I know that those experiences drive him _every single time_ he walks into his office in D.C.

[Peter, I know I’m biased, but there is truly no better person than Ritchie to represent NY-15. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. I know he would appreciate it so much. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98336961/516327110/-1361974956?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20241207_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWMyZjY3MS1jZGI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oD3BvrEgtdgzXgcXeO-OwtYlKq4kpTI-CGvFo1rlNY=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Team Scholten
subject: planning early is key
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Republicans may hold the majority in Congress, but they also hold the smallest majority in nearly a century. If we want to make gains in 2026 and hold this seat, we need to start building now.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98337143/516327681/-1774287068?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-12-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmE4ZTVhZi1jZGI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbCOf88JeBJ9v1fOe-6At5OPqY5jNcU_DlEIrXQ9pAU=)
---
| We only won this election because we spent **TWO** years planning, building, and executing those plans.

The next two years will look very similar, except we’re facing an even tougher battle. With Republicans controlling all majorities, planning early is key to combat the influx of attacks and disinformation coming our way.

**Republicans may hold the majority in Congress, but they also hold the smallest majority in nearly a century. If we want to make gains in 2026 and hold this seat, we need to start building now.

body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120724_1&amount=25]
News & Observer: As protesters shout, NC Senate Republicans override Cooper veto of powers-stripping bill [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120724_1&amount=25]
Opponents of voting rights are already assaulting our democracy, Team. Vote suppressors here in North Carolina are doing all they can to strip the incoming governor of power and codify their control before they lose their legislative supermajority, all because they didn't win all the elections they wanted.
Check out what this bill does:
* Transfers the power to appoint members of the State Board of Elections from incoming Gov-elect Josh Stein (D) to incoming State Auditor-elect Dave Boliek (R).
* Restricts the governor's ability to fill judicial vacancies, forcing them to choose from a list provided by the unelected officials of the departing judge's party.
* Removes the seats of two County Superior Court judges (in Wake and Forsyth counties) after those judges repeatedly ruled against suppressive election law changes.
* Prohibits the State Attorney General from participating in lawsuits that would invalidate action by the state Assembly, even in the defense of citizen's rights.
* Reduces the ballot "curing" time -- where ballots with simple mistakes can be corrected by the voter -- from nine days to three.
That's not all -- t his bill attacks the roles of the state education superintendent and the lieutenant governor, makes the State Highway Patrol an independent agency that the legislature controls, and more -- but you get the idea. If opponents of voting rights can't win at the ballot box they'll codify their power however else they can .
Please, we have to fight this bill on the ground and in the courts, plus be ready for whatever suppressive bills come when new legislative sessions start in less than a month. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120724_1&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120724_1&amount=25]

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo [] News & Observer: As protesters shout, NC Senate Republicans override Cooper veto of powers-stripping bill [] Opponents of voting rights are already assaulting our democracy, Team. Vote suppressors here in North Carolina are doing all they can to strip the incoming governor of power and codify their control before they lose their legislative supermajority, all because they didn't win all the elections they wanted. Check out what this bill does: Transfers the power to appoint members of the State Board of Elections from incoming Gov-elect Josh Stein (D) to incoming State Auditor-elect Dave Boliek (R). Restricts the governor's ability to fill judicial vacancies, forcing them to choose from a list provided by the unelected officials of the departing judge's party. Removes the seats of two County Superior Court judges (in Wake and Forsyth counties) after those judges repeatedly ruled against suppressive election law changes. Prohibits the State Attorney General from participating in lawsuits that would invalidate action by the state Assembly, even in the defense of citizen's rights. * Reduces the ballot "curing" time -- where ballots with simple mistakes can be corrected by the voter -- from nine days to three. That's not all -- t his bill attacks the roles of the state education superintendent and the lieutenant governor, makes the State Highway Patrol an independent agency that the legislature controls, and more -- but you get the idea. If opponents of voting rights can't win at the ballot box they'll codify their power however else they can . Please, we have to fight this bill on the ground and in the courts, plus be ready for whatever suppressive bills come when new legislative sessions start in less than a month. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. | | We vote because our voices matter, because our lives and rights depend on us taking action. From local elections to the White House, when we vote we help shape our democracy. One thing we learned from the recent election is that millions of people didn’t feel their voices mattered. Whether they faced barriers to accessing the ballot box, or felt as if their vote wouldn’t help create progress, our Fair Fight Action team knows that sharing your stories helps us learn so we can fight to protect voting rights. [**We want to hear from you, friends: what did you experience when voting in the recent election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98337344/516328413/629328948?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20241207_f_VotingStory_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmM5NWQxYS1jZWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X45Q93FUkmhJrgiWemfE8wWBQyvKFlCj0-GlgBhazyk=&emci=f0c85d1a-ceb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=02c95d1a-ceb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1037277) Did you encounter long lines, or did you use a mail-in ballot? What issues, if any, did you face, and how did you navigate through those problems? Sharing your story can help us understand what voters like you experienced, so we can shape our work to advocate for free and fair elections for all. [**Take a moment now to share your voting story >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98337345/516328416/629328948?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20241207_f_VotingStory_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmM5NWQxYS1jZWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X45Q93FUkmhJrgiWemfE8wWBQyvKFlCj0-GlgBhazyk=&emci=f0c85d1a-ceb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=02c95d1a-ceb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1037277) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98337346/516328418/629328948?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20241207_f_VotingStory_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmM5NWQxYS1jZWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X45Q93FUkmhJrgiWemfE8wWBQyvKFlCj0-GlgBhazyk=&emci=f0c85d1a-ceb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=02c95d1a-ceb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1037277)

Fair Fight Action was created to address issues accessing the polls, and to help voters know their rights and information. When we have the tools needed to make our decisions, we can fight back against voter suppression and disinformation, creating a democracy that includes all of us.
We’re interested in hearing stories from across the country as we plan the next phase of our work, knowing that we’ll face an extremist administration set on rolling back our rights — including the freedom to vote. In an election year where Democrats saw disappointing results in many races across the country, **Team Vasquez held strong and kept this district blue for a second term** — for the first time in over three decades. The strength of our movement can’t be understated, especially as we look ahead to another four years under Donald Trump and total Republican control in Congress. But here’s the thing: We can’t lose our momentum now. We may have emerged victorious in 2024, but the real fight is only just beginning. Over the next several years, NM-02 will be the frontline as we work to defend our rights and freedoms from MAGA extremism. [That’s why I need to ask: Will you chip in $10 or any amount you can spare to help us enter the new year strong? name: Camille Alcala
subject: Catching up and want to touch base
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Hey there — I am finally catching up after the chaos of the last month and wanted to reach out to touch base.
I know the Presidential election results were extremely disappointing. Our whole team here at CADEM was absolutely gutted on Election Night, and I am sure you were too.
But as the vote counting continued into November, we got some glimmers of hope.
First, we flipped CA-27 with George Whitesides’ victory. Then Derek Tran flipped CA-45 . And finally, after every single vote was counted, Adam Gray flipped CA-13 by a mere 187 votes. In total, we got 4 out of 6 of our overall targeted seats.
Through this entire process, the California Democratic Party was on the ground, keeping our operations running to ensure every single eligible vote was counted. We contacted voters who needed to correct ballot errors or signature issues for their vote to count, and those efforts may have really made the difference.
For everyone who helped fund these “overtime” Election efforts, thank you so much. Your support was make-or-break in keeping our operations online, and as Finance Director, I could not be more appreciative.
Now, this month is our first public FEC Filing deadline since the election. We are hoping to refill our coffers from these efforts before that public deadline so that we have resources and project strength before Donald Trump is sworn in. Would you consider renewing your support today?
My personal ActBlue donation link is here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]
Thank you again,
- Camille
--
Finance Director
California Democratic Party

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=footer&amount=5]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=rmUl4GssqcGeQYSlxRPjK82pZL8IdBXXyYkSpZZRrlgmSc91Kb83m8s0cUAI4mjjUreU8ASGZP9X%2FbZLcXGCrbGPxaHnWABxTooDO8lEDYS6zRedRpnuowvWTmHmFsMUophe6u7IIOqyqgJIAaz2c3riSpJ8%2BeVuV%2FiPAju3GOOfkuuYguumuSmtnOSCNBh0XMkNm2U3OLBOBbJ2B1jFCETDZbFfNRWkZalwGg845powy5HLk8znTWMh1nzxdhp3WLWWcLJR1TuxDEMEBeUIBYiRUD0IJiCrTpuGfK89yddi%2B3Y6BLhSoc5QRYJN0ieuBgnjMEqibJEKuguJVx2eI7kS2dll2%2Bp0h80icYBrm%2FM5hklVvtNLFIZJNg0mw2OTAKsGdTYtGh6yFIZaN1KBW5Rtyu%2F%2BAUUCxMhDixeyusE%3D .

subject: My U.S. Army Veteran husband is facing jail because of a Soros-Funded prosecutor
body:
| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s.
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Looking at this photo used to make me so proud.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a9fdd49bd4a748c5b183a20d31c29d05&_e=iGZ7kPvbEsqyyZb5IY3-lovMPnwcrgSF7Sg9ijsH9VFXt0hKrOJpq0xGiZStOb4VN6gNQY6zUOfNyVJpBDLduphL38dcdUuaI4m-PLTRg0Hsd2aP7L6-EZZMxz31vIRArj89JYjvB17EFIZtOY_vykPkjzHLPDJjHgfsy2Ylrr3mAHw0ApXx6fczP7NVvXw-Wt3YcyHE2TEB0Bj7a0Z3qHFaJM7sljSfQW2y0TRMaFchpVnIUkYZNDcGXTKSemWBs9NkSYXYqrHayPB7qiFVnFgG7pyBD4NdZmmNOCIE8GKImMDKx-Aj20IC_VPBjPI_Y8HxO3WmRKDEwvQ8Ir3OBTJBAQkYzneua14Eaa4_iP7jLnRaeG6oVRLaGcjkLG9MsHg9gb514z_EJslthPfNkw%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a9fdd49bd4a748c5b183a20d31c29d05&_e=iGZ7kPvbEsqyyZb5IY3-lovMPnwcrgSF7Sg9ijsH9VFXt0hKrOJpq0xGiZStOb4VN6gNQY6zUOfNyVJpBDLduphL38dcdUuaI4m-PLTRg0Hsd2aP7L6-EZZMxz31vIRArj89JYjvB17EFIZtOY_vykPkjzHLPDJjHgfsy2Ylrr3mAHw0ApXx6fczP7NVvXw-Wt3YcyHE2TEB0Bj7a0Z3qHFaJM7sljSfQW2y0TRMaFfzJuInmhnjWbHi-3HOsleyu7DQjOymStTY_bqItzMb_mLtlfxtGdAnwelXBN9oATim4STON1fc43UcnUWzDaiqX43fPQlHOknaivhX9S14QR4sSfHe85Xel_Z2ZuRtY58_RWT4BY-ozLR8IHXWIjrTNclPsgGgZrwONcTXbQTzhA%3D%3D)
---
Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a _Soros-funded_ , _anti-police_ _prosecutor_. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a9fdd49bd4a748c5b183a20d31c29d05&_e=iGZ7kPvbEsqyyZb5IY3-lovMPnwcrgSF7Sg9ijsH9VFXt0hKrOJpq0xGiZStOb4VN6gNQY6zUOfNyVJpBDLduphL38dcdUuaI4m-PLTRg0Hsd2aP7L6-EZZMxz31vIRArj89JYjvB17EFIZtOY_vykPkjzHLPDJjHgfsy2Ylrr3mAHw0ApXx6fczP7NVvXw-Wt3YcyHE2TEB0Bj7a0Z3qHFaJM7sljSfQW2y0TRMaFcfNoP9dQmkvGCKJqqs9srYHQaElpZomv8oU4Tre8C9S0MOzfWXvudku8rSpcF9ma-dy1oNdbKZZE5NLbqZTbsCt6kQHHXrvK2XHIxD1Yhy9lIzShHMxVSxrGmiILwOPPCM2Rr9FYIISl408awVlehrNbS_GI8gR9g0kPX8lmVsgA%3D%3D)** Because next February **this Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try to rip my husband away from me and our sons -- and lock him up for** _**11********years**_**\-- for saving a fellow officer's life.** I'm sorry, I'm so angry and heartbroken I don't even know where to begin. Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation _and_ the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who _hates_ the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in February and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a9fdd49bd4a748c5b183a20d31c29d05&_e=iGZ7kPvbEsqyyZb5IY3-lovMPnwcrgSF7Sg9ijsH9VFXt0hKrOJpq0xGiZStOb4VN6gNQY6zUOfNyVJpBDLduphL38dcdUuaI4m-PLTRg0Hsd2aP7L6-EZZMxz31vIRArj89JYjvB17EFIZtOY_vykPkjzHLPDJjHgfsy2Ylrr3mAHw0ApXx6fczP7NVvXw-Wt3YcyHE2TEB0Bj7a0Z3qHFaJM7sljSfQW2y0TRMaFe6i6nRWUQnM56Rxl0qL_Z7H-pi9c7usQ05ipPevUewJZSTp9N3TrIleL4pqSH1hTQu9w4UpwIWgqUbrDx9xOEZu7bSejZ_lvh4tUussGGrbG_aC1xlRLZ4vKo3a4gSeh7Zw-geMI9EHrrbSeVEZgtCLiLQUBi5QlwAiPhB5CQnHQ%3D%3D)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. **[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a9fdd49bd4a748c5b183a20d31c29d05&_e=iGZ7kPvbEsqyyZb5IY3-lovMPnwcrgSF7Sg9ijsH9VFXt0hKrOJpq0xGiZStOb4VN6gNQY6zUOfNyVJpBDLduphL38dcdUuaI4m-PLTRg0Hsd2aP7L6-EZZMxz31vIRArj89JYjvB17EFIZtOY_vykPkjzHLPDJjHgfsy2Ylrr3mAHw0ApXx6fczP7NVvXw-Wt3YcyHE2TEB0Bj7a0Z3qHFaJM7sljSfQW2y0TRMaFdML4Uut-843TdRSqyvDnzggCobI_wTjW5fMV_BAUjNpgMk0TlErkAEM1cmr17-itHtd9wm9z8TVrgrvo3RM0qvvkmAA98KcLdlLYqIAlnNIUa8Nw6RQmxKArB8m-SDabx01tRdecC6Y5k0E6bhYTunxO85Xytex16JDvtITOIGTQ%3D%3D) ** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
| | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- [**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a9fdd49bd4a748c5b183a20d31c29d05&_e=iGZ7kPvbEsqyyZb5IY3-lovMPnwcrgSF7Sg9ijsH9VFXt0hKrOJpq0xGiZStOb4VN6gNQY6zUOfNyVJpBDLduphL38dcdUuaI4m-PLTRg0Hsd2aP7L6-EZZMxz31vIRArj89JYjvB17EFIZtOY_vykPkjzHLPDJjHgfsy2Ylrr3mAHw0ApXx6fczP7NVvXw-Wt3YcyHE2TEB0Bj7a0Z3qHFaJM7sljSfQW2y0TRMaFfE51fBT0lH8Ypy9USPM664AQnPcdFfD6gKH5p7bR5cKmId9cKQ-TRWDD8EXmQ2lkXFoOm1bVgBevPiFk9v_egDqFoEuphJwYtFBJ9TM6Ueh8VeV6MA2KL5D0_vWRmS7ILxLCuxWk2Ps_5VHNGBGPbN4R0VDpJ2TvPSbH2fGSliFA%3D%3D) P.P.S. Brad's trial starts in February, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_
---
© Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a9fdd49bd4a748c5b183a20d31c29d05&_e=iGZ7kPvbEsqyyZb5IY3-lgA7TybDrnhuXztqcbvJT9ojBLFnV_6nYi_fhD8G6wawL59mkw73u0MNdZemRYmM6Et6ow4gHMmCGe863NT3dA-jbBW351cSHacl-dXSJL0L5ESkwnuL2yK9fszT9dnALo94DYs1H2YJ3kh6VMkNB4srIzXLA64EgjswQc4lpkCBZbb5DuJuFAermGrMqT-AYQ%3D%3D)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Better suited for internet troll than FBI Director
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8208%2E5257348%2Eh4OLmE)
Derek,
Last weekend, Donald Trump nominated Kash Patel to be FBI Director.
And while you might have thought Matt Gaetz, Tulsi Gabbard, or Pete Hegseth were the most inflammatory nominees Trump could pick, I promise you Kash Patel raises even the same or greater alarm bells.
For starters, he’s spread dangerous, false conspiracy theories about a “deep state” that is unfairly persecuting MAGA world. And he’s calling for a “comprehensive housecleaning” of professionals at the Justice Department, and said he’ll close down the FBI headquarters and turn it into a “museum of the deep state” on his first day.
_While I served on the House Intelligence Committee, Kash Patel was a major part of the efforts to sabotage a thorough investigation of Russia’s involvement in the 2016 election — and for his work, he was rewarded with a post in the Trump Administration._
Strangest of all, Derek — but not surprising, given his close allegiances with Donald Trump: Kash Patel wrote a children’s book titled _The Plot Against the King_ — featuring characters such as “King Donald,” “Hillary Queenton,” and one particular “shifty knight.” Who, you guessed it, is supposed to be me, Adam Schiff.
**_Literally repackaging the Big Lie about the 2020 election into a children’s book._**
There’s more — Kash Patel hosted a children’s event to promote his new book, which featured a castle, a catapult, and watermelons adorned with, you guessed it, my face.
If it sounds ridiculous, it's because it is. But it also demonstrates how completely disastrous Kash Patel would be as director of the FBI. He should stick to his strengths and remain an internet troll.
Again, this is someone who has called for the arrest of journalists, politicians, and anyone who stands up to Donald Trump. There’s no end to the damage he could cause.
**[We need to make sure Kash Patel’s nomination for Director of the FBI is soundly defeated in the U.S. Senate. Add your name alongside mine to call on members of the Senate to reject Kash Patel.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202412-patel.GyZypa&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241207_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8208%2E5257348%2Eh4OLmE)**

Adam

# [#]
Peter, Trump has taken no time in making nominations for his cabinet. Here at TOP PAC, we’ve been keeping a close eye on his nominations and we want to catch you up on some of his most SHOCKING picks:

❌ Dr. Mehmet Oz for Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services
❌ Elon Musk + Vivek Ramaswamy for Department of Government Efficiency
❌ Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for Department of Health and Human Services
❌ Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense

Trump will only continue to nominate the most unqualified and inexperienced picks for his cabinet. Look, we think these picks are AWFUL, but we need to know if our top supporters feel the same.

Your response to our one-minute survey is needed before midnight tonight: Do you support or oppose Trump’s current cabinet nominations? [https://secure.everyaction.com/8q1zlH6IdUuqPS8iQmuq3A2]

I OPPOSE HIS NOMINATIONS » [https://secure.everyaction.com/8q1zlH6IdUuqPS8iQmuq3A2]

I’M NOT SURE » [https://secure.everyaction.com/8q1zlH6IdUuqPS8iQmuq3A2]

Thank you for your response!

| | Fellow Patriot,
Please take special note of our response to the news of President Biden’s unprecedented unconditional pardon of Hunter Biden, as described below.
President Joe Biden repeatedly told the American People that he would not pardon his son, Robert Hunter Biden, for his federal crimes. Yet yesterday, Mr. Biden granted Hunter a __‘Full and Unconditional Pardon’ for ‘those offenses against the United States which he has committed or may have committed or taken part in during the period from January 1, 2014, through December 1, 2024.’ __
**Notably, the pardon covers the entire time that Hunter served on the board of _Burisma_ , the Ukrainian natural gas company, and improperly lobbied the U.S. government on its behalf. **
Biden’s action has no precedent in our Republic’s history.
Biden weakly claimed that: _“Hunter was treated differently.” _
**Indeed he was** : the evidence obtained by America First Legal, the House Judiciary Committee, the House Oversight Committee, and others confirms that Hunter and his family were indeed treated very differently — _they received special treatment from federal law enforcement that is denied to ordinary American citizens! _

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, Please take special note of our response to the news of President Biden’s unprecedented unconditional pardon of Hunter Biden, as described below. President Joe Biden repeatedly told the American People that he would not pardon his son, Robert Hunter Biden, for his federal crimes. Yet yesterday, Mr. Biden granted Hunter a ‘Full and Unconditional Pardon’ for ‘those offenses against the United States which he has committed or may have committed or taken part in during the period from January 1, 2014, through December 1, 2024.’ Notably, the pardon covers the entire time that Hunter served on the board of Burisma , the Ukrainian natural gas company, and improperly lobbied the U.S. government on its behalf. Biden’s action has no precedent in our Republic’s history. Biden weakly claimed that: “Hunter was treated differently.” Indeed he was : the evidence obtained by America First Legal, the House Judiciary Committee, the House Oversight Committee, and others confirms that Hunter and his family were indeed treated very differently — they received special treatment from federal law enforcement that is denied to ordinary American citizens! The FBI and the Department of Justice were aware of but silent about the Biden family’s foreign financial entanglements and conflicts of interest. In 2020, the FBI hid Hunter’s laptop from public view, and pressured social media companies to do the same, thereby ‘fortifying’ the 2020 Presidential election and protecting his family’s foreign influence-peddling business. Of course, this is disgraceful and unacceptable. body:
I wanted to give you a brief update:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98337849/516330113/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWU0YjhkMy1kNWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDZDCqxGoOYY3W_OIoXauBZgpl9O0ZxgNfcht8c3QlA=)

**Peter, Trump’s pick to lead the FBI, Kash Patel, is _dangerously unqualified_.** _**Trump’s Pick for FBI Director Already Has an Enemies List**_ **If confirmed, Kash Patel will be Trump’s hatchet man in the FBI.** He’ll do Trump’s bidding, he’ll upend the rule of law, and he’ll do everything he can to check off each and every one of Trump’s biggest priorities, including:
* Investigate Journalists that he calls “the enemy of the people”
* Attack political “enemies” with sham investigations, burdensome subpoenas & indictments, and mountains of legal fees.
* Seek to legitimize Donald Trump’s 2020 Big Lie with fake evidence and legal threats.

Look, as the son of Japanese Americans imprisoned in internment camps, my family knows all too well what it means for the U.S. Government to be weaponized against its own citizens. Make no mistake, that’s exactly what Donald Trump and Kash Patel want to do with the FBI.

**It is up to us, the people, to defend our constitution, our liberty, and the rule of law from abuses of power. So I’m asking for your help:**

[**Will you stand with me by signing our urgent petition to call on the Senate to reject Kash Patel and the other unqualified appointees? There is real momentum on our side to hand Donald Trump his first losses of his presidency. Can we count on you to add your signature? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98337850/516330114/222319307?refcode=MTFC_20241207_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWU0YjhkMy1kNWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDZDCqxGoOYY3W_OIoXauBZgpl9O0ZxgNfcht8c3QlA=&emci=99161093-12b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=dae4b8d3-d5b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=18839602) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR PETITION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98337851/516330115/222319307?refcode=MTFC_20241207_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWU0YjhkMy1kNWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDZDCqxGoOYY3W_OIoXauBZgpl9O0ZxgNfcht8c3QlA=&emci=99161093-12b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=dae4b8d3-d5b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=18839602)

Peter, I know many of us have tuned out of politics after the losses we faced.

But Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies have wasted absolutely no time in re-creating the same chaos we saw from his team from 2017-2021.

In just the past week, Donald Trump has appointed:

**Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for Secretary of Health and Human Services** — a man who has spread numerous false conspiracy claims about everything from vaccines to HIV/AIDS.

**Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense** — a Fox News host who paid off a woman who had previously accused him of sexual assault, was barred from working President Biden’s Inauguration because the Pentagon deemed him an “Insider threat”, and has said that women should not serve in combat roles.

**Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence** — a pick that Putin is reportedly “gleeful” about and who has parroted Russian propaganda enough to even concern Republicans.

The bottom line is, no matter how unqualified, corrupt, or vindictive these nominees are, there is one thing that unites them: **Unquestioning loyalty to Donald Trump.**

**That is an extreme danger to our democracy and rule of law. Even Republicans in the Senate know this, Peter – there are rumors some of Trump’s picks could get voted down, so we need your voice!**

[**Will you stand with me by signing our urgent petition to call on the Senate to reject these unqualified appointees? There is real momentum on our side to hand Donald Trump his first loss of his presidency. Hey Peter, Though we saw some historic victories in Democratic turnout this year, the election results have us restructuring our strategy for 2026. Because if we learned anything, it’s that we need to reconnect and win back voters in every corner of the Peach State. Now more than ever, we have to demonstrate that every community matters. That’s why we want you to be part of the conversation as we plan for the fight to come. _What issues should Democrats prioritize more looking ahead?
What should our strategy look like moving forward?
Where should we focus our efforts?_ [Before our survey closes at midnight tonight, will you help us pave the way by answering just a few short questions? ⬇️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98338117/516331105/-360047787?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_111724_1_4_KGB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDFmOWJhZC1kNmI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ktb6log0o6L7-vPnspxnsVL9MQimXEw9x-VlP5IXxe8=&emci=1db879a5-d6b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=401f9bad-d6b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=43566853) | | **[TAKE SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98338118/516331106/-360047787?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_111724_1_4_KGB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDFmOWJhZC1kNmI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ktb6log0o6L7-vPnspxnsVL9MQimXEw9x-VlP5IXxe8=&emci=1db879a5-d6b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=401f9bad-d6b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=43566853)**
